entries.summary_en: OpenAI introduced ChatGPT as a free research preview, using a conversational format that could answer follow-up questions, acknowledge mistakes, challenge incorrect premises, and reject inappropriate requests.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 以免費研究預覽形式推出 ChatGPT；其對話介面能回答追問、承認錯誤、質疑不實前提並拒絕不當要求。

entries.summary_en: We're excited to announce several updates to ChatGPT! Here's what's new: 1. General performance: Among other improvements, users will notice that ChatGPT is now less likely to refuse to answer questions.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2022-12-15 為 ChatGPT 更新模型或體驗；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI began rolling out saved conversation history with controls to view, rename, and delete past chats.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 開始推出已儲存的對話紀錄，使用者可查看、重新命名與刪除過往聊天。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI began testing a daily ChatGPT message cap for some users, with extended access available in exchange for feedback.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 對部分使用者測試 ChatGPT 每日訊息上限，並提供以回饋換取延長使用的選項。

entries.title_zh: ChatGPT 品質與事實性更新
entries.summary_en: OpenAI updated ChatGPT to perform better across a broad range of topics with improved factuality.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 更新 ChatGPT，使其在廣泛主題上的表現與事實準確度提升。

entries.summary_en: ChatGPT added a control that lets users stop a response while it is being generated.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT 新增控制按鈕，讓使用者能在回覆生成途中立即停止。

entries.summary_en: We're excited to announce several updates to ChatGPT! Here's what's new: 1. We made more improvements to the ChatGPT model! It should be generally better across a wide range of topics and has improved factuality.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2023-01-09 為 ChatGPT 更新模型或體驗；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_zh: 事實性與數學能力改善
entries.summary_en: OpenAI upgraded the ChatGPT model with improved factuality and mathematical capabilities.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2023-01-30 為 ChatGPT 更新模型或體驗；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI announced a $20-per-month ChatGPT plan with peak-time access, faster responses, and priority access to new features.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 宣布每月 20 美元的 ChatGPT 方案，提供尖峰時段存取、更快回覆與新功能優先使用權。

entries.title_zh: Default 與 Turbo 模型選擇器
entries.summary_en: Plus users began receiving a model dropdown with Standard and speed-optimized Turbo options.
entries.summary_zh: Plus 使用者開始獲得模型下拉選單，可在標準版與速度最佳化的 Turbo 版之間切換。

entries.summary_en: As we recently announced, our Plus plan comes with early access to new, experimental features. We are beginning to roll out a way for Plus users the ability to choose between different versions of ChatGPT: Default: the standard ChatGPT model
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2023-02-09 為 ChatGPT Plus 調整方案、額度或計費；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_zh: ChatGPT Plus 擴展至國際市場
entries.summary_en: OpenAI expanded ChatGPT Plus availability beyond the United States to international customers.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 將 ChatGPT Plus 從美國擴展至其他國家的客戶。

entries.title_en: Faster Turbo becomes the Plus default
entries.title_zh: 較快的 Turbo 成為 Plus 預設
entries.summary_en: OpenAI made the faster model formerly called Turbo the default for Plus users while temporarily retaining the prior version.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 將先前稱為 Turbo 的較快模型設為 Plus 預設，同時暫時保留舊版本。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI updated the ChatGPT model used on the free plan to serve more users.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 更新免費方案所使用的 ChatGPT 模型，以服務更多使用者。

entries.summary_en: We’ve made several updates to ChatGPT! Here's what's new: We’ve updated performance of the ChatGPT model on our free plan in order to serve more users.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2023-02-13 為 ChatGPT 調整方案、額度或計費；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: GPT‑3.5 Turbo and Whisper became available through the OpenAI API, adding chat-oriented language generation and hosted speech-to-text.
entries.summary_zh: GPT‑3.5 Turbo 與 Whisper 正式進入 OpenAI API，帶來聊天式生成與託管語音轉文字。
entries.source_name: Introducing APIs for GPT-3.5 Turbo and Whisper

entries.summary_en: We’re excited to bring GPT-4, our latest model, to our ChatGPT Plus subscribers. GPT-4 has enhanced capabilities in:
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2023-03-14 為 ChatGPT Plus 新增功能；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI released GPT-4, a large multimodal model with stronger reasoning and instruction following, and made it available to ChatGPT Plus subscribers.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 發布具更強推理與指令遵循能力的大型多模態模型 GPT-4，並向 ChatGPT Plus 訂閱者開放。

entries.title_en: GPT-4 launches in ChatGPT Plus and the API
entries.title_zh: GPT‑4 在 ChatGPT Plus 與 API 發布
entries.summary_en: OpenAI released GPT-4 with access in ChatGPT Plus and through an API waitlist for developers.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 發布 GPT‑4，並透過 ChatGPT Plus 與開發者 API 候補名單提供存取。

entries.summary_en: Codex models.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2023-03-20 為 Codex 公布淘汰計畫；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: Schedule/replacements: 2023-03-23 code-davinci-002 gpt-4o; 2023-03-23 code-davinci-001 gpt-4o; 2023-03-23 code-cushman-002 gpt-4o; 2023-03-23 code-cushman-001 gpt-4o
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2023-03-20 公告 Codex models 的棄用或下線時程，並列出替代方案與遷移方向。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI introduced an experimental browsing model that could retrieve up-to-date web information for ChatGPT.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出實驗性瀏覽模型，讓 ChatGPT 能擷取最新網路資訊。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI introduced an experimental ChatGPT model that could run Python and handle file uploads and downloads.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出可執行 Python 並處理檔案上傳與下載的實驗性 ChatGPT 模型。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI announced initial plugin support so ChatGPT could access current information, run computations, or use third-party services.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 宣布 ChatGPT 初步支援外掛，使其能取得即時資訊、執行運算或使用第三方服務。

entries.summary_en: We are announcing experimental support for AI plugins in ChatGPT — tools designed specifically for language models. Plugins can help ChatGPT access up-to-date information, run computations, or use third-party services. You can learn more about plugins here. Today, we will begin extending plugin access to users and developers from our waitlist. The plugins we are rolling out with are:
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2023-03-23 為 ChatGPT 推出新產品或能力；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI added an export option that emails users a file containing their conversations and other relevant ChatGPT account data.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 新增匯出選項，會以電子郵件寄送包含對話與其他相關 ChatGPT 帳戶資料的檔案。
entries.source_name: New ways to manage your data in ChatGPT

entries.summary_en: ChatGPT added a setting to turn off history; those conversations would not train models, would not appear in the sidebar, and would be retained for 30 days for abuse monitoring.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT 新增關閉聊天紀錄的設定；相關對話不會用於模型訓練、不會出現在側邊欄，僅為濫用監測保留 30 天。
entries.source_name: New ways to manage your data in ChatGPT

entries.title_zh: 宣布淘汰 Legacy GPT-3.5 模型
entries.summary_en: OpenAI announced that the Legacy GPT-3.5 option would be deprecated on May 10; existing conversations could continue but new messages would use the default model.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 宣布 Legacy GPT-3.5 選項將於 5 月 10 日淘汰；既有對話仍可延續，但新訊息會改用預設模型。

entries.summary_en: We’ve made several updates to ChatGPT! Here's what's new: You can now turn off chat history and export your data from the ChatGPT settings. Conversations that are started when chat history is disabled won’t be used to train and improve our models, and won’t appear in the history sidebar.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2023-05-03 為 ChatGPT 更新模型或體驗；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_zh: 超出長度後可繼續生成
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT added a control to continue a response beyond its maximum token limit, counting each continuation against the message allowance.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT 新增在回覆達到最大 token 長度後繼續生成的功能，每次續寫會計入訊息額度。

entries.title_en: Plugins beta rolls out to Plus
entries.title_zh: 外掛 Beta 推向 Plus
entries.summary_en: OpenAI began rolling third-party plugins and the Plugin Store to all Plus users through the beta-features panel.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 開始透過 Beta 功能面板，向所有 Plus 使用者推出第三方外掛與 Plugin Store。

entries.title_en: Web browsing and Plugins are now rolling out in beta
entries.summary_en: If you are a ChatGPT Plus user, enjoy early access to experimental new features, which may change during development. We’ll be making these features accessible via a new beta panel in your settings, which is rolling out to all Plus users over the course of the next week. Once the beta panel rolls out to you, you’ll be able to try two new features:
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2023-05-12 為 ChatGPT Plus 擴大開放範圍；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: Web browsing beta rolls out to Plus
entries.title_zh: 網路瀏覽 Beta 推向 Plus
entries.summary_en: OpenAI began rolling web browsing to all Plus users through a new beta-features settings panel.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 開始透過新的 Beta 功能設定面板，向所有 Plus 使用者推出網路瀏覽。

entries.title_en: Introducing the ChatGPT app for iOS
entries.summary_en: OpenAI launched a free iOS app in the United States with conversation syncing, Whisper voice input, and Plus access to GPT-4.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 在美國推出免費 iOS App，支援對話同步、Whisper 語音輸入，以及 Plus 使用 GPT-4。
entries.source_name: Introducing the ChatGPT app for iOS

entries.title_en: ChatGPT iOS expands to 11 more countries
entries.title_zh: ChatGPT iOS 再擴展至 11 國
entries.summary_en: OpenAI expanded the iOS app from its U.S. launch to 11 additional countries and regions.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 將 iOS App 從美國擴展至另外 11 個國家與地區。

entries.title_zh: 更深入整合 Browse with Bing
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT browsing exposed clickable Bing queries so users could inspect the searches the model performed.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT 瀏覽功能加入可點擊的 Bing 查詢，讓使用者檢視模型執行的搜尋。

entries.summary_en: The iOS app added a local control to disable chat history and model-training use for new conversations.
entries.summary_zh: iOS App 新增本機控制，可關閉新對話的聊天紀錄與模型訓練用途。

entries.title_en: iOS app available in more countries, shared links in alpha, Bing Plugin, disable history on iOS
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT app for iOS in more countries Good news! We’re expanding availability of the ChatGPT app for iOS to more countries and regions. Users in 11 countries can now download the ChatGPT app in the Apple App Store including the United States: Albania, Croatia, France, Germany, Ireland, Jamaica, Korea, New Zealand, Nicaragua, Nigeria, and the United Kingdom.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2023-05-24 為 ChatGPT 擴大開放範圍；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: ChatGPT began testing shareable conversation links that recipients could view or copy into their own chats.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT 開始測試可分享的對話連結，接收者可查看或複製至自己的聊天。

entries.title_en: Function calling and other API updates
entries.title_zh: API 函式調用與模型更新
entries.summary_en: OpenAI added function calling to Chat Completions, released updated GPT-4 and GPT-3.5 Turbo snapshots, a 16K GPT-3.5 Turbo variant, lower prices, and deprecation schedules.
entries.summary_zh: Chat Completions 新增函式調用，並同步推出模型快照、16K 上下文、降價與棄用時程。
entries.source_name: Function calling and other API updates

entries.summary_en: On June 13, 2023, we announced new chat model versions in the Function calling and other API updates blog post. The three original versions will be retired in June 2024 at the earliest. As of January 10, 2024, only existing users of these models will be able to continue using them.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2023-06-13 為 OpenAI API 公布淘汰計畫；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_zh: Updated chat models 棄用公告
entries.summary_en: On June 13, 2023, we announced new chat model versions in the Function calling and other API updates blog post. The three original versions will be retired in June 2024 at the earliest. As of January 10, 2024, only existing users of these models will be able to continue using them. Schedule/replacements: at earliest 2024-06-13 gpt-4-0314 $30.00 / 1M input tokens + $60.00 / 1M output tokens gpt-4o; 2024-09-13 gpt-3.5-turbo-0301 $15.00…
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2023-06-13 公告 Updated chat models 的棄用或下線時程，並列出替代方案與遷移方向。

entries.summary_en: We’ve made two updates to the mobile ChatGPT app: Browsing: Plus users can now use Browsing to get comprehensive answers and current insights on events and information that extend beyond the model's original training data. To try it out, enable Browsing in the “new features” section of your app settings. Then select GPT-4 in the model switcher and choose “Browse with Bing” in the drop-down.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2023-06-22 為 ChatGPT Search 更新模型或體驗；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: Plus users could enable Browse with Bing in the mobile app to answer questions with current web information.
entries.summary_zh: Plus 使用者可在行動 App 中啟用 Browse with Bing，以最新網路資訊回答問題。

entries.title_zh: 行動版搜尋紀錄深層連結
entries.summary_en: Tapping a mobile search result began taking users directly to the corresponding point in a conversation.
entries.summary_zh: 點擊行動版搜尋結果後，會直接跳至對話中的對應位置。

entries.title_zh: 模型更新：Browsing is temporarily disabled
entries.summary_en: We've learned that the browsing beta can occasionally display content in ways we don't want, e.g. if a user specifically asks for a URL's full text, it may inadvertently fulfill this request. We are temporarily disabling Browse while we fix this.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2023-07-03 為 ChatGPT 更新模型或體驗；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI temporarily disabled Browse after finding it could reproduce page content in unintended ways, including fulfilling requests for full URL text.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 發現 Browse 可能以非預期方式重現頁面內容，包括滿足取得完整網址文字的要求，因此暫時停用。

entries.title_en: Code Interpreter beta rolls out to all Plus users
entries.title_zh: Code Interpreter Beta 推向所有 Plus 使用者
entries.summary_en: OpenAI began rolling Code Interpreter on the web to every Plus user, enabling code execution and uploaded-file analysis.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 開始向所有 Plus 使用者推出網頁版 Code Interpreter，可執行程式碼並分析上傳檔案。

entries.title_en: Code interpreter is now rolling out in beta on web
entries.summary_en: We’re rolling out code interpreter to all ChatGPT Plus users over the next week. It lets ChatGPT run code, optionally with access to files you've uploaded. You can ask ChatGPT to analyze data, create charts, edit files, perform math, etc.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2023-07-06 為 ChatGPT Plus 擴大開放範圍；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: On July 06, 2023, we announced the upcoming retirements of older GPT-3 and GPT-3.5 models served via the completions endpoint. We also announced the upcoming retirement of our first-generation text embedding models. They will be shut down on January 04, 2024. InstructGPT models
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2023-07-06 為 OpenAI API 公布淘汰計畫；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_zh: GPT and embeddings 棄用公告
entries.summary_en: On July 06, 2023, we announced the upcoming retirements of older GPT-3 and GPT-3.5 models served via the completions endpoint. We also announced the upcoming retirement of our first-generation text embedding models. They will be shut down on January 04, 2024. Shutdown date Deprecated model Deprecated model price Recommended replacement 2024-01-04 text-ada-001 $0.40 / 1M tokens gpt-3.5-turbo-instruct 2024-01-04 text-babbage-001 $0.50…
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2023-07-06 公告 GPT and embeddings 的棄用或下線時程，並列出替代方案與遷移方向。

entries.summary_en: All paying API customers gained GPT-4 access; GPT-3.5 Turbo, DALL·E and Whisper APIs were declared generally available, while older Completions, embeddings and Edits systems received retirement plans.
entries.summary_zh: 所有付費 API 客戶取得 GPT‑4 存取；GPT‑3.5 Turbo、DALL·E 與 Whisper API 進入 GA，舊系統同步公布退役計畫。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI doubled the GPT-4 allowance for Plus users to 40 messages every three hours.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 將 Plus 使用者的 GPT-4 額度加倍至每三小時 40 則訊息。

entries.title_zh: 方案更新：Higher message limits for GPT-4
entries.summary_en: We're doubling the number of messages ChatGPT Plus customers can send with GPT-4. Rolling out over the next week, the new message limit will be 40 every 3 hours.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2023-07-19 為 ChatGPT Plus 調整方案、額度或計費；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: Custom instructions are rolling out in beta
entries.title_zh: 開放使用：Custom instructions are rolling out in beta
entries.summary_en: We’re starting to roll out custom instructions, giving you more control over ChatGPT’s responses. Set your preferences once, and they’ll steer future conversations. You can read more about custom instructions in the blogpost here. Custom instructions are available to all Plus users and expanding to all users in the coming weeks.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2023-07-20 為 ChatGPT 擴大開放範圍；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI introduced Custom Instructions for Plus users so persistent preferences could guide future ChatGPT conversations.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 向 Plus 使用者推出自訂指示，讓持久化偏好能引導之後的 ChatGPT 對話。

entries.title_en: Introducing the ChatGPT app for Android
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT for Android is now available for download in the United States, India, Bangladesh, and Brazil from the Google Play Store. We plan to expand the rollout to additional countries over the next week. You can track the Android rollout here.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2023-07-25 為 ChatGPT 調整方案、額度或計費；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: ChatGPT remembers the selected GPT-4 model
entries.title_zh: ChatGPT 記住所選 GPT-4 模式
entries.summary_en: Plus users no longer defaulted back to GPT-3.5 when starting a new chat; ChatGPT remembered the previously selected GPT-4 mode.
entries.summary_zh: Plus 使用者開新聊天時不再自動回到 GPT-3.5；ChatGPT 會記住所選的 GPT-4 模式。

entries.title_zh: Code Interpreter 支援多檔上傳
entries.summary_en: Plus users could upload multiple files to Code Interpreter for combined data analysis and insight generation.
entries.summary_zh: Plus 使用者可向 Code Interpreter 上傳多個檔案，進行合併資料分析與洞察生成。

entries.title_en: Prompt examples, suggested replies, and keyboard shortcuts
entries.title_zh: 提示範例、建議回覆與鍵盤捷徑
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT added starter prompt examples, suggested follow-up replies, longer login sessions, and keyboard shortcuts.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT 新增起始提示範例、建議追問、更長的登入時效與鍵盤捷徑。

entries.summary_en: We’re rolling out a bunch of small updates to improve the ChatGPT experience. Shipping over the next week: 1. Prompt examples: A blank page can be intimidating. At the beginning of a new chat, you’ll now see examples to help you get started.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2023-08-03 為 ChatGPT 擴大開放範圍；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: Custom instructions are now available to free users
entries.title_zh: 方案更新：Custom instructions are now available to free users
entries.summary_en: Custom instructions are now available to ChatGPT users on the free plan, except for in the EU UK where we will be rolling it out soon! Customize your interactions with ChatGPT by providing specific details and guidelines for your chats.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2023-08-09 為 ChatGPT 調整方案、額度或計費；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_zh: 自訂指示開放免費使用者
entries.summary_en: Custom Instructions became available on the free plan outside the European Union and United Kingdom.
entries.summary_zh: 自訂指示向歐盟與英國以外的免費方案使用者開放。

entries.title_en: Custom instructions are now available to users in the EU & UK
entries.summary_en: Custom instructions are now available to users in the European Union United Kingdom. To add your instructions:

entries.summary_en: On August 22nd, 2023, we announced the new fine-tuning API (/v1/finetuning/jobs) and that the original /v1/fine-tunes API along with legacy models (including those fine-tuned with the /v1/fine-tunes API) will be shut down on January 04, 2024. This means that models fine-tuned using the /v1/fine-tunes API will no longer be accessible and you would have to fine-tune new models with the updated endpoint and associated base models.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2023-08-22 為 OpenAI API 公布淘汰計畫；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: On August 22nd, 2023, we announced the new fine-tuning API ( /v1/finetuning/jobs ) and that the original /v1/fine-tunes API along with legacy models (including those fine-tuned with the /v1/fine-tunes API) will be shut down on January 04, 2024. This means that models fine-tuned using the /v1/fine-tunes API will no longer be accessible and you would have to fine-tune new models with the updated endpoint and associated base models. Sch…

entries.summary_en: OpenAI launched self-serve fine-tuning for GPT-3.5 Turbo, letting developers customize the model with their own data for narrow use cases.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 GPT‑3.5 Turbo 自助微調，讓開發者可用自有資料針對特定任務客製模型。
entries.source_name: GPT-3.5 Turbo fine-tuning and API updates

entries.summary_en: Today we’re launching ChatGPT Enterprise, which offers enterprise-grade security and privacy, unlimited higher-speed GPT-4 access, longer context windows for processing longer inputs, advanced data analysis capabilities, customization options, and much more. ChatGPT Enterprise also provides unlimited access to Advanced Data Analysis, previously known as Code Interpreter.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2023-08-28 為 ChatGPT Windows 更新安全與治理機制；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI launched ChatGPT Enterprise with enterprise security and privacy, higher-speed GPT-4, longer context, advanced data analysis, customization, and admin capabilities.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 ChatGPT Enterprise，提供企業級隱私與安全、無上限高速 GPT-4、32K 上下文、進階資料分析與管理控制。

entries.title_zh: ChatGPT 介面語言支援 Alpha
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT web began an opt-in alpha for nine interface languages, including Traditional Chinese.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT 網頁版開始測試九種介面語言的選用 Alpha，包括繁體中文。

entries.title_en: ChatGPT language support - Alpha on web
entries.title_zh: 功能更新：ChatGPT language support - Alpha on web
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT now supports a limited selection of languages in the interface: Portuguese (pt-BR)
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2023-09-11 為 ChatGPT 新增功能；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI began making one-or-more-image input available to Plus users across platforms, including a mobile drawing tool to direct attention.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 開始向各平台 Plus 使用者開放一張或多張圖像輸入，並在行動版提供繪圖工具以指示關注區域。
entries.source_name: ChatGPT can now see, hear, and speak

entries.title_en: New voice and image capabilities in ChatGPT
entries.title_zh: 新增voice and image capabilities 於 ChatGPT
entries.summary_en: We are beginning to roll out new voice and image capabilities in ChatGPT. They offer a new, more intuitive type of interface by allowing you to have a voice conversation or show ChatGPT what you’re talking about. Learn more here. Voice (Beta) is now rolling out to Plus users on iOS and Android
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2023-09-25 為 ChatGPT Voice 擴大開放範圍；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI began rolling two-way voice conversations with five preset voices to Plus users on iOS and Android.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 開始向 iOS 與 Android 的 Plus 使用者推出雙向語音對話，提供五種預設聲音。
entries.source_name: ChatGPT can now see, hear, and speak

entries.title_en: Browsing is rolling back out to Plus users
entries.title_zh: 開放使用：Browsing is rolling back out to Plus users
entries.summary_en: Browsing is rolling out to all Plus users. ChatGPT can now browse the internet to provide you with current and authoritative information, complete with direct links to sources. It is no longer limited to data before September 2021. To try it out, enable Browsing in your beta features setting.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2023-09-27 為 ChatGPT 擴大開放範圍；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: Browse with Bing returned to all Plus users with current web information and direct links to sources.
entries.summary_zh: Browse with Bing 重返所有 Plus 使用者，提供最新網路資訊與來源直接連結。

entries.title_en: DALL-E 3 rolls out in ChatGPT beta
entries.title_zh: DALL-E 3 在 ChatGPT 展開 Beta
entries.summary_en: OpenAI began integrating DALL-E 3 into ChatGPT on web and mobile so GPT-4 users could generate images conversationally.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 開始在 ChatGPT 網頁與行動版整合 DALL-E 3，讓 GPT-4 使用者能以對話生成圖像。

entries.title_en: DALL·E 3 is now rolling out in beta
entries.title_zh: 開放使用：DALL·E 3 is now rolling out in beta
entries.summary_en: We’ve integrated DALL·E 3 with ChatGPT, allowing it to respond to your requests with images. From a simple sentence to a detailed paragraph, ask ChatGPT what you want to see and it will translate your ideas into exceptionally accurate images. To use DALL·E 3 on both web and mobile, choose DALL·E 3 in the selector under GPT-4. The message limit may vary based on capacity.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2023-10-16 為 ChatGPT Images 擴大開放範圍；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: Browsing is now out of beta
entries.title_zh: 推出：Browsing is now out of beta
entries.summary_en: Browsing, which we re-launched a few weeks ago, is moving out of beta. Plus and Enterprise users no longer need to switch the beta toggle to use browse, and are able to choose "Browse with Bing" from the GPT-4 model selector.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2023-10-17 為 ChatGPT Enterprise & Edu 推出新產品或能力；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: Browsing moved out of beta for Plus and Enterprise users and no longer required a beta-features toggle.
entries.summary_zh: 瀏覽功能對 Plus 與 Enterprise 使用者脫離 Beta，不再需要啟用 Beta 功能開關。

entries.title_en: DALL-E 3 available in ChatGPT Plus and Enterprise
entries.title_zh: DALL-E 3 開放 ChatGPT Plus 與 Enterprise
entries.summary_en: DALL-E 3 became available to Plus and Enterprise users for conversational image creation and iterative revisions inside ChatGPT.
entries.summary_zh: DALL-E 3 向 Plus 與 Enterprise 使用者開放，可在 ChatGPT 內以對話生成圖像並反覆修改。
entries.source_name: DALL-E 3 is now available in ChatGPT Plus and Enterprise

entries.summary_en: On November 6th, 2023, we announced the release of an updated GPT-3.5-Turbo model (which now comes by default with 16k context) along with deprecation of gpt-3.5-turbo-0613 and gpt-3.5-turbo-16k-0613. As of June 17, 2024, only existing users of these models will be able to continue using them. Fine-tuned models created from these base models are not affected by this deprecation, but you will no longer be able to create new fine-tuned…

entries.summary_en: OpenAI launched a GPT-4 Turbo preview with knowledge through April 2023, a 128K context window, improved capability, and lower API prices.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 GPT-4 Turbo 預覽，知識更新至 2023 年 4 月，具 128K 上下文、更強能力與更低 API 價格。
entries.source_name: New models and developer products announced at DevDay

entries.summary_en: You can now create custom versions of ChatGPT that combine instructions, extra knowledge, and any combination of skills. Learn more here. We’re rolling out custom versions of ChatGPT that you can create for a specific purpose—called GPTs. GPTs are a new way for anyone to create a tailored version of ChatGPT to be more helpful in their daily life, at specific tasks, at work, or at home—and then share that creation with others. For exa…

entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 開始向 ChatGPT Plus、Team 與 Enterprise 使用者推出可探索社群 GPT 的商店。

entries.title_en: Introducing the GPT Store and ChatGPT Team plan
entries.summary_en: Discover what’s trending in the GPT Store The store features a diverse range of GPTs developed by our partners and the community. Browse popular and trending GPTs on the community leaderboard, with categories like DALL·E, writing, research, programming, education, and lifestyle.

entries.title_en: Memory and new controls for ChatGPT
entries.summary_en: We’re testing memory with ChatGPT. Remembering things you discuss across all chats saves you from having to repeat information and makes future conversations more helpful. You're in control of ChatGPT's memory. You can explicitly tell it to remember something, ask it what it remembers, and tell it to forget conversationally or through settings. You can also turn it off entirely.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2024-02-13 為 ChatGPT Memory 新增功能；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI began testing cross-chat memory with a small portion of Free and Plus users, including conversational controls to remember, inspect, forget, or disable memories.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 開始對少量 Free 與 Plus 使用者測試跨聊天記憶，並提供以對話要求記住、檢視、忘記或停用記憶的控制。
entries.source_name: Memory and new controls for ChatGPT

entries.title_en: Temporary Chat for conversations without memory

entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 Temporary Chat；這類對話不出現在紀錄、不使用記憶，也不會用於模型訓練。

entries.summary_en: We’re making it easier for people to experience the benefits of AI without needing to sign up. Starting today, you can use ChatGPT instantly, without needing to sign-up. We're rolling this out gradually, with the aim to make AI accessible to anyone curious about its capabilities.

entries.title_en: Introduced a series of updates to the Assistants API
entries.summary_en: Introduced a series of updates to the Assistants API , including a new file search tool allowing up to 10,000 files per assistant, new token controls, and support for tool choice.
entries.summary_zh: API 更新：Introduced a series of updates to Assistants API , including a 全新 file search tool allowing up to 10,000 files per assistant, 全新 token controls, and 支援 tool choice。OpenAI 將此列為 2024-04-17 的更新；重點涉及代理與工具調用，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.title_en: Added a new function calling option toolchoice
entries.summary_en: Added a new function calling option toolchoice: "required" to the Chat Completions and Assistants APIs. Added a guide for the Batch API and Batch API support for embeddings models
entries.summary_zh: 新增：a 全新 function calling option toolchoice: "required" to Chat Completions and Assistants APIs。OpenAI 將此列為 2024-04-29 的更新；重點涉及代理與工具調用、向量嵌入與檢索，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.title_en: Memory available to ChatGPT Plus users
entries.title_zh: 記憶功能開放 ChatGPT Plus
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT Memory became available to Plus users outside Europe and Korea, with settings to review or disable it.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT 記憶功能向歐洲與韓國以外的 Plus 使用者開放，並可在設定中檢視或停用。

entries.title_en: Memory is now available to Plus users
entries.title_zh: 開放使用：Memory is now available to Plus users
entries.summary_en: Memory is now available to all ChatGPT Plus users, except in Europe Korea where we will be rolling it out soon. Using Memory is easy: just start a new chat and tell ChatGPT anything you’d like it to remember. Memory can be turned on or off in settings. Team, Enterprise, and GPTs to come.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2024-04-29 為 ChatGPT Plus 擴大開放範圍；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI began rolling out a macOS desktop app to Plus users with Option-Space access, screenshot discussion, and voice conversations, with broader availability planned.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 開始向 Plus 使用者推出 macOS 桌面 App，支援 Option-Space 快速喚起、截圖討論與語音對話，之後再擴大開放。
entries.source_name: Introducing GPT-4o and more tools to ChatGPT free users

entries.summary_en: OpenAI introduced a native ChatGPT macOS app with a keyboard shortcut for quick access and screen-aware assistance, initially rolling out to Plus users.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出原生 ChatGPT macOS App，提供快速鍵與螢幕情境協助，初期向 Plus 用戶逐步推出。

entries.title_en: GPT-4o and advanced tools roll out to free users
entries.title_zh: GPT-4o 與進階工具推向免費使用者
entries.summary_en: OpenAI began giving Free users limited GPT-4o plus web answers, data analysis, charts, image discussion, file uploads, GPT Store access, and memory.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 開始向 Free 使用者提供有限的 GPT-4o，以及網路回答、資料分析、圖表、圖像討論、檔案上傳、GPT Store 與記憶。
entries.source_name: Introducing GPT-4o and more tools to ChatGPT free users

entries.summary_en: OpenAI announced GPT-4o, its omni flagship model designed to reason across audio, vision, and text in real time, and initially released text and image inputs with text output.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 發布可即時跨音訊、視覺與文字推理的全模態旗艦模型 GPT-4o，首波開放文字與圖像輸入、文字輸出。

entries.summary_en: GPT-4o is our newest flagship model that provides GPT-4-level intelligence that is much faster and improves on its capabilities across text, voice, and vision. Currently, only the new text and image capabilities have been rolled out. You can read more about the announcement here. Plus users will have a message limit that is up to 5x greater than free users, and Team and Enterprise users will have even higher limits.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2024-05-13 為 GPT-4o 發布模型；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: Released GPT-4o in the API. GPT-4o is our fastest and most affordable flagship model.

entries.summary_en: OpenAI introduced a friendlier visual redesign with a new home screen and message layout.

entries.source_name: Introducing GPT-4o and more tools to ChatGPT free users

entries.summary_en: OpenAI launched a university offering powered by GPT-4o with advanced tools, higher limits, shared GPTs, enterprise security, and no training on institutional conversations or data.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 為大學推出 ChatGPT Edu，包含 GPT‑4o、進階工具、自訂 GPT 分享、企業安全、SSO、SCIM 與管理控制。

entries.summary_en: On June 6th, 2024, we notified developers using gpt-4-32k and gpt-4-vision-preview of their upcoming deprecations in one year and six months respectively. As of June 17, 2024, only existing users of these models will be able to continue using them.

entries.summary_en: On June 6th, 2024, we notified developers using gpt-4-32k and gpt-4-vision-preview of their upcoming deprecations in one year and six months respectively. As of June 17, 2024, only existing users of these models will be able to continue using them. Schedule/replacements: 2025-06-06 gpt-4-32k $60.00 / 1M input tokens + $120 / 1M output tokens gpt-4o; 2025-06-06 gpt-4-32k-0613 $60.00 / 1M input tokens + $120 / 1M output tokens gpt-4o;…

entries.summary_en: OpenAI and Apple announced GPT-4o-powered ChatGPT integration for Siri and systemwide Writing Tools in iOS, iPadOS, and macOS, with no account required for free access.

entries.summary_en: We’re introducing GPT-4o mini, the most capable and cost-efficient small model available today. GPT-4o mini surpasses GPT-3.5 Turbo and other small models on academic benchmarks across both textual intelligence and multimodal reasoning and supports the same range of languages as GPT-4o. It also demonstrates strong performance in function calling, which can enable developers to build applications that fetch data or take actions with e…

entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 發布速度更快、成本更低且特別聚焦程式工作的推理模型 o1-mini，首波與 o1-preview 一同向 ChatGPT Plus 與 Team 開放。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI released the first preview of its reasoning model series in ChatGPT and the API, designed to spend more time thinking through difficult science, coding, and math problems.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 在 ChatGPT 與 API 發布首個推理模型系列預覽，設計上會花更多時間思考困難的科學、程式與數學問題。

entries.summary_en: v1/chat/completions Released o1-preview and o1-mini, new large language models trained with reinforcement learning to perform complex reasoning tasks.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2024-09-12 為 o1 發布模型；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_zh: API 推出 o1‑preview 與 o1‑mini 推理模型
entries.summary_en: Released o1-preview and o1-mini , new large language models trained with reinforcement learning to perform complex reasoning tasks.
entries.summary_zh: API 推出 o1‑preview 與 o1‑mini 推理模型。OpenAI 將此列為 2024-09-12 的功能；重點涉及平台功能與可用性，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.title_en: Independent Safety and Security Committee oversight
entries.title_zh: 獨立安全與資安委員會監督
entries.summary_en: OpenAI said its Safety and Security Committee would become an independent Board oversight committee with authority over model-development and deployment safeguards.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 宣布 Safety and Security Committee 成為獨立董事會監督委員會，監督模型開發與部署安全措施。
entries.source_name: An update on our safety & security practices

entries.title_en: o1-preview and o1-mini rate limits increased
entries.title_zh: 提高 o1-preview 與 o1-mini 使用上限
entries.summary_en: OpenAI raised ChatGPT limits to 50 o1-preview queries per week and 50 o1-mini queries per day.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 將 ChatGPT 額度提高至 o1-preview 每週 50 次、o1-mini 每日 50 次。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI began rolling GPT-4o-native Advanced Voice to Plus and Team users with low-latency conversation, nonverbal-cue awareness, and emotional expressiveness.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 開始向 Plus 與 Team 推出 GPT-4o 原生的 Advanced Voice，具低延遲對話、非語言線索感知與情緒表達。

entries.summary_en: omni-moderation-latest Released new omni-moderation-latest moderation model, which supports both images and text (for some categories), supports two new text-only harm categories, and has more accurate scores.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2024-09-26 為 ChatGPT Images 更新安全與治理機制；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_zh: 推出 omni‑moderation‑latest 多模態審核模型
entries.summary_en: Released new omni-moderation-latest moderation model , which supports both images and text (for some categories), supports two new text-only harm categories, and has more accurate scores.
entries.summary_zh: 推出 omni‑moderation‑latest 多模態審核模型。OpenAI 將此列為 2024-09-26 的功能；重點涉及安全與治理、圖像與影片，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.title_en: Released several new features at OpenAI DevDay in San Francisco
entries.summary_en: v1/chat/completions Released several new features at OpenAI DevDay in San Francisco:
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2024-10-01 為 OpenAI API 推出新產品或能力；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: Released several new features at OpenAI DevDay in San Francisco
entries.title_zh: OpenAI DevDay API 與代理平台更新
entries.summary_en: Released several new features at OpenAI DevDay in San Francisco : Realtime API : Build fast speech-to-speech experiences into your applications using a WebSockets interface. Model distillation : Platform for fine-tuning cost-efficient models with your outputs from a large frontier model. Image fine-tuning : Fine-tune GPT-4o with images and text to improve vision capabilities. Evals : Create and run custom evaluations to measure model…
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI DevDay API 與代理平台更新。OpenAI 將此列為 2024-10-01 的功能；重點涉及即時語音與音訊、圖像與影片、模型微調，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.title_zh: 淘汰通知：Assistants API beta v1
entries.summary_en: In April 2024 when we released the v2 beta version of the Assistants API, we announced that access to the v1 beta would be shut off by the end of 2024. Access to the v1 beta will be discontinued on December 18, 2024. See the Assistants API v2 beta migration guide to learn more about how to migrate your tool usage to the latest version of the Assistants API.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2024-10-02 為 OpenAI API 公布淘汰計畫；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_zh: Assistants API beta v1 棄用公告
entries.summary_en: In April 2024 when we released the v2 beta version of the Assistants API, we announced that access to the v1 beta would be shut off by the end of 2024. Access to the v1 beta will be discontinued on December 18, 2024. See the Assistants API v2 beta migration guide to learn more about how to migrate your tool usage to the latest version of the Assistants API. Schedule/replacements: 2024-12-18 OpenAI-Beta: assistants=v1 OpenAI-Beta: ass…
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2024-10-02 公告 Assistants API beta v1 的棄用或下線時程，並列出替代方案與遷移方向。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI introduced a GPT-4o-powered collaborative workspace for writing and coding, with direct editing, inline feedback, shortcuts, and version restoration, initially for Plus and Team.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出由 GPT-4o 驅動的寫作與程式協作工作區，支援直接編輯、行內回饋、捷徑與版本還原，首波向 Plus 與 Team 開放。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI released an early Windows app to Plus, Team, Enterprise, and Edu users with an Alt-Space companion window.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 向 Plus、Team、Enterprise 與 Edu 推出 Windows App 搶先版，包含 Alt-Space Companion Window。

entries.title_zh: ChatGPT Windows App 早期版本
entries.summary_en: OpenAI released an early Windows app for Plus, Team, Enterprise and Edu, including an Alt+Space companion window.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 向 Plus、Team、Enterprise 與 Edu 推出 Windows App 早期版本，包含 Alt+Space 伴隨視窗。

entries.title_en: Released new gpt-4o-audio-preview model for chat completions
entries.summary_en: Released new gpt-4o-audio-preview model for chat completions, which supports both audio inputs and outputs. Uses the same underlying model as the Realtime API .
entries.summary_zh: 推出：全新 gpt-4o-audio-preview 模型 for chat completions, which supports both audio inputs and outputs。OpenAI 將此列為 2024-10-17 的功能；重點涉及即時語音與音訊，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.title_en: Added five new voice types in the Realtime API and Chat Completions API.
entries.summary_en: Added five new voice types in the Realtime API and Chat Completions API .
entries.summary_zh: 新增：five 全新 voice types in Realtime API and Chat Completions API。OpenAI 將此列為 2024-10-30 的功能；重點涉及即時語音與音訊，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.title_en: Advanced Voice Mode and search on desktop clients
entries.title_zh: 桌面 App 新增進階語音與搜尋
entries.summary_en: The macOS and Windows apps added Advanced Voice Mode; Windows added chat-history search, while macOS added o1 model support, Handoff, notifications, find-in-chat, and performance improvements.
entries.summary_zh: macOS 與 Windows App 新增進階語音；Windows 加入聊天記錄搜尋，macOS 則加入 o1、Handoff、通知與效能改善。

entries.summary_en: The macOS app added Advanced Voice Mode for real-time, interruptible, emotionally expressive desktop conversations.
entries.summary_zh: macOS App 新增 Advanced Voice Mode，提供即時、可打斷且具情緒表達的桌面對話。

entries.summary_en: The Windows app added hands-free Advanced Voice conversations with interruption support and emotion-aware responses.
entries.summary_zh: Windows App 新增免手持的 Advanced Voice 對話，支援打斷與情緒感知回覆。

entries.summary_en: The Windows app added Control-K search across prior conversations.
entries.summary_zh: Windows App 新增 Control-K，可搜尋過往對話。

entries.title_en: o1 models and Apple Handoff on macOS
entries.title_zh: macOS 支援 o1 模型與 Apple Handoff
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT macOS added o1-preview and o1-mini, Apple Handoff with iOS, draft restoration, in-conversation find, and completion notifications.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT macOS 新增 o1-preview、o1-mini、與 iOS 的 Apple Handoff、草稿還原、對話內搜尋及完成通知。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI integrated web search into ChatGPT with automatic or manual activation, timely answers, source links, and new visual treatments for weather, stocks, sports, news, and maps.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 將網路搜尋整合進 ChatGPT，可自動或手動啟動，提供即時答案、來源連結，以及天氣、股票、運動、新聞與地圖的新視覺呈現。

entries.summary_en: v1/chat/completions Released Predicted Outputs, which greatly reduces latency for model responses where much of the response is known ahead of time. This is most common when regenerating the content of documents and code files with only minor changes.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2024-11-04 為 ChatGPT Enterprise & Edu 推出新產品或能力；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_zh: 推出：Predicted Outputs , which greatly reduces latency for 模型 responses where much of response is known ahead of time.
entries.summary_en: Released Predicted Outputs , which greatly reduces latency for model responses where much of the response is known ahead of time. This is most common when regenerating the content of documents and code files with only minor changes.
entries.summary_zh: 推出：Predicted Outputs , which greatly reduces latency for 模型 responses where much of response is known ahead of time。OpenAI 將此列為 2024-11-04 的功能；重點涉及代理與工具調用，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.title_zh: ChatGPT 中的 GPT-4o mini 更新
entries.summary_en: OpenAI updated GPT-4o mini for Free, Plus, Team, and logged-out ChatGPT users.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 更新供 Free、Plus、Team 與未登入 ChatGPT 使用者使用的 GPT-4o mini。

entries.title_en: Take and attach photos in the Windows app
entries.title_zh: Windows App 可拍照並附加
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT Windows added webcam capture for attaching a photo directly to a conversation.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT Windows 新增網路攝影機拍照，可直接將照片附加到對話。

entries.title_en: Attach screenshots in the Windows app
entries.title_zh: Windows App 可附加螢幕截圖
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT Windows integrated the Snipping Tool to capture a window, full screen, or custom region and insert it into a chat.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT Windows 整合 Snipping Tool，可擷取視窗、全螢幕或自訂區域並插入聊天。

entries.title_en: Model picker and Temporary Chat in the macOS chat bar
entries.title_zh: macOS 聊天列加入模型選擇與 Temporary Chat
entries.summary_en: The redesigned macOS chat bar added direct model switching and a Temporary Chat toggle.
entries.summary_zh: 重新設計的 macOS 聊天列加入直接切換模型與 Temporary Chat 開關。

entries.title_en: Work with Apps beta on macOS
entries.title_zh: 整合更新：macOS Work with Apps Beta
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT macOS gained an early beta that could read content from supported coding apps to provide context-aware answers for Plus and Team users.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT macOS 新增搶先 Beta，可讀取支援的程式開發 App 內容，為 Plus 與 Team 使用者提供具上下文的回答。

entries.title_en: Work with Apps on macOS and screenshots on Windows
entries.title_zh: macOS Work with Apps 與 Windows 截圖
entries.summary_en: The macOS app began reading supported coding apps in beta, while the Windows app added instant Snipping Tool screenshots and sidebar improvements.
entries.summary_zh: macOS App 開始以 beta 讀取支援的編碼工具；Windows App 新增 Snipping Tool 截圖與側欄改善。

entries.title_zh: Advanced Voice 登陸 ChatGPT Web
entries.summary_en: Starting today, we’re beginning to roll out Advanced Voice Mode on web (already available on mobile and desktop apps). You can now start a voice chat on chatgpt.com on your desktop and have real-time, natural conversations with ChatGPT while doing tasks like shopping, planning, writing, and brainstorming. We’re starting to roll out to all paid (Plus, Team, Enterprise, and Edu) users today, and expect it to take a few days.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2024-11-19 為 ChatGPT Voice 調整方案、額度或計費；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_zh: GPT-4o 寫作與檔案分析更新
entries.summary_en: OpenAI updated GPT-4o on paid ChatGPT tiers with more natural, audience-aware writing and deeper analysis of uploaded files.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 更新付費 ChatGPT 方案中的 GPT-4o，使寫作更自然且更能掌握受眾，並加深對上傳檔案的分析。

entries.summary_en: v1/chat/completions Released gpt-4o-2024-11-20, our newest model in the gpt-4o series.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2024-11-20 為 GPT-4o 發布模型；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_zh: 推出：gpt-4o-2024-11-20 , our newest 模型 in gpt-4o series.
entries.summary_en: Released gpt-4o-2024-11-20 , our newest model in the gpt-4o series.
entries.summary_zh: 推出：gpt-4o-2024-11-20 , our newest 模型 in gpt-4o series。OpenAI 將此列為 2024-11-20 的更新；重點涉及平台功能與可用性，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.title_en: ChatGPT Web sidebar and responsive-experience redesign
entries.title_zh: ChatGPT Web 側邊欄與響應式體驗改版
entries.summary_en: OpenAI rolled out a floating sidebar, revised conversation and GPT navigation, an updated composer, improved Canvas coexistence, and a more robust mobile web experience.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出浮動側邊欄、改版的對話與 GPT 導覽、新輸入列、更佳 Canvas 並列顯示，以及更穩健的行動網頁體驗。

entries.title_en: Updates to the ChatGPT Web experience
entries.summary_en: We are rolling out the following updates over the next two weeks to all ChatGPT users. New floating mode added with soft dismiss behavior
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2024-11-22 為 ChatGPT 擴大開放範圍；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: Slash commands and more coding apps on macOS
entries.title_zh: macOS 新增斜線指令與更多程式 App
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT macOS added slash commands for search, o1 reasoning, and DALL-E plus Work with Apps support for VS Code forks, JetBrains IDEs, and more editors and terminals.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT macOS 新增搜尋、o1 推理與 DALL-E 的斜線指令，並將 Work with Apps 擴展至 VS Code 衍生版、JetBrains IDE 與更多編輯器、終端機。

entries.title_en: Work with Apps reaches Enterprise and Edu
entries.title_zh: Work with Apps 開放 Enterprise 與 Edu
entries.summary_en: OpenAI expanded macOS Work with Apps to Enterprise and Edu, with an administrative control to disable it for a workspace.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 將 macOS Work with Apps 擴展至 Enterprise 與 Edu，並提供工作區管理員停用控制。

entries.summary_en: Launched Usage API, enabling customers to programmatically query activities and spending across OpenAI APIs.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2024-12-04 為 OpenAI API 推出新產品或能力；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: Launched Usage API , enabling customers to programmatically query activities and spending across OpenAI APIs.
entries.summary_zh: 推出：Usage API , enabling customers to programmatically query activities and spending across OpenAI APIs。OpenAI 將此列為 2024-12-04 的功能；重點涉及平台功能與可用性，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.title_en: Full OpenAI o1 released in ChatGPT
entries.title_zh: 完整版 OpenAI o1 登陸 ChatGPT
entries.summary_en: OpenAI made the production o1 model available in ChatGPT alongside the new Pro plan, presenting it as its most intelligent model for difficult reasoning tasks.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 隨新的 Pro 方案在 ChatGPT 中提供正式版 o1，並將其定位為處理困難推理工作的最智慧模型。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI launched a $200-per-month plan with unlimited access to o1, o1-mini, GPT-4o, and Advanced Voice plus access to o1 pro mode.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出每月 200 美元的方案，提供 o1、o1-mini、GPT-4o 與 Advanced Voice 無上限使用，以及 o1 pro mode。

entries.summary_en: ChatGPT Pro introduced an o1 mode that uses more compute and longer reasoning time to improve reliability on difficult problems.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT Pro 推出會使用更多運算與更長推理時間的 o1 模式，以提升困難問題的可靠度。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI moved Sora out of research preview by launching the faster Sora Turbo as a standalone product for Plus and Pro users, with storyboards, remixing, blending, and up to 1080p 20-second output.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 將 Sora 移出研究預覽，向 Plus 與 Pro 推出更快的獨立產品 Sora Turbo，具 Storyboard、Remix、Blend 與最高 1080p、20 秒輸出。

entries.summary_en: Today we made Canvas available in 4o by default for all users, Free and Paid. Additionally, we launched a number of new capabilities for canvas, including: Canvas in GPTs: Canvas can now be used with GPTs when enabled in the GPT creator. This toggle will be enabled for newly created GPTs by default.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2024-12-10 為 ChatGPT 推出新產品或能力；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: Canvas becomes default in GPT-4o for all users
entries.title_zh: Canvas 成為所有使用者的 GPT-4o 預設能力
entries.summary_en: OpenAI made Canvas available by default in GPT-4o to both free and paid ChatGPT users.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 將 Canvas 設為 GPT-4o 的預設可用能力，向 ChatGPT 免費與付費使用者全面開放。

entries.title_en: Canvas gains GPTs, Python execution, and shortcuts
entries.title_zh: Canvas 新增 GPT、Python 執行與捷徑
entries.summary_en: Canvas gained optional use inside GPTs, Python code execution with automatic bug-fix attempts, paste-to-canvas shortcuts, and a toolbox entry.
entries.summary_zh: Canvas 新增在 GPT 中選用、Python 程式碼執行與自動修錯嘗試、貼上即開 Canvas 的捷徑，以及工具箱入口。

entries.title_en: ChatGPT becomes available through Apple Intelligence
entries.title_zh: ChatGPT 透過 Apple Intelligence 上線
entries.summary_en: The ChatGPT integration in Apple Intelligence became available, while Enterprise and Edu administrators received a workspace control to enable or disable account connections.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT 的 Apple Intelligence 整合正式上線，Enterprise 與 Edu 管理員並獲得啟用或停用工作區帳戶連線的控制。

entries.title_en: Santa Voice and Video and Screen Share in Voice Chats
entries.summary_en: Today we started rolling out two updates to voice mode in ChatGPT: Santa voice:You can now chat with Santa in ChatGPT! Until early January, you can find Santa in the list of available voices in settings or by tapping on a snowflake icon. We are rolling out Santa globally to all logged in users today, and you can chat with Santa everywhere you use voice mode.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2024-12-12 為 ChatGPT Voice 擴大開放範圍；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_zh: 季節限定 Santa 語音
entries.summary_en: OpenAI rolled out a temporary Santa voice globally to logged-in users across Voice surfaces, with a one-time Advanced Voice limit reset on first use.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 向全球已登入使用者的 Voice 介面推出季節限定 Santa 語音，首次使用可一次性重置 Advanced Voice 額度。

entries.title_en: Video and screen sharing in Advanced Voice
entries.title_zh: Advanced Voice 支援視訊與螢幕分享
entries.summary_en: OpenAI began rolling real-time video, screen sharing, and image uploads in Advanced Voice on mobile to Team and most Plus and Pro users outside several European regions.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 開始在行動版 Advanced Voice 向 Team 與多數 Plus、Pro 使用者推出即時視訊、螢幕分享與圖像上傳，部分歐洲地區除外。

entries.summary_en: Projects provide a new way to group files and chats for personal use, simplifying the management of work that involves multiple chats. You can set custom instructions and upload files in your Projects, and any conversations in your Project share context with your uploaded files and custom instructions. Chats in Projects use GPT-4o and support the following features:
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 向 Plus、Team 與 Pro 推出 Projects，可將檔案、聊天與自訂指示集中並共享專案上下文，支援 Canvas、資料分析、DALL-E 與 Search。

entries.title_en: ChatGPT Search available to all logged-in users
entries.title_zh: ChatGPT Search 開放所有已登入使用者
entries.summary_en: OpenAI expanded ChatGPT Search from paid plans to every logged-in user in regions where ChatGPT was available.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 將 ChatGPT Search 從付費方案擴展至 ChatGPT 可用地區的所有已登入使用者。

entries.title_en: Added new models for o1, gpt-4o-realtime, gpt-4o-audio and more.
entries.title_zh: API 推出 o1‑preview 與 o1‑mini 推理模型
entries.summary_en: Added new models for o1 , gpt-4o-realtime , gpt-4o-audio and more . Added WebRTC connection method for the Realtime API . Added reasoningeffort parameter for o1 models. Added developer message role for o1 model. Note that o1-preview and o1-mini do not support system or developer messages. Launched Preference Fine-tuning using Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) . Launched beta SDKs for Go and Java. Learn more . Added Realtime API su…
entries.summary_zh: API 推出 o1‑preview 與 o1‑mini 推理模型。OpenAI 將此列為 2024-12-17 的功能；重點涉及即時語音與音訊、模型微調，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.title_zh: 改良版 OpenAI o1 快照
entries.summary_en: OpenAI released a new post-trained o1 snapshot with fewer reasoning tokens, improved benchmark performance, vision, and tool-oriented API capabilities, and said ChatGPT would update to it soon.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 發布新的後訓練 o1 快照，使用更少推理 token、改善評測表現並加入視覺與工具導向 API 能力，且表示 ChatGPT 將很快更新。
entries.source_name: OpenAI o1 and new tools for developers

entries.summary_en: OpenAI introduced an experimental way to access ChatGPT without an account through phone calls and WhatsApp at 1-800-CHATGPT.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出實驗性入口，可無須帳戶透過 1-800-CHATGPT 電話與 WhatsApp 使用 ChatGPT。

entries.title_zh: 推出：Launched Admin API Key Rotations
entries.summary_en: Launched Admin API Key Rotations, enabling customers to programmatically rotate their admin api keys. Updated Admin API Invites, enabling customers to programmatically invite users to projects at the same time they are invited to organizations.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2024-12-18 為 ChatGPT Projects 推出新產品或能力；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_zh: 推出：Admin API Key Rotations , enabling customers to programmatically rotate their admin api keys.
entries.summary_en: Launched Admin API Key Rotations , enabling customers to programmatically rotate their admin api keys. Updated Admin API Invites , enabling customers to programmatically invite users to projects at the same time they are invited to organizations.
entries.summary_zh: 推出：Admin API Key Rotations , enabling customers to programmatically rotate their admin api keys。OpenAI 將此列為 2024-12-18 的功能；重點涉及企業管理控制，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.summary_en: The macOS app added keyword and phrase search across prior ChatGPT conversations.
entries.summary_zh: macOS App 新增可依關鍵字與片語搜尋過往 ChatGPT 對話。

entries.title_en: Talk with Apps and note-taking integrations on macOS
entries.title_zh: macOS Talk with Apps 與筆記 App 整合
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT macOS let Advanced Voice work with supported apps and expanded app context to Apple Notes, Notion, Quip, Warp, and more coding tools.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT macOS 讓 Advanced Voice 可與支援的 App 協作，並將 App 上下文擴展至 Apple Notes、Notion、Quip、Warp 與更多程式工具。

entries.title_zh: 功能更新：macOS Talk with Apps
entries.summary_en: Advanced Voice Mode could work with supported apps; the release also added conversation search and more note-taking and coding integrations.
entries.summary_zh: 進階語音可搭配支援的 App 使用，並新增對話搜尋及更多筆記與編碼工具整合。

entries.title_en: OpenAI o3 and o3-mini preview announced
entries.title_zh: 宣布 OpenAI o3 與 o3-mini 預覽
entries.summary_en: OpenAI previewed its next reasoning-model family, o3 and o3-mini, and opened an early-access program for safety and security researchers rather than a general product release.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 預覽下一代推理模型系列 o3 與 o3-mini，並向安全與資安研究者開放搶先測試；當時尚非一般產品發布。

entries.summary_en: Today we’re rolling out a beta version of tasks—a new way to ask ChatGPT to do things for you at a future time. Whether it's one-time reminders or recurring actions, tell ChatGPT what you need and when, and it will automatically take care of it. Scheduled tasks is in early beta for Plus, Pro, and Teams. Eventually this will be available to anyone with a ChatGPT account. For details see Scheduled tasks in ChatGPT.
entries.summary_zh: 我們今日推出預排任務的測試版本，讓 ChatGPT 能在未來為您執行任務。無論是一次性提醒或重複性操作，只需告知 ChatGPT 需求與時間，系統將自動處理。預排任務目前正於 Plus、Pro 及 Teams 方案中進行早期測試。

entries.title_en: Canvas, Tasks and Projects on macOS
entries.title_zh: macOS 新增 Canvas、Tasks 與 Projects
entries.summary_en: The macOS app added Canvas, Tasks and support for working in existing Projects, alongside attachment, sidebar and table fixes.
entries.summary_zh: macOS App 新增 Canvas、Tasks 與既有 Projects 支援，並修正附件、側欄及表格問題。

entries.title_zh: 從聊天視窗匯入至 Canvas
entries.summary_en: Edit a full model response in Canvas Edit a code block in Canvas Web only (no desktop or mobile in this release).
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-01-15 為 ChatGPT 新增功能；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_zh: 自訂指令中的更多個人化設定
entries.summary_en: We've updated custom instructions to make it easier to customize how ChatGPT responds to you. With the new UI, you can tell ChatGPT the traits you want it to have, how you want it to talk to you, and any rules you want it to follow. If you're already using custom instructions, this won't change your current settings. The new UI is rolling out now on http://chatgpt.com and desktop on Windows, and is coming to mobile and desktop on Mac…
entries.summary_zh: 我們更新了自訂指令，讓使用者能更輕鬆地設定 ChatGPT 的回應方式。透過新介面，您可以設定希望 ChatGPT 具備的特質、對話語氣，以及需遵循的任何規則。若您已在使用自訂指令，此更新不會變更您目前的設定。

entries.title_zh: 功能更新：Expanded access to o1 model.
entries.summary_en: Expanded access to o1 model. The o1 series of models are trained with reinforcement learning to perform complex reasoning.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-01-21 為 o1 新增功能；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_zh: 擴充：access to o1 模型 .
entries.summary_en: Expanded access to o1 model . The o1 series of models are trained with reinforcement learning to perform complex reasoning.
entries.summary_zh: 擴充：access to o1 模型。OpenAI 將此列為 2025-01-21 的功能；重點涉及平台功能與可用性，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI released Operator as a U.S. research preview for ChatGPT Pro: an agent powered by the Computer-Using Agent model that can use its own browser to type, click, scroll, and perform web tasks under user control.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 針對 ChatGPT Pro 在美國推出 Operator 研究預覽版。這是一個由「電腦使用代理模型」(Computer-Using Agent model) 驅動的代理，能在使用者控制下，利用自身瀏覽器進行輸入、點擊、捲動及執行網路任務。

entries.summary_en: We’ve made some updates to GPT-4o–it’s now a smarter model across the board with more up-to-date knowledge, as well as deeper understanding and analysis of image uploads. More up-to-date knowledge: By extending its training data cutoff from November 2023 to June 2024, GPT-4o can now offer more relevant, current, and contextually accurate responses, especially for questions involving cultural and social trends or more up-to-date resea…
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-01-29 為 GPT-4o 更新模型或體驗；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: Install ChatGPT for Windows with winget
entries.title_zh: Windows App 支援 winget 安裝
entries.summary_en: The Windows app added winget installation support, useful for Enterprise IT-managed deployment.
entries.summary_zh: Windows App 新增 winget 安裝方式，便於 Enterprise IT 管理部署。

entries.summary_en: We’re excited to release o3-mini, our newest cost-efficient reasoning model optimized for coding, math, and science. On the API, o3-mini supports Structured Outputs, function calling, developer messages, and streaming. It offers three adjustable reasoning efforts (low, medium, and high), so you can balance speed with depth for your use case.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 o3-mini，這是一款針對程式撰寫、數學及科學進行最佳化的具成本效益推理模型，並提供予 ChatGPT 免費版、付費方案以及 API 使用。

entries.summary_en: Launched o3-mini , a new small reasoning model that is optimized for science, math, and coding tasks.
entries.summary_zh: API 推出 o3‑mini。OpenAI 將此列為 2025-01-31 的功能；重點涉及平台功能與可用性，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.summary_en: o3-mini-2025-01-31 v1/chat/completions
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-01-31 為 o3 新增功能；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI launched deep research in ChatGPT for multi-step web research that finds, analyzes, and synthesizes many online sources into cited reports; the initial rollout began with Pro users.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 在 ChatGPT 中推出 Deep Research，用於進行多步驟網路研究，能搜尋、分析並整合多項線上來源，彙整成附註引用的報告；初期先向 Pro 使用者開放。

entries.title_en: Deep research expands to the UK, Switzerland, and EEA
entries.title_zh: Deep Research 擴展至英國、瑞士及歐洲經濟區
entries.summary_en: OpenAI expanded deep research access to Pro users in the United Kingdom, Switzerland, and the European Economic Area.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 將 Deep Research 的使用權限擴展至英國、瑞士及歐洲經濟區 (EEA) 的 Pro 使用者。

entries.summary_en: Introducing data residency in Europe. Read more here.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-02-05 為 OpenAI API 推出新產品或能力；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_zh: API 更新：Introducing data residency in Europe.
entries.summary_en: Introducing data residency in Europe. Read more here .
entries.summary_zh: API 更新：Introducing data residency in Europe。OpenAI 將此列為 2025-02-05 的功能；重點涉及企業管理控制，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.summary_en: Users can now share a Canvas asset such as rendered React/HTML code, document, or code with another user, similar to how you share a conversation. You can do this from the Canvas toolbar when Canvas is open. For more details about the canvas feature in ChatGPT, check out the following Help Center article!
entries.summary_zh: 使用者現可與他人分享 Canvas 資產（例如已渲染的 React/HTML 程式碼、文件或程式碼），方式與分享對話類似。當 Canvas 開啟時，可透過工具列執行此操作。如需關於 ChatGPT Canvas 功能的更多詳細資訊，請查看說明中心文章。

entries.title_en: Deep research expands to ChatGPT Plus
entries.title_zh: Deep Research 擴展至 ChatGPT Plus
entries.summary_en: OpenAI expanded deep research from Pro to all ChatGPT Plus users.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 將 Deep Research 從 Pro 方案擴展至所有 ChatGPT Plus 使用者。

entries.title_en: Launched the API Usage Dashboard Update.
entries.title_zh: 推出：Launched the API Usage Dashboard Update.
entries.summary_en: Launched the API Usage Dashboard Update. This update addresses requests for additional data filters, such as project selection, date picker, and fine-grained intervals. There’s also better support for viewing usage across different products and service tiers.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-02-25 為 ChatGPT Projects 推出新產品或能力；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: Launched the API Usage Dashboard Update.
entries.summary_en: Launched the API Usage Dashboard Update . This update addresses requests for additional data filters, such as project selection, date picker, and fine-grained intervals. There’s also better support for viewing usage across different products and service tiers.
entries.summary_zh: 推出：API Usage Dashboard Update。OpenAI 將此列為 2025-02-25 的功能；重點涉及平台功能與可用性，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.summary_en: We’re releasing a research preview of GPT-4.5—our largest, and best model for chat, yet. GPT-4.5 is a step forward in scaling up pretraining and post-training. By scaling unsupervised learning, GPT-4.5 improves its ability to recognize patterns, draw connections, and generate creative insights without reasoning. Early testing shows that interacting with GPT-4.5 feels more natural. Its broader knowledge base, improved ability to follo…
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-02-27 為 GPT-4.5 發布模型；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI released GPT-4.5 as a research preview and its largest chat model at the time, initially worldwide for ChatGPT Pro with other paid plans to follow.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 GPT-4.5 作為研究預覽版，這是當時其最大的聊天模型，初期先向全球 ChatGPT Pro 使用者開放，後續將陸續擴展至其他付費方案。

entries.title_en: Released a research preview of GPT-4.5
entries.title_zh: 發布a 研究預覽 of GPT-4.5
entries.summary_en: v1/chat/completions Released a research preview of GPT-4.5—our largest and most capable chat model yet. GPT-4.5's high "EQ" and understanding of user intent make it better at creative tasks and agentic planning.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-02-27 為 GPT-4.5 發布模型；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: Released a research preview of GPT-4.5
entries.title_zh: API 推出 GPT‑4.5 研究預覽
entries.summary_en: Released a research preview of GPT-4.5 —our largest and most capable chat model yet. GPT-4.5's high "EQ" and understanding of user intent make it better at creative tasks and agentic planning.
entries.summary_zh: API 推出 GPT‑4.5 研究預覽。OpenAI 將此列為 2025-02-27 的功能；重點涉及代理與工具調用，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.title_zh: 功能更新：Added metadata field support to fine-tuning jobs.

entries.summary_zh: 新增：metadata field support to fine-tuning jobs。OpenAI 將此列為 2025-03-03 的功能；重點涉及模型微調，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.title_en: Direct code edits in macOS IDEs
entries.title_zh: macOS 可直接編輯 IDE 程式碼
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT for macOS gained the ability to edit code directly in supported IDEs.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT macOS App 可在支援的 IDE 中直接編輯程式碼。

entries.summary_en: gpt-4o-search-preview gpt-4o-mini-search-preview
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-03-11 為 GPT-4o 新增功能；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: Released several new models and tools and a new API for agentic workflows
entries.summary_en: Released several new models and tools and a new API for agentic workflows: Released the Responses API , a new API for creating and using agents and tools. Released a set of built-in tools for the Responses API: web search , file search , and computer use . Released the Agents SDK , an orchestration framework for designing, building, and deploying agents. Announced new models: gpt-4o-search-preview , gpt-4o-mini-search-preview , compu…
entries.summary_zh: 推出：several 全新 模型 and tools and a 全新 API for agentic workflows: Released Responses API , a 全新 API for creating and using agents and tools。OpenAI 將此列為 2025-03-11 的功能；重點涉及棄用與遷移、代理與工具調用，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.summary_en: 1. Increased the default size for in‐line generated images. 2. More clear and private Incognito keyboard for Temporary Chats.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-03-18 為 ChatGPT Images 新增功能；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: ChatGPT web and Windows added inline retry controls so users can retry a failed response or continue the same conversation.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT 網頁版與 Windows 版新增內嵌重試控制項，讓使用者能針對失敗的回應進行重試，或繼續進行相同的對話。

entries.summary_en: 1. Improved table-copying functionality out of ChatGPT responses on iOS and macOS. 2. Added long press on your message to open menu actions: Copy, Edit. 3. Improved response display of nested blockquote content. 4. Improved display and faster streaming of conversations and message menu actions.
entries.summary_zh: 1. 改進 iOS 與 macOS 上 ChatGPT 回應的表格複製功能。2. 新增訊息長按選單操作：複製、編輯。3. 改進巢狀引用內容的回應顯示方式。4. 改進對話的顯示與訊息選單操作的串流速度。

entries.title_zh: 更顯眼的 Windows 隨附視窗
entries.summary_en: The Windows desktop companion window became easier to invoke and use alongside other applications.
entries.summary_zh: Windows 桌面隨附視窗現在更易於呼叫，並能與其他應用程式並行使用。

entries.title_en: Python data analysis for o1 and o3-mini
entries.title_zh: o1 與 o3-mini 的 Python 資料分析功能
entries.summary_en: The o1 and o3-mini models gained Python-powered data analysis in ChatGPT for regressions, visualizations, and scenario simulations.
entries.summary_zh: o1 與 o3-mini 模型在 ChatGPT 中獲得基於 Python 的資料分析能力，可用於迴歸分析、視覺化與情境模擬。

entries.title_en: Web and the Windows desktop app
entries.summary_en: 1. In-line message error retries: If you encounter a message error, you can retry or just continue chatting in the same conversation. 2. o1 and o3-mini now offer Python-powered data analysis in ChatGPT: You can now ask these models to perform tasks like running regressions on test data, visualizing complex business metrics, and conducting scenario-based simulations.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-03-18 為 o3 新增功能；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: Released o1-pro, a version of the o1 reasoning model that uses more compute to answer hard problems with better reasoning and consistency.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-03-19 為 o1 發布模型；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: Released o1-pro , a version of the o1 reasoning model that uses more compute to answer hard problems with better reasoning and consistency.
entries.summary_zh: 推出：o1-pro , a version of o1 reasoning 模型 that uses more compute to answer hard problems with better reasoning and consistency。OpenAI 將此列為 2025-03-19 的功能；重點涉及平台功能與可用性，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.title_en: Added gpt-4o-mini-tts, gpt-4o-transcribe, gpt-4o-mini-transcribe, and whisper-1 models to the Audio API.
entries.summary_en: Added gpt-4o-mini-tts, gpt-4o-transcribe, gpt-4o-mini-transcribe, and whisper-1 models to the Audio API.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-03-20 為 GPT-4o 更新開發者平台；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: Added gpt-4o-mini-tts, gpt-4o-transcribe, gpt-4o-mini-transcribe, and whisper-1 models to the Audio API.
entries.summary_en: Added gpt-4o-mini-tts , gpt-4o-transcribe , gpt-4o-mini-transcribe , and whisper-1 models to the Audio API.
entries.summary_zh: 新增：gpt-4o-mini-tts , gpt-4o-transcribe , gpt-4o-mini-transcribe , and whisper-1 模型 to Audio API。OpenAI 將此列為 2025-03-20 的更新；重點涉及即時語音與音訊，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.title_zh: 推出 4o 影像生成功能
entries.summary_en: OpenAI integrated native image generation into GPT-4o, adding stronger text rendering, detailed instruction following, in-context image editing, and multi-turn refinement in ChatGPT.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 將原生影像生成整合至 GPT-4o，在 ChatGPT 中增加了更強的文字渲染、細緻的指令遵循、上下文影像編輯以及多輪修正功能。

entries.summary_en: We’ve made improvements to GPT-4o—it now feels more intuitive, creative, and collaborative, with enhanced instruction-following, smarter coding capabilities, and a clearer communication style. GPT-4o has further improved its capability to tackle complex technical and coding problems. It now generates cleaner, simpler frontend code, more accurately thinks through existing code to identify necessary changes, and consistently produces c…
entries.summary_zh: 我們對 GPT-4o 進行了改進——它現在使用起來更直觀、具備更多創意與協作性，並增強了指令遵循能力、更聰明的程式開發功能，以及更清晰的溝通風格。GPT-4o 進一步提升了處理複雜技術與程式開發問題的能力……

entries.summary_en: We’ve made improvements to GPT-4o—it now feels more intuitive, creative, and collaborative, with enhanced instruction-following, smarter coding capabilities, and a clearer communication style. Smarter problem-solving in STEM and coding:
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-03-27 為 GPT-4o 更新模型或體驗；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_zh: 宣佈 GPT-4 將於 ChatGPT 中退役
entries.summary_en: OpenAI announced that GPT-4 would be retired from ChatGPT on April 30, 2025 and replaced by GPT-4o; GPT-4 remained available in the API.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 宣佈 GPT-4 將於 2025 年 4 月 30 日從 ChatGPT 退役，並由 GPT-4o 取代；GPT-4 仍可在 API 中使用。

entries.title_en: Added gpt-4.1, gpt-4.1-mini, and gpt-4.1-nano models to the API.
entries.summary_en: v1/chat/completions Added gpt-4.1, gpt-4.1-mini, and gpt-4.1-nano models to the API. These new models feature improved instruction following, coding, and a larger context window (up to 1M tokens). gpt-4.1 and gpt-4.1-mini are available for supervised fine-tuning. Announced deprecation of gpt-4.5-preview.

entries.summary_en: All images you create with ChatGPT are now automatically saved to a new Library in the sidebar, giving you one place to browse, revisit, and reuse your work without digging through past conversations. The Library is rolling out today on Web, iOS, and Android for Free, Plus, and Pro users (Enterprise / Edu support coming soon). For now, it displays images generated with 4o Image Generation while we backfill older creations, and you ca…
entries.summary_zh: 所有您使用 ChatGPT 建立的影像現在都會自動儲存到側邊欄的新「影像庫」中，讓您能在一處瀏覽、回顧並重複使用您的作品，無需翻找過往的對話紀錄。此影像庫今日於網頁版、iOS 與 Android 平台上向 Free、Plus 與 Pro 使用者推出（企業版/教育版支援即將推出）……

entries.summary_en: OpenAI updated its Preparedness Framework with clearer high-risk criteria, High and Critical capability thresholds, stronger safeguard requirements, and dedicated capability and safeguards reports.

entries.summary_en: Today, we’re releasing OpenAI o3 and o4-mini, the latest in our o-series of models trained to think for longer before responding. These are the smartest models we’ve released to date, representing a step change in ChatGPT's capabilities for everyone from curious users to advanced researchers. For the first time, our reasoning models can agentically use and combine every tool within ChatGPT—this includes searching the web, analyzing u…
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-04-16 為 o4-mini 發布模型；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_zh: 功能更新：OpenAI o3 and o4-mini
entries.summary_en: OpenAI o3 is our most powerful reasoning model that pushes the frontier across coding, math, science, visual perception, and more. It sets a new SOTA on benchmarks including Codeforces, SWE-bench (without building a custom model-specific scaffold), and MMMU. It’s ideal for complex queries requiring multi-faceted analysis and whose answers may not be immediately obvious. It performs especially strongly at visual tasks like analyzing i…

entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 在 ChatGPT 中推出 o3，這是一個用於複雜程式開發、數學、科學和視覺分析任務的推理模型，並可使用 ChatGPT 工具。

entries.title_zh: OpenAI o4-mini 在 ChatGPT 中推出
entries.summary_en: OpenAI released o4-mini in ChatGPT as a smaller, faster, cost-efficient reasoning model with high usage limits and strong math, coding, and visual performance.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 在 ChatGPT 中推出 o4-mini，這是一個更小、更快、且具成本效益的推理模型，具有高使用限制以及強大的數學、程式開發和視覺效能。

entries.title_en: Deep research usage expands with a lightweight model
entries.title_zh: 深度研究使用範圍擴大，增加輕量級模型
entries.summary_en: OpenAI increased deep research limits and added a lightweight version powered by a variant of o4-mini, with automatic fallback after full-model limits are reached.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 增加了深度研究的使用限制，並加入了由 o4-mini 變體驅動的輕量級版本，在達到完整模型限制後會自動切換。

entries.summary_en: We’re making additional improvements to GPT-4o, optimizing when it saves memories and enhancing problem-solving capabilities for STEM. We’ve also made subtle changes to the way it responds, making it more proactive and better at guiding conversations toward productive outcomes. We think these updates help GPT-4o feel more intuitive and effective across a variety of tasks–we hope you agree!
entries.summary_zh: 我們對 GPT-4o 進行了額外改進，優化了記憶保存時機，並增強了 STEM 的問題解決能力。我們也對其回應方式做了細微調整，使其更主動，並能更好地引導對話產生有效成果。

We think these updates help GPT-4o feel more intuitive and effective across a variety of tasks–we hope you agree!

entries.summary_en: We've reverted the most recent update to GPT-4o due to issues with overly agreeable responses (sycophancy). We’re actively working on further improvements. For more details, check out our blog post explaining what happened and our initial findings, and this blog post where we expand on what we missed with sycophancy and the changes we're going to make going forward.

entries.summary_en: Launched on April 1 as a one-month surprise, our “Monday” personality (available in both voice and text) has now been sunset. We hope you enjoyed Monday's irreverent style, and we’re already working on new personalities for future use. Please stay tuned for what’s next!
entries.summary_zh: 作為 4 月 1 日推出的為期一個月的驚喜，我們的「Monday」個性（提供語音和文字版本）現已停用。希望您喜歡 Monday 不拘一格的風格，我們已經在為未來開發新的個性。請持續關注後續內容！

entries.title_en: Mobile UI (iOS/Android) changing on Free/Plus/Pro plans
entries.title_zh: 淘汰通知：Mobile UI (iOS/Android) changing on Free/Plus/Pro plans
entries.summary_en: We've removed the row of individual tool icons from the mobile composer and replaces it with the new sliders‑style icon to open the Skills menu; tapping that button opens a bottom‑sheet menu where users can choose tools like Create an image or Search the web. No tools are deprecated—access is simply consolidated to clear space and reduce on‑screen clutter.
entries.summary_zh: 我們移除了行動版編輯器中的工具圖示列，並以新的滑桿樣式圖示取代，用於開啟「技能」選單；點擊該按鈕會開啟底部工作表選單，使用者可選擇如「建立影像」或「搜尋網路」等工具。沒有工具被停用，存取方式僅被整合以騰出空間並減少畫面雜亂。

entries.summary_en: Launched support for reinforcement fine-tuning . Learn about available fine-tuning methods . gpt-4.1-nano is now available for fine-tuning.

entries.title_en: Enhanced Memory in ChatGPT (including EU) on Plus/Pro
entries.title_zh: ChatGPT Plus/Pro 的增強記憶功能（包含歐盟）
entries.summary_en: Enhanced memory rolling out to all Plus and Pro users (including the EU). The new memory features are available in the EEA (EU + UK), Switzerland, Norway, Iceland, or Liechtenstein. These features are OFF by default and must be enabled in Settings Personalization Reference Chat History. • Saved memories and Chat history are offered only to Plus and Pro accounts. • Free‑tier users have access to Saved memories only. • Outside the Euro…
entries.summary_zh: 增強記憶功能正向所有 Plus 和 Pro 使用者（包含歐盟）推出。新的記憶功能適用於 EEA（歐盟 + 英國）、瑞士、挪威、冰島或列支敦斯登。這些功能預設為關閉，必須在「設定 個人化 參照對話記錄」中啟用。

entries.title_en: GitHub connector for deep research for Plus/Pro/Team
entries.title_zh: 適用於 Plus/Pro/Team 的深度研究 GitHub 連接器
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT deep research with GitHub is available globally to Team users. It is also gradually rolling out to Plus and Pro users, except for those in the EEA, Switzerland, and the UK. Enterprise user access will be announced at a later date. See: Connecting GitHub to ChatGPT deep research.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT 深度研究與 GitHub 的整合已向全球 Team 使用者開放。該功能也正逐步向 Plus 和 Pro 使用者推出，但 EEA、瑞士和英國的使用者除外。企業使用者存取權限將於稍後公布。請參閱：將 GitHub 連接到 ChatGPT 深度研究。

entries.title_en: Export Deep Research as PDF for Plus/Pro/Team
entries.title_zh: 將深度研究匯出為 PDF（適用於 Plus/Pro/Team）
entries.summary_en: You can now export your deep research reports as well-formatted PDFs—complete with tables, images, linked citations, and sources. To use, click the share icon and select 'Download as PDF.' It works for both new and past reports.
entries.summary_zh: 您現在可以將深度研究報告匯出為格式良好的 PDF，其中包含表格、影像、連結的引用和來源。使用方法：點擊分享圖示並選擇「下載為 PDF」。此功能適用於新的和過去的報告。

entries.title_en: Introducing GPT-4.1 mini, replacing GPT-4o mini, in ChatGPT for all users

entries.summary_en: GPT-4.1 mini is a fast, capable, and efficient small model, delivering significant improvements compared to GPT-4o mini—in instruction-following, coding, and overall intelligence. Starting today, GPT-4.1 mini replaces GPT-4o mini in the model picker under "more models" for paid users, and will serve as the fallback model for free users once they reach their GPT-4o usage limits. Rate limits remain the same. Evals for GPT-4.1 and GPT-4…

GPT-4.1 is a specialized model that excels at coding tasks. Compared to GPT-4o, it's even stronger at precise instruction following and web development tasks, and offers an alternative to OpenAI o3 and OpenAI o4-mini for simpler, everyday coding needs. Starting today, Plus, Pro, and Te…
