entries.title_en: Codex in the ChatGPT iOS app
entries.summary_en: Start tasks, view diffs, and push PRs—while you’re away from your desk.
entries.summary_zh: Codex Changelog 在 2025-05-19 記錄了Codex 編碼代理相關更新；完整版本與修正內容見官方英文摘要。

entries.title_en: Added support for new built-in tools in the Responses API
entries.summary_en: Added support for new built-in tools in the Responses API, including remote MCP servers and code interpreter . Learn more about tools .
entries.summary_zh: 新增：支援 全新 built-in tools in Responses API, including remote MCP servers and code interpreter。OpenAI 將此列為 2025-05-20 的功能；重點涉及代理與工具調用，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.title_en: Added support for using strict mode for tool schemas when using parallel tool calling with non-fine-tuned models.
entries.summary_en: v1/chat/completions Added support for using strict mode for tool schemas when using parallel tool calling with non-fine-tuned models. Added new schema features, including string validation for email and other patterns and specifying ranges for numbers and arrays.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-05-20 為 OpenAI API 新增功能；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: Added support for using strict mode for tool schemas when using parallel tool calling with non-fine-tuned models.
entries.summary_en: Added support for using strict mode for tool schemas when using parallel tool calling with non-fine-tuned models.
entries.summary_zh: 新增：支援 using strict mode for tool schemas when using parallel tool calling with non-fine-tuned 模型。OpenAI 將此列為 2025-05-20 的功能；重點涉及代理與工具調用、模型微調，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.summary_en: It’s now easier and faster to set up code execution. Fixes & improvements Added a button to retry failed tasks Added indicators to show that the agent runs without network access after setup Added options to copy git patches after pushing a PR Added support for unicode branch names Fixed a bug where secrets were not piped to the setup script Fixed creating branches when there’s a branch name conflict. Fixed rendering diffs with multi…
entries.summary_zh: Codex Changelog 在 2025-05-22 記錄了Codex 編碼代理、代理與工具調用、可靠性與效能修正相關更新；完整版本與修正內容見官方英文摘要。

entries.summary_en: Agent internet access Now you can give Codex access to the internet during task execution to install dependencies, upgrade packages, run tests that need external resources, and more. Internet access is off by default. Plus, Pro, and Business users can enable it for specific environments, with granular control of which domains and HTTP methods Codex can access. Internet access for Enterprise users is coming soon. Learn more about usag…
entries.summary_zh: Codex Changelog 在 2025-06-03 記錄了Codex 編碼代理、代理與工具調用、即時語音與音訊相關更新；完整版本與修正內容見官方英文摘要。

entries.title_en: Memory is now more comprehensive for Free users
entries.title_zh: Memory 功能對免費版用戶更臻全面
entries.summary_en: Memory improvements are starting to roll out to Free users. In addition to the saved memories that were there before, ChatGPT now references your recent conversations to deliver responses that feel more relevant and tailored to you. Free users must be logged in and on up-to-date apps (iOS/Android v1.2025.147+). Free users in EEA (EU + UK), Switzerland, Norway, Iceland, or Liechtenstein will see a prompt to enable this setting or can…
entries.summary_zh: Memory 功能的改進正陸續向免費版用戶推出。除了先前儲存的記憶外，ChatGPT 現在也會參考您近期的對話，以提供更相關且客製化的回應。免費版用戶需登入並使用最新版本的應用程式（iOS/Android v1.2025.147+）……

entries.title_en: New model snapshots available for gpt-4o-audio-preview and gpt-4o-realtime-preview.
entries.summary_en: New model snapshots available for gpt-4o-audio-preview and gpt-4o-realtime-preview . Released Agents SDK for TypeScript .
entries.summary_zh: API 更新：全新 模型快照 available for gpt-4o-audio-preview and gpt-4o-realtime-preview。OpenAI 將此列為 2025-06-03 的功能；重點涉及代理與工具調用、即時語音與音訊，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.summary_en: v1/chat/completions
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-06-03 為 OpenAI API 新增功能；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: Added fine-tuning support with direct preference optimization for the models gpt-4.1-2025-04-14
entries.summary_en: Added fine-tuning support with direct preference optimization for the models gpt-4.1-2025-04-14, gpt-4.1-mini-2025-04-14, and gpt-4.1-nano-2025-04-14.

entries.summary_zh: API 推出 GPT‑4.1、mini 與 nano。OpenAI 將此列為 2025-06-04 的功能；重點涉及模型微調，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.title_en: Connectors in beta for deep research (Plus, Pro, Team, Enterprise, Edu)
entries.title_zh: 用於深度研究的連接器進入 Beta 測試階段（Plus、Pro、Team、Enterprise、Edu）
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT Team, Enterprise, and Edu customers globally can use connectors in deep research, as well as Pro and Plus users (excluding users in Switzerland, EEA, and the UK) to generate long-form, cited responses that include your company’s internal tools. Supported connectors: Google Drive, SharePoint, Dropbox, Box, Outlook, Gmail, Google Calendar, Linear, GitHub, HubSpot, and Teams Combines internal + web sources for synthesis Learn mo…
entries.summary_zh: 全球的 ChatGPT Team、Enterprise 與 Edu 客戶，以及 Pro 與 Plus 用戶（不含瑞士、歐洲經濟區與英國的用戶），現可於深度研究功能中使用連接器，以生成包含貴公司內部工具資訊的長篇且附帶引用的回應……

entries.title_en: Custom connectors via Model Context Protocol (Pro, Team, Enterprise, Edu)
entries.title_zh: 透過 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 建立自訂連接器（Pro、Team、Enterprise、Edu）
entries.summary_en: Admins and users can now build and deploy custom connectors to proprietary systems using Model Context Protocol (MCP). Requires a remote MCP server Available only in deep research Admin-published connectors appear in the connector list for all users Learn more about building custom connectors with MCP. For Team, Enterprise, and Edu plans, only admins can build and deploy custom connectors.
entries.summary_zh: 管理員與使用者現在可以使用 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 建立並部署連接至專有系統的自訂連接器。需要遠端 MCP 伺服器，且僅限於深度研究功能中使用。管理員發佈的連接器將出現在所有用戶的連接器清單中。進一步了解如何使用 MCP 建立自訂連接器……

entries.summary_en: We are rolling back an o4-mini snapshot, that we deployed less than a week ago and intended to improve the length of model responses, because our automated monitoring tools detected an increase in content flags.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-06-06 為 o4-mini 更新模型或體驗；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: Updates to Advanced Voice Mode for paid users
entries.title_zh: 更新：Advanced Voice Mode 面向付費使用者
entries.summary_en: We're upgrading Advanced Voice in ChatGPT for paid users with significant enhancements in intonation and naturalness, making interactions feel more fluid and human-like. When we first launched Advanced Voice, it represented a leap forward in AI speech—now, it speaks even more naturally, with subtler intonation, realistic cadence (including pauses and emphases), and more on-point expressiveness for certain emotions including empathy,…

entries.summary_en: OpenAI published a policy for coordinated disclosure of vulnerabilities it discovers in third-party software.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 發布對第三方軟體漏洞的協調式揭露政策。

entries.title_en: Launching OpenAI o3-pro—available now for Pro users in ChatGPT and in our API
entries.summary_en: Like o1-pro, o3-pro is a version of our most intelligent model, o3, designed to think longer and provide the most reliable responses. Since the launch of o1-pro, users have favored this model for domains such as math, science, and coding—areas where o3-pro continues to excel, as shown in academic evaluations. Like o3, o3-pro has access to tools that make ChatGPT useful—it can search the web, analyze files, reason about visual inputs,…
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-06-10 為 o3-pro 發布模型；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: Released o3-pro, a version of the o3 reasoning model that uses more compute to answer hard problems with better reasoning and consistency. Prices for the o3 model have also been reduced for all API requests, including batch and flex processing.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-06-10 為 o3-pro 發布模型；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: Released o3-pro , a version of the o3 reasoning model that uses more compute to answer hard problems with better reasoning and consistency. Prices for the o3 model have also been reduced for all API requests, including batch and flex processing.
entries.summary_zh: API 推出 o3‑pro。OpenAI 將此列為 2025-06-10 的功能；重點涉及定價與用量，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.title_en: Today, we're launching OpenAI o3-pro—available now for Pro users in ChatGPT and in our API.
entries.title_zh: 今天，我們推出 OpenAI o3-pro—即日起於 ChatGPT 和 API 中開放給 Pro 使用者。
entries.summary_en: Like o1-pro, o3-pro is a version of our most intelligent model, o3, designed to think longer and provide the most reliable responses. Since the launch of o1-pro, users have favored this model for domains such as math, science, and coding—areas where o3-pro continues to excel, as shown in academic evaluations. Like o3, o3-pro has access to tools that make ChatGPT useful—it can search the web, analyze files, reason about visual inputs,…
entries.summary_zh: 如同 o1-pro，o3-pro 是我們最聰明模型 o3 的一個版本，旨在進行更長時間的思考並提供最可靠的回應。自 o1-pro 推出以來，使用者在數學、科學和程式設計等領域偏好此模型，而在學術評估中顯示，o3-pro 在這些領域持續表現優異……

entries.title_zh: 為 Projects 增加更多功能
entries.summary_en: Starting today, we’re adding several updates to projects in ChatGPT to help you do more focused work. These updates are available for Plus, Pro, and Team users. Deep research and voice mode support Improvements to memory to reference past chats in a project Sharing chats from projects Starting a new project directly from a chat Upload files and access model selector on mobile Learn more about projects. Memory improvements are availab…
entries.summary_zh: 即日起，我們為 ChatGPT 中的 Projects 增加多項更新，協助您進行更專注的工作。這些更新適用於 Plus、Pro 和 Team 使用者……

entries.title_en: Expanded Model Support for Custom GPTs
entries.title_zh: 擴大 Custom GPTs 的模型支援
entries.summary_en: Creators can now choose from the full set of ChatGPT models (GPT-4o, o3, o4-mini and more) when building Custom GPTs—making it easier to fine-tune performance for different tasks, industries, and workflows. Creators can also set a recommended model to guide users. Key details: GPTs without Custom Actions can use the model picker to select from all models available to the user. GPTs with Custom Actions currently support GPT-4o and 4.1…
entries.summary_zh: 創作者在建立 Custom GPTs 時，現在可以從完整的 ChatGPT 模型集合（GPT-4o、o3、o4-mini 等）中進行選擇，這讓調整針對不同任務、產業和工作流程的效能變得更加容易。創作者亦可設定推薦模型以引導使用者……

entries.summary_en: Codex can now generate multiple responses simultaneously for a single task, helping you quickly explore possible solutions to pick the best approach. Fixes & improvements Added some keyboard shortcuts and a page to explore them. Open it by pressing ⌘-/ on macOS and Ctrl+/ on other platforms. Added a “branch” query parameter in addition to the existing “environment”, “prompt” and “tab=archived” parameters. Added a loading indicator wh…
entries.summary_zh: Codex Changelog 在 2025-06-13 記錄了Codex 編碼代理、代理與工具調用、可靠性與效能修正相關更新；完整版本與修正內容見官方英文摘要。

entries.title_en: Improvements to the ChatGPT search response quality
entries.title_zh: 提升 ChatGPT 搜尋回應品質
entries.summary_en: We’ve upgraded ChatGPT search for all users to provide even more comprehensive, up-to-date responses. In testing, we found users preferred these search improvements over our previous search experience. Smarter responses that are more intelligent, are better at understanding what you’re asking, and provide more comprehensive answers. Handles longer conversational contexts, allowing better intelligence in longer conversations. More rob…
entries.summary_zh: 我們已升級所有使用者的 ChatGPT 搜尋功能，以提供更全面、即時的回應。在測試中，我們發現使用者更偏好這些搜尋改進，勝過先前的搜尋體驗。回應更聰明、更能理解您的提問，並提供更全面的答案……

entries.title_en: New reusable prompts are now available in the dashboard and Responses API.
entries.summary_en: New reusable prompts are now available in the dashboard and Responses API. Via API, you can now reference templates created in the dashboard via the prompt parameter (with a prompt id, optional version) and supply dynamic variables that can include strings, images, or file inputs. Reusable prompts are not available in Chat Completions. Learn more.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-06-13 為 ChatGPT Images 擴大開放範圍；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: New reusable prompts are now available in the dashboard and Responses API.
entries.summary_en: New reusable prompts are now available in the dashboard and Responses API . Via API, you can now reference templates created in the dashboard via the prompt parameter (with a prompt id , optional version ) and supply dynamic variables that can include strings, images, or file inputs. Reusable prompts are not available in Chat Completions. Learn more .
entries.summary_zh: API 更新：全新 reusable prompts are now available in dashboard and Responses API。OpenAI 將此列為 2025-06-13 的功能；重點涉及代理與工具調用、圖像與影片，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.title_en: Expanded Model Support for Custom GPTs
entries.title_zh: 模型發布：Expanded Model Support for Custom GPTs
entries.summary_en: Enterprise and Edu users can also now choose from the full set of ChatGPT models (GPT-4o, o3, o4-mini and more) when building Custom GPTs. This was launched to Plus, Pro and Team users earlier this month. Key details: GPTs without Custom Actions can use the model picker to select from all models available to the user. GPTs with Custom Actions currently support GPT-4o and 4.1 Available on web for users on all paid plans (Plus, Pro Tea…
entries.summary_zh: Enterprise 和 Edu 使用者現在在建立 Custom GPTs 時，也能從完整的 ChatGPT 模型集合（GPT-4o、o3、o4-mini 等）中進行選擇。此功能已於本月初對 Plus、Pro 和 Team 使用者推出。關鍵細節：沒有 Custom Actions 的 GPTs 可以使用模型選擇器，從使用者可用的所有模型中進行選擇……

entries.summary_en: Capture meetings, brainstorms, or voice notes. Launching today for Pro, Enterprise, and Edu users. Previously launched for Team users on June 4, 2025. ChatGPT will transcribe, summarize, and turn them into helpful outputs like follow-ups, plans, or even code. Available on the macOS desktop app only. Learn more about ChatGPT Record.
entries.summary_zh: 捕捉會議、腦力激盪或語音筆記。即日起對 Pro、Enterprise 和 Edu 使用者推出。先前已於 2025 年 6 月 4 日對 Team 使用者推出。ChatGPT 將對其進行轉錄、摘要，並將其轉化為有用的產出，例如後續行動、計畫，甚至是程式碼。僅適用於 macOS 桌面應用程式。深入了解 ChatGPT Record。

entries.summary_en: Pro users are now able to use chat search connectors (in addition to deep research connectors) for the following integrations: Dropbox, Box, Google Drive (synced and non-synced), Microsoft OneDrive (Business), Microsoft SharePoint. Note this feature is currently limited to users located outside of the EEA, Switzerland, and the UK. Learn more about Connectors.
entries.summary_zh: Pro 使用者現在可以使用聊天搜尋連接器（除深度研究連接器外）進行以下整合：Dropbox、Box、Google Drive（同步與非同步）、Microsoft OneDrive (Business)、Microsoft SharePoint。請注意，此功能目前僅限於位於歐洲經濟區 (EEA)、瑞士和英國以外的使用者使用……

entries.summary_en: Projects can now support 40 uploaded files, up from 20, for Pro users.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-06-24 為 ChatGPT Projects 新增功能；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_zh: API 推出 o3 與 o4‑mini deep research 模型
entries.summary_en: Released o3-deep-research and o4-mini-deep-research , deep research variants of our o-series reasoning models optimized for deep analysis and research tasks. Learn more in the deep research guide . Added support for async event handling with webhooks . Reduced and simplified pricing for the web search tool. Added support for the web search tool .
entries.summary_zh: API 推出 o3 與 o4‑mini deep research 模型。OpenAI 將此列為 2025-06-24 的功能；重點涉及代理與工具調用，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.title_zh: 推出：Launched support for Priority processing.
entries.summary_en: Launched support for Priority processing. Priority processing delivers significantly lower and more consistent latency compared to Standard processing while keeping pay-as-you-go flexibility.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-06-27 為 OpenAI API 推出新產品或能力；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: Launched support for Priority processing . Priority processing delivers significantly lower and more consistent latency compared to Standard processing while keeping pay-as-you-go flexibility.

entries.title_en: Record mode in ChatGPT macOS desktop app (Plus)
entries.title_zh: ChatGPT macOS 桌面應用程式中的錄音模式 (Plus)
entries.summary_en: Record mode is now available to ChatGPT Plus users globally in the macOS desktop app. Record live conversations like team meetings or voice notes, and turn those into an editable summary in canvas. Available on the macOS desktop app only. Learn more about record mode. Note: Record mode originally rolled out to Team users on June 4, and Enterprise & Edu plans on June 18.
entries.summary_zh: 錄音模式即日起全球對 ChatGPT Plus 使用者在 macOS 桌面應用程式中開放。錄製現場對話（如團隊會議或語音筆記），並將其轉化為 canvas 中的可編輯摘要。僅適用於 macOS 桌面應用程式。深入了解錄音模式……

entries.summary_en: ChatGPT agent combined research and action in a virtual browser, integrated Operator capabilities, and launched for Pro, Plus, and Team users.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT Agent 把研究與操作整合到虛擬瀏覽器，吸收 Operator 核心能力，並首先向 Pro、Plus 與 Team 使用者開放。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI launched ChatGPT agent for Pro, Plus, and Team, combining web interaction, deep research, connected sources, terminal use, and editable artifacts in a user-supervised virtual computer.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 為 Pro、Plus 和 Team 使用者推出 ChatGPT agent，結合網頁互動、深度研究、已連結來源、終端機使用以及可編輯的產出物，並在使用者監督的虛擬電腦中運作。

entries.title_zh: 宣佈終止 Operator 獨立體驗
entries.summary_en: With Operator functionality integrated into ChatGPT agent, OpenAI announced that the standalone Operator experience at operator.chatgpt.com would be deprecated in the following weeks.
entries.summary_zh: 隨著 Operator 功能整合至 ChatGPT agent，OpenAI 宣佈 operator.chatgpt.com 上的獨立 Operator 體驗將於未來幾週內終止。

entries.title_en: Updates to Advanced Voice Mode for Free tier users
entries.title_zh: 免費版用戶的進階語音模式更新
entries.summary_en: The Advanced Voice upgrades we announced on June 7th are now rolling out to ChatGPT free users too. With the same improvements available to paid users, ChatGPT sounds more natural and expressive, and can translate more effectively. Rate limits for free users stay the same.
entries.summary_zh: 我們於 6 月 7 日宣佈的進階語音升級現已向 ChatGPT 免費版用戶開放。透過與付費版用戶相同的改進，ChatGPT 聽起來更自然、更具表現力，且能更有效地進行翻譯。免費版用戶的速率限制保持不變。

entries.title_zh: Canva 與 Notion 連接器 (Pro)
entries.summary_en: Pro users can now connect to Canva and Notion for both chat search and deep research. Note this feature is currently limited to users located outside of the EEA, Switzerland, and the UK. Learn more about connectors.
entries.summary_zh: Pro 用戶現可連接至 Canva 與 Notion，以進行聊天搜尋與深度研究。請注意，此功能目前僅限位於歐洲經濟區 (EEA)、瑞士及英國以外的用戶使用。瞭解更多關於連接器的資訊。

entries.title_en: Chat search for HubSpot and custom connectors (MCP) (Pro)
entries.title_zh: HubSpot 與自訂連接器 (MCP) 的聊天搜尋 (Pro)
entries.summary_en: Pro users can now utilize chat search with HubSpot and custom connectors (MCP) in addition to deep research. Note this feature is currently limited to users located outside of the EEA, Switzerland, and the UK. Learn more about connectors, as well as how to create a custom connector using MCP.
entries.summary_zh: Pro 用戶除深度研究外，現亦可將聊天搜尋用於 HubSpot 與自訂連接器 (MCP)。請注意，此功能目前僅限位於歐洲經濟區 (EEA)、瑞士及英國以外的用戶使用。瞭解更多關於連接器，以及如何使用 MCP 建立自訂連接器的資訊。

entries.summary_en: Study mode is currently available to users in Free, Plus, Pro, and Teams plans globally and will expand to Edu plans in the coming weeks. Study mode works with any model available in ChatGPT on iOS, Android, web, and desktop. Study mode is a new learning experience in ChatGPT designed to help you build a deeper understanding of any topic. When you turn it on, ChatGPT will ask interactive questions to understand your goals and skill l…
entries.summary_zh: 學習模式目前向全球 Free、Plus、Pro 及 Teams 方案的用戶開放，並將於未來幾週內擴展至 Edu 方案。學習模式適用於 ChatGPT 在 iOS、Android、網頁及桌面版上提供的任何模型。學習模式是 ChatGPT 中的一項新學習體驗，旨在協助您對任何主題建立更深刻的理解。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI released two Apache 2.0 open-weight text reasoning models for teams to run and customize on their own infrastructure or hosting providers.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出兩個採用 Apache 2.0 授權的開放權重文字推理模型，供團隊在其自有基礎設施或託管服務供應商上執行並自訂。

entries.title_en: Introducing two open-weight models: gpt-oss-120b and gpt-oss-20b
entries.title_zh: 推出two open-weight models: gpt-oss-120b and gpt-oss-20b
entries.summary_en: We’re releasing two open-weight reasoning models, gpt-oss-120b and gpt-oss-20b. Designed for teams that want to run and customize models on their own infrastructure or with hosting providers, these text-only models support common developer patterns like function calling and structured outputs. For more information, please visit our open models and help center.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-08-05 為 ChatGPT Business 發布模型；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: You can now set an accent color that applies to elements in ChatGPT, including your conversation bubbles, the Voice button, and highlighted text. On web: Click your profile icon at the bottom left, select Settings, go to the General tab, and choose an option from the Accent color drop-down. On mobile (iOS and Android): Tap your profile icon at the bottom, go to Personalization, then select Color Scheme to pick your accent color.
entries.summary_zh: 您現在可以設定適用於 ChatGPT 中各項元素的強調色，包括對話氣泡、語音按鈕及反白文字。在網頁版上：點擊左下角的個人資料圖示，選取「設定」，前往「一般」頁籤，並從「強調色」下拉式選單中選擇選項。

entries.summary_en: Today we’re rolling out improvements to Voice Mode to make it more accessible and useful for everyone. It also now works with custom GPTs. We’re expanding access with near-unlimited use for Plus users and hours each day for Free users. To simplify the experience, Standard Voice Mode will be retired in 30 days, unifying all users onto our latest voice experience.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-08-07 為 ChatGPT Voice 完成退役或停止服務；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: Expanded ChatGPT Voice access and custom GPT support
entries.title_zh: 擴展 ChatGPT 語音存取與自訂 GPT 支援
entries.summary_en: Voice Mode added custom GPT support, near-unlimited use for Plus, and hours of daily use for Free users.
entries.summary_zh: 語音模式新增自訂 GPT 支援，Plus 用戶可享有近乎無限的使用量，免費版用戶則享有每日數小時的使用量。

entries.summary_en: GPT-5 is slowly rolling out to all users on ChatGPT Plus, Pro, Team, and Free plans worldwide across web, mobile, and desktop. GPT-5 will be available to ChatGPT Enterprise and Edu plans soon. GPT-5 in ChatGPT is our next flagship model and the new default for all logged-in users. It simplifies ChatGPT to a single auto-switching system that brings together the best of our previous models into a smart, fast model. GPT-5 is available t…
entries.summary_zh: GPT-5 正逐步向全球網頁、行動裝置及桌面版 ChatGPT Plus、Pro、Team 及 Free 方案的所有用戶推出。GPT-5 將於近期向 ChatGPT Enterprise 及 Edu 方案提供。ChatGPT 中的 GPT-5 是我們的新一代旗艦模型，也是所有已登入用戶的新預設模型。

entries.summary_en: You can now choose from four distinct personalities or use the Default personality in your Customize ChatGPT settings. Default is the standard ChatGPT style: clear, neutral, and adaptable. The other personalities each have their own style and tone, described below. Cynic – Sarcastic and dry, delivers blunt help with wit. Often teases, but provides direct, practical answers when it matters. Robot – Precise, efficient, and emotionless,…
entries.summary_zh: 您現在可以在「自訂 ChatGPT」設定中，從四種不同的個性中選擇，或使用「預設」個性。「預設」為標準的 ChatGPT 風格：清晰、中立且具適應性。其他個性各有其風格與語氣，說明如下。Cynic (憤世嫉俗) – 諷刺且冷漠，以機智提供直率的協助。

entries.title_en: Released GPT-5 family of models in the API
entries.summary_en: v1/chat/completions Released GPT-5 family of models in the API, including gpt-5, gpt-5-mini, and gpt-5-nano.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-08-07 為 GPT-5 發布模型；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: Released GPT-5 family of models in the API
entries.title_zh: API 推出 GPT‑5、GPT‑5 mini 與 GPT‑5 nano
entries.summary_en: Released GPT-5 family of models in the API, including gpt-5 , gpt-5-mini , and gpt-5-nano . Introduced the minimal reasoning effort value to optimize for fast responses in GPT-5 models (which support reasoning). Introduced custom tool call type, which allows for freeform inputs to and outputs from the model when tool calling.
entries.summary_zh: API 推出 GPT‑5、GPT‑5 mini 與 GPT‑5 nano。OpenAI 將此列為 2025-08-07 的功能；重點涉及代理與工具調用，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.title_zh: 宣佈淘汰標準語音模式
entries.summary_en: OpenAI announced that Standard Voice Mode would be retired in 30 days, moving users to the newer unified Voice experience.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 宣佈標準語音模式將於 30 天后淘汰，並將使用者遷移至較新的統一語音體驗。

entries.title_en: ChatGPT agent available for Enterprise and Edu
entries.title_zh: ChatGPT Agent 開放 Enterprise 與 Edu
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT agent availability expanded to Enterprise and Edu plans.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT Agent 的使用範圍擴大至 Enterprise 與 Edu 方案。

entries.title_en: ChatGPT agent expands to Enterprise and Edu
entries.title_zh: ChatGPT 代理服務擴展至企業版與教育版
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT agent became available for Enterprise and Edu plans.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT 代理服務已適用於企業版與教育版方案。

entries.title_en: Image generation update to ChatGPT Free
entries.title_zh: ChatGPT 免費版影像生成更新
entries.summary_en: We're rolling out a small update to image generation for ChatGPT Free tier users that makes its performance more efficient.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-08-08 為 ChatGPT Images 擴大開放範圍；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: Additional connectors for Plus and Pro
entries.title_zh: Plus 與 Pro 方案新增連接器
entries.summary_en: Now connect even more tools in ChatGPT for useful, relevant responses in chat. The following connectors are now available to search by chat in addition to deep research. Plus: Box, Canva, Dropbox, HubSpot, Notion, Microsoft SharePoint, and Microsoft Teams Pro: Microsoft Teams and Github Rollout begins today, and all eligible accounts will have access in the coming days. To enable, visit Settings → Connectors→ Connect on the applicati…
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-08-11 為 Deep Research 擴大開放範圍；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: Gmail, Google Calendar, and Google Contacts Connectors in ChatGPT (Pro)
entries.title_zh: ChatGPT (Pro) 中的 Gmail、Google 日曆與 Google 聯絡人連接器
entries.summary_en: Gmail, Google Calendar, and Google Contacts are now available to connect and use in chat. Once you enable them, ChatGPT will automatically reference them when relevant, making it faster and easier to bring information from these tools into your conversations without having to manually select them each time. This capability is part of GPT-5 and will begin rolling out to Pro users globally this week, followed by Plus, Team, Enterprise,…
entries.summary_zh: Gmail、Google 日曆與 Google 聯絡人現在可供連接並在對話中使用。啟用後，ChatGPT 將在相關時自動參考這些工具，讓您能更快速且輕鬆地將資訊帶入對話中，無需每次手動選取……

entries.summary_en: You can now choose between “Auto”, “Fast”, and “Thinking” for GPT-5. Most users will want Auto, but the additional control will be useful for some people. ChatGPT Plus users now have 3,000 messages/week with GPT-5 Thinking, and then extra capacity on GPT-5 Thinking mini after that limit. The context limit for GPT-5 Thinking is 196k tokens. We may have to update rate limits over time depending on usage. 4o is back in the model picker…
entries.summary_zh: 您現在可以為 GPT-5 選擇「自動」、「快速」或「思考」模式。大多數使用者會選擇「自動」，但額外的控制選項對部分使用者很有用。ChatGPT Plus 使用者現在每週享有 3,000 則 GPT-5 思考模式訊息，超出該限制後，可額外使用 GPT-5 思考 mini 模式。GPT-5 思考模式的上下文限制為 196k token……

entries.title_en: Gmail, Google Calendar, and Google Contacts Connectors in ChatGPT (Plus)
entries.title_zh: ChatGPT (Plus) 中的 Gmail、Google 日曆與 Google 聯絡人連接器
entries.summary_en: Gmail, Google Calendar, and Google Contacts Connectors in ChatGPT are now available to Plus users globally. Access will be granted to users throughout today. This was previously made available to Pro users on August 12, 2025. Learn more about connectors.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT 中的 Gmail、Google 日曆與 Google 聯絡人連接器現在已開放給全球 Plus 使用者。使用者將於今日陸續獲得存取權限。此功能先前已於 2025 年 8 月 12 日開放給 Pro 使用者。進一步了解連接器。

entries.summary_en: We’re making GPT-5’s default personality warmer and more familiar. This is in response to user feedback that the initial version of GPT-5 came across as too reserved and professional. The differences in personality should feel subtle but create a noticeably more approachable ChatGPT experience. Warmth here means small acknowledgements that make interactions feel more personable — for example, “Good question,” “Great start,” or briefl…
entries.summary_zh: 我們調整了 GPT-5 的預設個性，使其更溫暖且親切。這是為了回應使用者反饋，指出 GPT-5 的初始版本表現得過於拘謹與專業。個性上的差異應會感到細微，但能創造出顯著更親切的 ChatGPT 體驗……

entries.summary_en: We’re launching ChatGPT Go, a new low-cost subscription plan. This will initially be available for users in India only. For ₹399/month (GST included), ChatGPT Go provides everything included in the Free plan, and: More messages, larger file uploads, and expanded image generation Access to advanced data analysis Longer memory for more personalized responses Available on web, mobile (iOS & Android), and desktop (macOS & Windows). ChatG…
entries.summary_zh: 我們推出了一項新的低成本訂閱方案 ChatGPT Go。此方案初期僅開放給印度使用者。ChatGPT Go 每月收費 ₹399（含 GST），提供免費版方案中的所有功能，並包含：更多訊息、更大的檔案上傳限制、更廣泛的影像生成功能、進階數據分析存取權，以及更長的記憶空間以提供更個人化的回應……

entries.summary_en: On August 26th, 2025, we notified developers using the Assistants API of its deprecation and removal from the API one year later, on August 26, 2026. When we released the Responses API in March 2025, we announced plans to bring all Assistants API features to the easier to use Responses API, with a sunset date in 2026.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-08-20 為 Responses API 公布淘汰計畫；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: On August 26th, 2025, we notified developers using the Assistants API of its deprecation and removal from the API one year later, on August 26, 2026. When we released the Responses API in March 2025 , we announced plans to bring all Assistants API features to the easier to use Responses API, with a sunset date in 2026. See the Assistants to Conversations migration guide to learn more about how to migrate your current integration to t…
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-08-20 公告 Assistants API 的棄用或下線時程，並列出替代方案與遷移方向。

entries.summary_en: Released the Conversations API, which allows you to create and manage long-running conversations with the Responses API. See the migration guide to see a side-by-side comparison and learn how to migrate from an Assistants API integration to Responses and Conversations.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-08-20 為 Responses API 推出新產品或能力；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: Released the Conversations API, which allows you to create and manage long-running conversations with the Responses API. See the migration guide to see a side-by-side comparison and learn how to migrate from an Assistants API integration to Responses and Conversations.
entries.summary_zh: 推出 Conversations API。OpenAI 將此列為 2025-08-20 的功能；重點涉及代理與工具調用，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.title_en: Added support for connectors to the Responses API.
entries.summary_en: Added support for connectors to the Responses API. Connectors are OpenAI-maintained MCP wrappers for popular services like Google apps, Dropbox, and more that can be used to give model read access to data stored in those services.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-08-21 為 Responses API 更新開發者平台；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: Added support for connectors to the Responses API.
entries.title_zh: 新增：支援 connectors to Responses API.
entries.summary_en: Added support for connectors to the Responses API. Connectors are OpenAI-maintained MCP wrappers for popular services like Google apps, Dropbox, and more that can be used to give model read access to data stored in those services.
entries.summary_zh: 新增：支援 connectors to Responses API。OpenAI 將此列為 2025-08-21 的功能；重點涉及代理與工具調用，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.summary_en: You can now attach images to your prompts in Codex web. This is great for asking Codex to implement frontend changes or follow up on whiteboarding sessions. Codex now caches containers to start new tasks and followups 90% faster, dropping the median start time from 48 seconds to 5 seconds. You can optionally configure a maintenance script to update the environment from its cached state to prepare for new tasks. See the docs for more.
entries.summary_zh: Codex Changelog 在 2025-08-21 記錄了Codex 編碼代理、圖像與影片相關更新；完整版本與修正內容見官方英文摘要。

entries.summary_en: An improvement to projects is now available. When creating a project, users have the option to enable project-only memory. With project-only memory enabled, ChatGPT can use other conversations in that project for additional context, and won’t use your saved memories from outside the project to shape responses. Additionally, it won’t carry anything from the project into future chats outside of the project.…
entries.summary_zh: 現已提供一項專案改進功能。在建立專案時，使用者可選擇啟用「僅限專案記憶」。啟用此功能後，ChatGPT 可使用該專案中的其他對話作為額外上下文，且不會使用您在專案外儲存的記憶來調整回應……

entries.summary_en: IDE extension (Compatible with VS Code, Cursor, Windsurf) Codex now runs in your IDE with an interactive UI for fast local iteration. Easily switch between modes and reasoning efforts. Sign in with ChatGPT (IDE & CLI) One-click authentication that removes API keys and uses ChatGPT Enterprise credits. Move work between local ↔ cloud Hand off tasks to Codex web from the IDE with the ability to apply changes locally so you can delegate…
entries.summary_zh: Codex Changelog 在 2025-08-27 記錄了Codex 編碼代理、定價與用量相關更新；完整版本與修正內容見官方英文摘要。

entries.summary_en: Starting today, Codex works with you everywhere you build—in your terminal or IDE, on the web, in GitHub, and even from the ChatGPT iOS app. Your ChatGPT account connects it all, so you can work seamlessly between your local environment and Codex’s cloud without losing state. We’re excited to introduce the latest Codex updates:
entries.summary_zh: 即日起，Codex 可在您建構的任何地方運作，包括終端機、IDE、網頁、GitHub，甚至是 ChatGPT iOS App。您的 ChatGPT 帳號將所有服務串聯起來，讓您能在本機環境與 Codex 雲端之間無縫工作，且不會遺失狀態。

entries.title_en: The OpenAI Realtime API is now generally available.
entries.summary_en: The OpenAI Realtime API is now generally available. Learn more in our Realtime API guide .
entries.summary_zh: Realtime API 正式 GA。OpenAI 將此列為 2025-08-28 的功能；重點涉及即時語音與音訊，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.title_zh: ChatGPT Team 更名為 ChatGPT Business
entries.summary_en: The ChatGPT Team plan was renamed ChatGPT Business; OpenAI said the rename itself did not change features, pricing, limits, or security.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT Team 正式更名為 ChatGPT Business；更名本身不改變功能、價格、額度或安全設定。

entries.title_en: Projects Now Available on ChatGPT Free Tier
entries.title_zh: 「專案」功能現已開放給 ChatGPT 免費版使用
entries.summary_en: Projects bring your chats and files into one place, helping you stay focused and get things done. They’re now available on our Free tier, with up to 5 file uploads per project. We’ve also updated file uploads on paid tiers: Plus, Go, and Edu support up to 25 files per project. Pro, Business, and Enterprise support up to 40 files per project. New customization options are available for all plans, including colors and icons, to help ke…
entries.summary_zh: 「專案」將您的對話與檔案集中於一處，助您保持專注並完成任務。此功能現已開放給免費版使用者，每個專案最多可上傳 5 個檔案。我們亦更新了付費版的檔案上傳限制：Plus、Go 與 Edu 方案每個專案支援最多 25 個檔案；Pro、Business 與 Enterprise 方案每個專案支援最多 40 個檔案。

entries.summary_en: You can now branch conversations in ChatGPT, making it easier to explore different directions without losing your original thread. Hover over a message, click More actions (⋯), and select Branch in new chat to start a separate conversation from that point. This feature is available today for all logged-in users on web.
entries.summary_zh: 您現在可以在 ChatGPT 中建立對話分支，更輕鬆地探索不同方向，而不會遺失原始對話串。請將游標移至訊息上，點擊「更多動作」(⋯)，然後選擇「在新的對話中開啟分支」，即可從該點開始進行獨立的對話。此功能今日起開放給所有已登入的網頁版使用者。

entries.summary_en: Enterprise and Edu workspace owners could request blocks for websites or whole domains used by ChatGPT agent browsing and actions.
entries.summary_zh: Enterprise 與 Edu 工作區可要求封鎖 ChatGPT agent 瀏覽與操作的網站或整個網域。

entries.summary_en: Last month we announced that everyone now has access to Advanced Voice Mode, with usage expanded from minutes per day to hours for Free users, and near-unlimited use for Plus. We also shared that Standard Voice Mode would be retired following a 30-day sunset period. We’ve heard feedback that Standard Voice is special to some folks, and we want to make sure the transition feels right. To that end, we’re keeping Standard Voice availabl…
entries.summary_zh: 上個月我們宣佈所有人皆可使用「進階語音模式」，使用量限制從每天幾分鐘擴展至免費使用者每天幾小時，Plus 使用者則為近乎無限。我們同時宣告「標準語音模式」在 30 天的停用過渡期後將正式退役。

entries.title_zh: 安全更新：Updating the OpenAI Model Spec
entries.summary_en: We’ve made a few updates to the Model Spec, a living document that outlines intended behavior for OpenAI’s models, to better reflect how our systems are evolving. The changes focus on strengthening clarity and guardrails as our models move beyond chat into more agentic use cases, refining authority levels and priorities, expanding guidance on personalities and safety, and incorporating public feedback.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-09-12 為 ChatGPT 更新安全與治理機制；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: In September, 2025, we notified developers using gpt-4o-realtime-preview models of their deprecation and removal from the API in six months. Past deprecations are listed below, with the most recent announcements at the top.

entries.summary_en: We’re adding GPT-5-codex, a GPT-5 variant optimized for agentic coding in Codex. It’s available everywhere you use Codex: default for cloud tasks and code review, and selectable for local workflows via the Codex CLI and IDE extension. Use GPT-5-codex for coding-focused work in Codex, or Codex-like environments; use GPT-5 for general, non-coding tasks. In day-to-day use, GPT-5-codex supports fast interactive edits and can run independ…
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-09-15 為 GPT-5 發布模型；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: New model: GPT-5-Codex GPT-5-Codex is a version of GPT-5 further optimized for agentic coding in Codex. It’s available in the IDE extension and CLI when you sign in with your ChatGPT account. It also powers the cloud agent and Code Review in GitHub. To learn more about GPT-5-Codex and how it performs compared to GPT-5 on software engineering tasks, see our announcement blog post . Image outputs When working in the cloud on front-end…

entries.title_en: Personalization settings are now in Settings
entries.title_zh: 個人化設定現已移至「設定」中
entries.summary_en: Personalization no longer opens in a separate modal. You can manage personalization, choose a ChatGPT personality, add custom instructions, and update Memory directly in Settings → Personalization.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-09-15 為 ChatGPT Memory 更新模型或體驗；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: The Realtime API Beta was deprecated and removed from the API on May 12, 2026. There are a few key differences between the interfaces in the Realtime beta API and the released GA API. See the migration guide for the current GA interface and related Realtime docs.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-09-15 為 Realtime API 公布淘汰計畫；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

There are a few key differences between the interfaces in the Realtime beta API and the released GA API. See the migration guide for the current GA interface and related Realtime docs. entries.title_zh: Codex 更新 (Plus/Pro) - 推出 GPT-5-Codex
entries.summary_en: We’re adding GPT-5-codex, a GPT-5 variant optimized for agentic coding in Codex. It’s available everywhere you use Codex: default for cloud tasks and code review, and selectable for local workflows via the Codex CLI and IDE extension. Use GPT-5-codex for coding-focused work in Codex, or Codex-like environments; use GPT-5 for general, non-coding tasks. Please review the announcement blog for more information. Note: GPT-5-Codex is not…
entries.summary_zh: 我們加入了 GPT-5-Codex，這是為 Codex 中的代理式程式開發所優化的 GPT-5 變體。它可用於您使用 Codex 的所有地方：雲端任務與程式碼審查的預設選項，並可透過 Codex CLI 與 IDE 擴充功能在本地工作流程中選用。請在 Codex 或類 Codex 環境中使用 GPT-5-Codex 進行程式開發相關工作，並使用 GPT-5 處理一般的非程式設計任務。

entries.summary_en: We’ve made further improvements to search in ChatGPT, making results more accurate, reliable, and useful. Factuality: Fewer hallucinations, improving answer quality. Shopping: Search is better at detecting shopping intent, showing products when you want them and keeping results focused when you don’t. Formatting: Answers are better formatted for quick understanding without losing detail or quality.
entries.summary_zh: 我們進一步改善了 ChatGPT 的搜尋功能，使其結果更精準、可靠且實用。事實性：減少幻覺，提升回答品質。購物：搜尋功能更能偵測購物意圖，在您需要時顯示商品，並在不需要時維持結果的聚焦性。

entries.title_en: Toggle thinking time in the message composer
entries.title_zh: 訊息輸入框中的思考時間切換
entries.summary_en: We’re giving Plus, Business, and Pro users more control over how long GPT-5 thinks before responding. You can now choose the level of reasoning time, so you can decide whether you want a quicker answer or more in-depth reasoning for your task. When you select GPT-5 with Thinking in ChatGPT, you’ll see a new thinking time toggle in the message composer.…
entries.summary_zh: 我們為 Plus、Business 與 Pro 使用者提供更多對 GPT-5 回應前思考時間的控制權。您現在可選擇推理時間的長度，決定任務需要較快速的回應或是更深入的推理。當您在 ChatGPT 中選擇「GPT-5 with Thinking」時，訊息輸入框中將出現新的思考時間切換開關。

entries.summary_en: We’re improving the quality and latency of responses of the version of Advanced Voice powered by GPT-4o mini.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-09-18 為 GPT-4o 更新模型或體驗；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: ChatGPT Go now available in Indonesia
entries.title_zh: ChatGPT Go 現已於印尼推出
entries.summary_en: We're launching ChatGPT Go, our low cost subscription plan, in Indonesia. For Rp 75.000/month, ChatGPT Go provides everything included in the Free plan, and: More messages, larger file uploads, and expanded image generation Access to advanced data analysis Longer memory for more personalized responses Available on web, mobile (iOS & Android), and desktop (macOS & Windows). Learn more about ChatGPT Go.
entries.summary_zh: 我們在印尼推出了低成本訂閱方案 ChatGPT Go。每月 Rp 75.000，ChatGPT Go 提供免費版的所有功能，外加：更多的訊息量、更大的檔案上傳限制、擴充的影像生成功能、進階數據分析存取權，以及更長的「記憶」以提供更個人化的回應。適用於網頁、行動裝置 (iOS 與 Android) 及桌面端。

entries.summary_en: GPT-5-Codex is now available in the Responses API, and you can also use it with your API Key in the Codex CLI. We plan on regularly updating this model snapshot. It is available at the same price as GPT-5. You can learn more about pricing and rate limits for this model on our model page .
entries.summary_zh: Codex Changelog 在 2025-09-23 記錄了Codex 編碼代理、代理與工具調用、定價與用量相關更新；完整版本與修正內容見官方英文摘要。

entries.title_zh: 開放使用：GPT-5-codex now available in Responses API
entries.summary_en: We're excited to announce that GPT-5-codex is now available in the Responses API, in addition to codex surfaces. For more information, refer to the GPT-5-codex model page. Note: GPT-5-Codex is not currently supported in ChatGPT.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-09-23 為 GPT-5 擴大開放範圍；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: Introducing ChatGPT Pulse for Pro users
entries.title_zh: 推出適用於 Pro 用戶的 ChatGPT Pulse
entries.summary_en: We’re launching an early preview of ChatGPT pulse for Pro users on iOS and Android. This is a new experience where ChatGPT can now proactively deliver personalized, focused updates for you once a day. These updates are based on asynchronous research ChatGPT can do on your behalf overnight, synthesizing information from your memory, chat history, and direct feedback to learn what’s most relevant to you. Updates are delivered once a da…
entries.summary_zh: 我們正在 iOS 和 Android 上推出適用於 Pro 用戶的 ChatGPT Pulse 搶先預覽版。這是一項新的體驗，ChatGPT 現在可以每天主動為您提供個人化、精準的更新。…

entries.title_en: Introducing Instant Checkout and the Agentic Commerce Protocol
entries.summary_en: We’re introducing Instant Checkout in ChatGPT and the Agentic Commerce Protocol that powers it, built with Stripe. ChatGPT can help you find anything on the web and now with Instant Checkout, you can seamlessly buy directly from the merchant, right in chat. Starting today, U.S. ChatGPT Plus, Pro, and Free users can buy directly from U.S. Etsy sellers through ChatGPT, with over 1 million Shopify merchants, like Glossier, SKIMS, Spanx…
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-09-29 為 ChatGPT Plus 推出新產品或能力；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_zh: 推出 ChatGPT 中的 Instant Checkout
entries.summary_en: Instant Checkout began letting U.S. ChatGPT users buy eligible products from participating merchants without leaving the conversation.
entries.summary_zh: Instant Checkout 開始讓美國的 ChatGPT 用戶無需離開對話即可向參與的商家購買符合條件的產品。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI and Stripe introduced the open Agentic Commerce Protocol as infrastructure for merchants and agents to complete purchases while merchants remain the merchant of record.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 和 Stripe 推出了開放式的 Agentic Commerce Protocol，作為商家和代理進行購買交易的基礎設施，同時商家仍保留為記錄上的賣方。

entries.summary_en: We’re rolling out parental controls globally in ChatGPT to help families guide how ChatGPT works in their homes. Available starting on the web today, mobile soon. To set up parental controls, a parent or guardian sends an invite to their teen to connect accounts. After the teen accepts, the parent can manage the teen’s settings from their own account. Teens can also invite a parent to connect. Once a teen is connected to a parent’s a…
entries.summary_zh: 我們正在全球範圍內推出 ChatGPT 家長控制功能，以協助家庭引導 ChatGPT 在家中的運作方式。今日起於網頁版開放，行動版隨後推出。若要設定家長控制，家長或監護人需發送邀請給青少年以連結帳戶。青少年接受後，家長即可從自己的帳戶管理青少年的設定。…

entries.title_en: Sora 2 and the Sora app launch
entries.title_zh: Sora 2 和 Sora 應用程式推出
entries.summary_en: OpenAI released Sora 2 with more accurate physics, greater realism and control, synchronized dialogue and sound effects, and an initial U.S. and Canada rollout through a new iOS Sora app and sora.com.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 Sora 2，具有更準確的物理效果、更高的真實感與控制力、同步的對話和音效，並透過全新的 iOS Sora 應用程式和 sora.com 在美國和加拿大進行初步推廣。

entries.summary_en: Released IP allowlist. IP allowlisting restricts API access to only the IP addresses or ranges you specify.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-10-01 為 OpenAI API 推出新產品或能力；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: Released IP allowlist . IP allowlisting restricts API access to only the IP addresses or ranges you specify.

entries.summary_en: We’re updating GPT-5 Instant to better recognize and support people in moments of distress. The model is trained to more accurately detect and respond to potential signs of mental and emotional distress. These updates were guided by mental health experts, and help ChatGPT de-escalate conversations and point people to real-world crisis resources when appropriate, while still using language that feels supportive and grounding.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-10-03 為 GPT-5 更新模型或體驗；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_zh: Codex 雲端代理正式推出
entries.summary_en: OpenAI moved the Codex cloud agent out of research preview and into general availability, alongside Slack and Codex SDK integrations and expanded admin controls.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 將 Codex 雲端代理從研究預覽版轉為正式版，同時整合了 Slack 和 Codex SDK，並擴展了管理員控制功能。

entries.title_zh: Codex is now GA 更新
entries.summary_en: Codex is now generally available with 3 new features — @Codex in Slack, Codex SDK, and new admin tools. @Codex in Slack You can now questions and assign tasks to Codex directly from Slack. See the Slack guide to get started. Codex SDK Integrate the same agent that powers the Codex CLI inside your own tools and workflows with the Codex SDK in Typescript. With the new Codex GitHub Action, you can easily add Codex to CI/CD workflows. Se…

entries.title_zh: 推出 ChatGPT 中的應用程式
entries.summary_en: OpenAI launched conversational apps inside ChatGPT with an initial partner set and released the Apps SDK in preview for developers to build interactive in-chat experiences.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 在 ChatGPT 中推出了對話式應用程式，並初步與合作夥伴合作，同時為開發者釋出 Apps SDK 預覽版，以建構互動式的對話體驗。

entries.title_en: Released several new features at OpenAI DevDay
entries.title_zh: OpenAI DevDay API 與代理平台更新
entries.summary_en: Released several new features at OpenAI DevDay : Released GPT-5 Pro , a version of GPT-5 that uses more compute to think harder and provide consistently better answers. Released GPT-Realtime mini and gpt-audio-mini for more cost-efficient speech to speech performance. Released gpt-image-1-mini for more cost-efficient image generation and editing. Launched v1/videos for rich, detailed, and dynamic video generation and remixing with ou…
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI DevDay API 與代理平台更新。OpenAI 將此列為 2025-10-06 的功能；重點涉及代理與工具調用、即時語音與音訊、圖像與影片，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.summary_en: We’re rolling out new Codex capabilities to help teams work and build better: Codex now works in Slack, and supports programmatic control through the Codex SDK. Additionally, we've updated Codex rates. For more information, review our Help Center article on Codex, and the Codex developer documentation.
entries.summary_zh: 我們正在推出新的 Codex 功能，以協助團隊更有效地工作和開發：Codex 現在可在 Slack 中運作，並透過 Codex SDK 支援程式化控制。此外，我們更新了 Codex 費率。欲了解更多資訊，請查看我們說明中心關於 Codex 的文章以及 Codex 開發者文件。

entries.summary_en: We're excited to announce that ChatGPT Go, our low cost subscription plan, is now available in 16 additional countries. For an affordable price, ChatGPT Go provides everything included in the Free plan, and: More messages, larger file uploads, and expanded image generation Access to advanced data analysis Longer memory for more personalized responses Available on web, mobile (iOS & Android), and desktop (macOS & Windows). Note: In Ca…
entries.summary_zh: 我們宣佈，低成本訂閱方案 ChatGPT Go 現已在另外 16 個國家/地區推出。以實惠的價格，ChatGPT Go 提供免費方案包含的所有功能，以及：更多訊息量、更大的檔案上傳限制、擴展的影像生成、存取進階資料分析、更長的記憶功能以提供更個人化的回應…

entries.title_zh: 新增 Notion 和 Linear 同步連接器
entries.summary_en: We're adding Notion and Linear as synced connectors (for Pro users), so you can securely bring Notion pages and Linear issues/discussions into Chat for fast answers and summaries. You can enable sync for Notion and Linear from your Connector settings (connect to Notion or Linear if you haven’t already, first). Once synced, ChatGPT will automatically reference the indexed content when relevant. Learn more about synced connectors.
entries.summary_zh: 我們新增了 Notion 和 Linear 作為同步連接器（適用於 Pro 用戶），讓您可以安全地將 Notion 頁面和 Linear 問題/討論匯入對話中，以獲取快速的解答和摘要。您可以從「連接器」設定中啟用 Notion 和 Linear 同步（若尚未連接，請先連接 Notion 或 Linear）。…

entries.title_zh: Slack 連接器與應用程式
entries.summary_en: We’re rolling out two new ways to bring Slack and ChatGPT together: a connector that brings your Slack context into ChatGPT, and a ChatGPT app for Slack – an integration that enables you to chat with ChatGPT from inside Slack. With the ChatGPT app for Slack, you can chat one-on-one with ChatGPT in a dedicated Slack sidebar – a space to ask questions, summarize long threads into action items, draft replies, and search messages and fil…
entries.summary_zh: 我們推出兩種將 Slack 與 ChatGPT 結合的新方式：一個可將您的 Slack 上下文匯入 ChatGPT 的連接器，以及一個 Slack 的 ChatGPT 應用程式——這項整合讓您能在 Slack 內部與 ChatGPT 對話。…

entries.summary_en: We're excited to announce that ChatGPT Go, our low cost subscription plan, is now available in 71 additional countries, bringing total coverage to 89 countries. For an affordable price, ChatGPT Go provides everything included in the Free plan, and: More messages, larger file uploads, and expanded image generation Access to advanced data analysis Longer memory for more personalized responses Available on web, mobile (iOS & Android), a…
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-10-14 為 ChatGPT 調整方案、額度或計費；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: ChatGPT can now automatically manage saved memories so it’s even better at remembering what’s important to you.
entries.title_zh: ChatGPT 現在可以自動管理已儲存的記憶，因此它能更有效地記住對您重要的事項。
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT now manages saved memories automatically by keeping the most relevant details prioritized and moving less important ones to the background. This helps prevent saved memories from reaching capacity and helps avoid “memory full” state in your ChatGPT account. To decide which memories stay top of mind, ChatGPT considers factors such as how recent a detail is and how often you talk about a topic. You can now also search your save…
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT 現在透過將最相關的詳細資訊保持在優先位置並將較不重要的資訊移至背景，來自動管理已儲存的記憶。這有助於防止已儲存的記憶達到容量上限，並避免 ChatGPT 帳戶出現「記憶體已滿」的狀態。…

entries.summary_en: OpenAI launched ChatGPT Atlas, a macOS browser with ChatGPT, optional browser memories, an Ask ChatGPT sidebar, and an agent-mode preview for eligible paid users.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 ChatGPT Atlas，這是一款具備 ChatGPT、選用瀏覽器記憶功能、詢問 ChatGPT 側邊欄以及代理模式預覽功能的 macOS 瀏覽器，適用於符合資格的付費使用者。

entries.title_en: Tag @Codex on GitHub Issues and PRs
entries.summary_en: You can now tag @codex on a teammate’s pull request to ask clarifying questions, request a follow-up, or ask Codex to make changes. GitHub Issues now also support @codex mentions, so you can kick off tasks from any issue, without leaving your workflow.

entries.summary_zh: Atlas 修正韓文與日文輸入法組字，並在刪除聊天記錄前加入確認。

entries.summary_en: Released Enterprise Key Management (EKM). Enterprise Key Management (EKM) allows you to encrypt your customer content at OpenAI using keys managed by your own external Key Management System (KMS).

entries.summary_en: We're excited to announce that ChatGPT Go, our low cost subscription plan, is now available in 8 additional countries in Europe, bringing total coverage to 98 countries. The new countries we added are Austria, Czech Republic, Denmark, Norway, Poland, Portugal, Spain and Sweden. For an affordable price, ChatGPT Go provides everything included in the Free plan, and:
entries.summary_zh: 我們宣佈低成本訂閱方案 ChatGPT Go 現已在歐洲 8 個額外國家/地區推出，使總覆蓋範圍達到 98 個國家/地區。新增的國家為奧地利、捷克、丹麥、挪威、波蘭、葡萄牙、西班牙和瑞典。…

entries.title_en: Credits for Flexible Usage for Codex and Sora
entries.title_zh: Codex 與 Sora 的彈性使用點數
entries.summary_en: Today we’re introducing ways to purchase additional usage in products like Codex and Sora. If you hit your included limits, you can seamlessly buy more credits right in the Codex dashboard or buy more video generations in the Sora app to keep going. Learn more in our article: Using Credits for Flexible Usage in ChatGPT (Free/Go/Plus/Pro) & Sora.
entries.summary_zh: 今天我們推出購買 Codex 與 Sora 等產品額外使用量的方法。如果您達到包含的使用上限，可以直接在 Codex 儀表板購買更多點數，或在 Sora 應用程式購買更多影片生成額度以繼續使用。在我們的文章中瞭解更多：在 ChatGPT（免費/Go/Plus/Pro）與 Sora 中使用彈性使用點數。

entries.title_en: Credits on ChatGPT Pro and Plus
entries.summary_en: Codex users on ChatGPT Plus and Pro can now use on-demand credits for more Codex usage beyond what’s included in your plan. Learn more.

entries.title_zh: ChatGPT Go 推廣活動 - 印度
entries.summary_en: Eligible customers in India can get now get 12 months of ChatGPT Go at no cost. new New users can redeem now on ChatGPT web or the Android app (Google Play). The Apple App Store option arrives next week - no promo code is required for redemption. Available to users in India who are new, on the free plan, or are current ChatGPT Go subscribers - one redemption per account. Requires a payment method (credit card or UPI).…

entries.summary_en: You can now interrupt long-running queries (such as deep research or GPT-5 Pro) to refine what you’re asking—no restart required or progress lost. For example, if you're researching the perfect bookshelf and suddenly remember that your wall is 72" wide and you can't drill into it, you can simply add that information midstream by clicking “update” in the sidebar and sending the new information as a message. The model will adjust its a…

entries.summary_en: We’ve shipped a minor update to GPT-5-Codex: More reliable file edits with applypatch . Fewer destructive actions such as git reset . More collaborative behavior when encountering user edits in files. 3% more efficient in time and usage.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-11-06 為 GPT-5 更新模型或體驗；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: Today we are introducing a new gpt-5-codex-mini model option to Codex CLI and the IDE Extension. The model is a smaller, more cost-effective, but less capable version of gpt-5-codex that provides approximately 4x more usage as part of your ChatGPT subscription. Starting today, the CLI and IDE Extension will automatically suggest switching to gpt-5-codex-mini when you reach 90% of your 5-hour usage limit, to help you work longer witho…
entries.summary_zh: Codex Changelog 在 2025-11-07 記錄了Codex 編碼代理、定價與用量相關更新；完整版本與修正內容見官方英文摘要。

entries.title_en: Personality and custom instructions now apply to all chats
entries.title_zh: 個人風格與自訂指令現適用於所有聊天
entries.summary_en: Previously, changes you made to your ChatGPT personality or custom instructions only applied to new conversations. Starting today, updates you make in Settings → Personalization are applied immediately across all chats (including existing conversations!) so your experience stays consistent everywhere without needing to start a new thread.
entries.summary_zh: 以往，您對 ChatGPT 個人風格或自訂指令所做的變更僅適用於新的對話。從今天開始，您在「設定」→「個人化」中所做的更新會立即套用到所有聊天（包括現有的對話！），讓您的體驗在任何地方皆保持一致，無需開啟新的對話串。

entries.summary_en: We’re updating GPT-5 to GPT-5.1 Instant and GPT-5.1 Thinking, making answers both smarter and more conversational. GPT-5.1 Instant now uses light adaptive reasoning for tougher questions while staying fast, and GPT-5.1 Thinking adapts its thinking time more precisely for complex tasks with clearer, less jargony responses. GPT-5.1 Auto continues to route each query to the best model, and GPT-5 models remain available for three months…
entries.summary_zh: 我們將 GPT-5 更新為 GPT-5.1 Instant 和 GPT-5.1 Thinking，使回答更聰明且更具對話感。GPT-5.1 Instant 針對較難的問題採用輕量級自適應推理，同時保持快速；GPT-5.1 Thinking 則能更精確地調整思考時間，以處理複雜任務，並提供更清晰、較少技術術語的回答。

entries.title_zh: 全新的語氣與個人化控制
entries.summary_en: We’re updating ChatGPT’s tone controls so it’s easier to make responses sound the way you prefer. You can now choose from updated presets like Default, Friendly, Efficient, Professional, Candid, and Quirky (with Cynical and Nerdy still available), and we’re experimenting with more granular controls over how concise, warm, or scannable responses are, plus how often emojis appear.…
entries.summary_zh: 我們正在更新 ChatGPT 的語氣控制，讓您更容易使回應符合您偏好的方式。您現在可以從更新後的預設選項中選擇，例如預設 (Default)、友善 (Friendly)、高效 (Efficient)、專業 (Professional)、坦率 (Candid) 和古怪 (Quirky)（Cynical 和 Nerdy 仍然可用），我們也正在實驗針對回應的簡潔度、溫暖度或可掃描性進行更細緻的控制，此外…

entries.summary_en: OpenAI shipped an Atlas maintenance build focused on bug fixes.

entries.summary_en: gpt-5.1-codex-mini Released gpt-5.1-codex and gpt-5.1-codex-mini to the Responses API. GPT-5.1-Codex is a version of GPT-5.1 optimized for agentic coding tasks in Codex or similar environments. Read more here.

entries.summary_en: We’re piloting group chats so you can bring people - and ChatGPT - into the same conversation. Plan trips, make decisions, and collaborate on projects together while ChatGPT helps search, summarize, generate content, and keep everyone on the same page. Group chats are starting to roll out on ChatGPT Web, iOS, and Android in New Zealand, Japan, South Korea, and Taiwan. We’ll use early feedback from this pilot to improve the experience…
entries.summary_zh: 我們正在試行群組聊天，讓您可以將人員和 ChatGPT 帶入同一個對話中。您可以一起規劃旅行、做出決定並協作專案，同時由 ChatGPT 協助搜尋、總結、生成內容並讓所有人保持同步。

entries.summary_en: Along with the GPT-5.1 launch in the API , we are introducing new gpt-5.1-codex-mini and gpt-5.1-codex model options in Codex, a version of GPT-5.1 optimized for long-running, agentic coding tasks and use in coding agent harnesses in Codex or Codex-like harnesses. Starting today, the CLI and IDE Extension will default to gpt-5.1-codex on macOS and Linux and gpt-5.1 on Windows. If you have a model specified in your config.toml configu…

entries.summary_en: Released enhanced role-based access controls (RBAC) . Role-based access control (RBAC) lets you decide who can do what across your organization and projects—both through the API and in the Dashboard.
entries.summary_zh: 推出：enhanced role-based access controls (RBAC)。OpenAI 將此列為 2025-11-13 的功能；重點涉及企業管理控制，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.summary_en: Released extended prompt cache retention. Extended prompt cache retention keeps cached prefixes active for longer, up to a maximum of 24 hours. Extended Prompt Caching works by offloading the key/value tensors to GPU-local storage when memory is full, significantly increasing the storage capacity available for caching.

entries.summary_en: Released GPT-5.1 , the newest flagship model in the GPT-5 model family. GPT-5.1 is trained to be especially proficient in: Steerability and faster responses when less thinking's required Code generation and coding use cases Agentic workflows Note that GPT-5.1 defaults to a new none reasoning setting for faster responses when less thinking's required—different from the previous medium default setting in GPT-5.

Schedule/replacements: 2026-05-12 dall-e-2 gpt-image-2 , gpt-image-1 , or gpt-image-1-mini; 2026-05-12 dall-e-3 gpt-image-2 , gpt-image-1 , or gpt-image-1-mini

entries.summary_en: On November 17th, 2025, we notified developers using codex-mini-latest model of its deprecation and removal from the API on February 12, 2026. As part of this deprecation, we will no longer support our legacy local shell tool, which is only available for use with codex-mini-latest. For new use cases, please use our latest shell tool.

entries.summary_en: On November 17th, 2025, we notified developers using codex-mini-latest model of its deprecation and removal from the API on February 12, 2026. As part of this deprecation, we will no longer support our legacy local shell tool, which is only available for use with codex-mini-latest . For new use cases, please use our latest shell tool. Schedule/replacements: 2026-02-12 codex-mini-latest gpt-5-codex-mini

GPT‑5.1-Codex-Max is built on an update to our foundational reasoning model, which is trained on agentic tasks across software engineering, math, research, and more. GPT‑5.1-Codex-Max is faster, more intelligent, and more token-efficient at every stage of the development cycle–and a new step towards becoming a reliable coding partner. Starting today, th…

entries.title_en: GPT-5.1 Pro: Clearer, more capable answers for complex work
entries.title_zh: GPT-5.1 Pro：針對複雜工作提供更清晰、更有能力的回答
entries.summary_en: Today we’re updating GPT-5 Pro to GPT-5.1 Pro. In early testing, users consistently preferred GPT-5.1 Pro over GPT-5 Pro, rating it especially highly for writing help, data science, and business questions. Testers highlighted the model’s improved clarity, relevance, and structure in its responses. GPT-5.1 Pro is rolling out today for all ChatGPT Pro users and is available in the model picker. GPT-5 Pro will remain available as a lega…
entries.summary_zh: 今天我們將 GPT-5 Pro 更新為 GPT-5.1 Pro。在早期測試中，使用者一致偏好 GPT-5.1 Pro 勝過 GPT-5 Pro，並在寫作協助、數據科學和商業問題方面給予極高評價。測試人員強調了該模型在回應時具有更佳的清晰度、相關性和結構。

entries.summary_en: GPT-5.1-Codex-Max is our new frontier agentic coding model built for long-running, project-scale work. It’s faster, more capable, and more token‑efficient than GPT‑5.1‑Codex, using compaction to work coherently across multiple context windows. You can use it in Codex surfaces today, including the CLI, IDE extension, cloud, and code review. Rates are the same as for GPT-5.1-Codex.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-11-19 為 GPT-5.1 發布模型；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI released GPT-5.1-Codex-Max across Codex surfaces for long-running, project-scale agentic coding with native context compaction across multiple context windows.

entries.title_en: Added support for DTMF key presses in the Realtime API.
entries.summary_en: Added support for DTMF key presses in the Realtime API. You can now receive DTMF events while using a Realtime sideband connection. See docs here for more information.

entries.title_en: Instant Checkout now rolling out to Shopify merchants
entries.title_zh: Instant Checkout 現正向 Shopify 商家推出
entries.summary_en: You can now find and buy from Shopify merchants starting with Spanx, Skims, and Glossier through Instant Checkout in ChatGPT. When a product from a Shopify merchant supports Instant Checkout, you can complete the purchase right in the chat with a quick confirmation of your shipping and payment details. Instant Checkout is available for logged in Plus, Pro, and Free users in the US.
entries.summary_zh: 您現在可以透過 ChatGPT 中的 Instant Checkout 尋找並購買 Shopify 商家（首波包含 Spanx、Skims 和 Glossier）的商品。當 Shopify 商家的產品支援 Instant Checkout 時，您可以在聊天中快速確認您的運送和付款詳細資訊，直接完成購買。

entries.summary_en: ChatGPT now adds more inline images from the web to help you quickly understand topics like well-known people, places, and products. When visuals can add clarity, you’ll see images placed beside the relevant paragraph. You can click on any of the images to see them in original dimensions and with the source attribution. These improvements are gradually rolling out globally across all ChatGPT plans, on web, iOS, and Android for respon…
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT 現在會在回答中增加更多來自網路的內嵌圖片，協助您快速理解知名人物、地點和產品等主題。當視覺內容能增加清晰度時，您會看到圖片放置在相關段落旁。您可以點擊任何圖片以查看原始尺寸並獲取來源說明。

entries.summary_en: Shopping research is a new interactive experience that helps you find the right products without doing all the research yourself. Describe what you need—like a quiet cordless vacuum for a small apartment, a gift for a four‑year‑old who loves art, or a way to choose between three bikes—and ChatGPT will ask clarifying questions, research deeply across the internet, review quality sources, and build on ChatGPT’s understanding of you fro…

entries.title_zh: Usage and credits fixes 更新
entries.summary_en: Minor updates to address a few issues with Codex usage and credits: Adjusted all usage dashboards to show “limits remaining” for consistency. The CLI previously displayed “limits used.” Fixed an issue preventing users from buying credits if their ChatGPT subscription was purchased via iOS or Google Play. Fixed an issue where the CLI could display stale usage information; it now refreshes without needing to send a message first. Optim…
entries.summary_zh: Codex Changelog 在 2025-11-24 記錄了Codex 編碼代理、定價與用量、可靠性與效能修正相關更新；完整版本與修正內容見官方英文摘要。

entries.title_en: An improved Voice interface: the audio you know, with text and visuals when you need them.
entries.title_zh: 改進的語音介面：您熟悉的音訊，並在需要時提供文字與視覺內容
entries.summary_en: We’re making ChatGPT Voice a seamless part of the ChatGPT experience, so you can use voice right inside the chat interface you already use every day—no separate mode required. Many of you have asked for a more flexible Voice experience—now, you can speak, listen, and see your conversation at the same time. Answers will be spoken alongside streamed text, image search results, widgets (maps, weather, etc.) and more—right in the same ch…
entries.summary_zh: 我們將 ChatGPT Voice 打造為 ChatGPT 體驗中無縫的一部分，讓您可以在每天使用的聊天介面中直接使用語音，無需切換到單獨的模式。許多使用者要求更靈活的語音體驗——現在，您可以同時說話、聆聽並查看您的對話。

entries.summary_en: Assign or mention @Codex in an issue to kick-off a Codex cloud task. As Codex works, it posts updates back to Linear, providing a link to the completed task so you can review, open a PR, or keep working. To learn more about how to connect Codex to Linear both locally through MCP and through the new integration, check out the Codex for Linear documentation .

GPT-5.2 shows improvements over the previous GPT-5.1 in: General intelligence Instruction following Accuracy and token efficiency Multimodality—especially vision Code generation—especially front-end UI creation Tool calling and context management in the API Spreadsheet understanding and creation. What's new in 5.2 is a new xhigh reasoning effort level, concise re…

entries.title_en: Voice on macOS desktop app is retiring (effective January 15, 2026)
entries.title_zh: macOS 桌面版 ChatGPT 的語音功能即將停用（自 2026 年 1 月 15 日起生效）
entries.summary_en: We’re retiring the Voice experience in the ChatGPT macOS app on January 15, 2026. This change allows us to focus on more unified and improved voice experiences across our apps. Voice will continue to be available on chatgpt.com, iOS, Android, and Windows app. No other ChatGPT features on macOS are affected.
entries.summary_zh: 我們將於 2026 年 1 月 15 日停用 ChatGPT macOS 應用程式中的語音體驗。此舉旨在讓我們更專注於提升各應用程式中語音體驗的一致性與品質。語音功能將持續於 chatgpt.com、iOS、Android 和 Windows 應用程式中提供。其他 macOS 版 ChatGPT 功能不受影響。

entries.summary_en: gpt-4o-mini-transcribe Released four new dated audio snapshots. These updates deliver reliability, quality, and voice fidelity improvements for real-time, voice-driven applications. Read more here.

entries.title_zh: 推出：four 全新 dated audio snapshots.
entries.summary_en: Released four new dated audio snapshots. These updates deliver reliability, quality, and voice fidelity improvements for real-time, voice-driven applications. Read more here . gpt-realtime-mini-2025-12-15 gpt-audio-mini-2025-12-15 gpt-4o-mini-transcribe-2025-12-15 gpt-4o-mini-tts-2025-12-15 This launch also includes support for Custom voices for eligible customers.

entries.title_en: ChatGPT Images on Web and Mobile (iOS & Android)
entries.summary_en: We’ve introduced a new and improved version of ChatGPT Images, powered by our best image generation model yet. With ChatGPT Images, precise instruction following and editing makes AI image creation not just more fun, but meaningfully more useful—from everyday edits to creative transformations. All images you create with ChatGPT are automatically saved under My images at https://chatgpt.com/images, giving you a single place to browse,…
entries.summary_zh: 我們推出新版 ChatGPT 影像功能，由我們目前最強大的影像生成模型驅動。透過 ChatGPT Images，精確的指令遵循與編輯能力使 AI 影像創作不僅更有趣，且實用性顯著提升——從日常編輯到創意轉換皆適用。

entries.title_en: Released gpt-image-1.5 and chatgpt-image-latest, our latest and most advanced models for image generation.
entries.summary_en: Released gpt-image-1.5 and chatgpt-image-latest , our latest and most advanced models for image generation. Read more here .

entries.title_zh: Pulse 現已支援「任務」功能
entries.summary_en: Tasks let you set up automated prompts that ChatGPT can run for you. You can now manage all your tasks directly in Pulse: See all tasks in one place in Pulse. Create tasks in chat or in Pulse—whatever’s easier in the moment. Edit and review tasks in Pulse anytime after you create them. Please note that Pulse is only available in ChatGPT Pro.
entries.summary_zh: 「任務」功能讓您能設定由 ChatGPT 為您執行的自動化提示詞。現在您可直接在 Pulse 中管理所有任務：在 Pulse 中集中檢視所有任務。隨時在對話中或 Pulse 內建立任務——依當下需求選擇。建立後可隨時在 Pulse 中編輯與檢視任務。請注意，Pulse 僅適用於 ChatGPT Pro。

entries.summary_en: Today we are releasing GPT-5.2-Codex , the most advanced agentic coding model yet for complex, real-world software engineering. GPT-5.2-Codex is a version of GPT-5.2 further optimized for agentic coding in Codex, including improvements on long-horizon work through context compaction, stronger performance on large code changes like refactors and migrations, improved performance in Windows environments, and significantly stronger cyber…
entries.summary_zh: Codex Changelog 在 2025-12-18 記錄了安全與治理、Codex 編碼代理、代理與工具調用相關更新；完整版本與修正內容見官方英文摘要。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI released GPT-5.2-Codex across paid Codex surfaces with stronger long-horizon software engineering, context compaction, Windows performance, vision, and cybersecurity capabilities.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 已在付費 Codex 介面中推出 GPT-5.2-Codex，具備更強大的長視角軟體工程、上下文壓縮、Windows 效能、視覺及網路安全能力。

entries.title_en: Introducing the app directory in ChatGPT
entries.title_zh: 推出 ChatGPT 應用程式目錄
entries.summary_en: You can now browse and add approved apps in the new app directory. Apps let you work with your tools and data directly inside a conversation—from interactive in-chat experiences to secure connections that allow ChatGPT to search and reference information from third-party services. As part of this update, connectors now appear in the directory as apps, making it easier to manage all your tools in one place. References across the Help…
entries.summary_zh: 您現在可在全新的應用程式目錄中瀏覽並新增經核准的應用程式。這些應用程式讓您能直接在對話中使用工具與資料——從互動式對話體驗，到允許 ChatGPT 搜尋並參照第三方服務資訊的安全連線皆包含在內。

entries.summary_en: For the same ChatGPT login, users can create multiple profiles (i.e. personal, school, work, etc); Each profile can have its own bookmarks, web history, cookies Support for multiple ChatGPT logins is not yet supported (coming soon)
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-12-18 為 ChatGPT 新增功能；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: Recently Closed Tabs added to History menu Permissions prompt UI polish
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-12-18 為 ChatGPT 新增功能；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: You can now pin chats to the top of your list for quick access to important conversations. Pinned chats are available on iOS, Android, Web, and Atlas. On web, hover over a chat in the left-hand sidebar, click ⋯, and select Pin chat. On mobile, long-press a chat and select Pin chat.
entries.summary_zh: 您現在可將對話釘選至清單頂端，以便快速存取重要對話。聊天釘選功能適用於 iOS、Android、網頁版及 Atlas。在網頁版上，將滑鼠懸停於左側邊欄的對話，點擊 ⋯，然後選擇「釘選聊天」。在行動裝置上，長按對話並選擇「釘選聊天」。

entries.summary_en: Ctrl+Cmd+Left (or Right/Up/Down) now moves the selected tab one space
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-12-18 為 ChatGPT 新增功能；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: Updates to the OpenAI Model Spec
entries.summary_en: We’ve updated the Model Spec, our living document outlining intended model behavior, to strengthen and more clearly codify the principles that reflect how we build experiences for teen users. New section: Under-18 (U18) Principles

entries.summary_zh: 新增：gpt-image-1.5 and chatgpt-image-latest to Responses API image generation tool。OpenAI 將此列為 2025-12-19 的更新；重點涉及代理與工具調用、圖像與影片，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.title_zh: Agent skills in Codex 更新
entries.summary_en: Codex now supports agent skills : reusable bundles of instructions (plus optional scripts and resources) that help Codex reliably complete specific tasks. Skills are available in both the Codex CLI and IDE extensions. You can invoke a skill explicitly by typing $skill-name (for example, $skill-installer or the experimental $create-plan skill after installing it), or let Codex select a skill automatically based on your prompt. Learn m…
entries.summary_zh: Codex Changelog 在 2025-12-19 記錄了Codex 編碼代理、代理與工具調用相關更新；完整版本與修正內容見官方英文摘要。

entries.summary_en: chatgpt-image-latest Added gpt-image-1.5 and chatgpt-image-latest to the Responses API image generation tool.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-12-19 為 ChatGPT Images 更新開發者平台；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_zh: 全新詳細特性控制選項
entries.summary_en: In addition to selecting a base style and tone preset—like candid and friendly—you can now adjust specific characteristics individually. From the ‘personalization’ pane in settings, you can adjust ChatGPT to: Be more or less warm Be more or less enthusiastic Use more or fewer headers & lists Use more or fewer emojis
entries.summary_zh: 除了選擇基礎風格與語氣預設值（如直率、友善）外，您現在可以個別調整特定特性。從設定中的「個人化」面板，您可以調整 ChatGPT 的表現：增加或減少溫暖度、增加或減少熱情度、增加或減少標題與清單的使用、增加或減少表情符號的使用。

entries.summary_en: Today we’re rolling out Your Year with ChatGPT, an optional, personalized end-of-year experience that reflects on how you interacted with ChatGPT in 2025. It highlights high-level themes from your conversations and includes summary statistics about your usage over the year. This experience is rolling out gradually throughout the day, so it may not be available to everyone immediately. It’s available to Free, Plus, and Pro users in Un…
entries.summary_zh: 我們今日推出「ChatGPT 年度回顧」，這是一項選擇性的個人化年底體驗，回顧您在 2025 年與 ChatGPT 的互動方式。它會強調您對話中的主要主題，並包含您全年的使用統計摘要。

entries.summary_en: We’re starting to roll out Health, a dedicated space in ChatGPT for health and wellness conversations. You can securely connect medical records, Apple Health and supported wellness apps so answers can be grounded in your own data. Health is designed to help you navigate medical care, not replace it. Health conversations, memory, and files are kept separate from the rest of ChatGPT and are not used to train our foundation models. Heal…
entries.summary_zh: 我們開始推出「健康」功能，這是 ChatGPT 中專為健康與保健對話設計的空間。您可以安全地連結醫療記錄、Apple Health 及受支援的保健應用程式，讓 AI 回覆能基於您的個人資料。此功能旨在協助您了解醫療護理，而非取代醫療服務。

entries.summary_en: chatgpt-image-latest Fixed an issue where gpt-image-1.5 and chatgpt-image-latest were incorrectly using high fidelity for image edits through /v1/images/edits, even when fidelity was explicitly set to low (the default).

entries.title_en: Improved memory for finding details from past chats (Plus & Pro)
entries.title_zh: 改進對過去對話細節的查找記憶功能 (Plus 與 Pro)
entries.summary_en: When reference chat history is enabled, ChatGPT can now more reliably find specific details from your past chats when you ask. Any past chat used to answer your question now appears as a source so you can open and review the original context. This memory improvement is now available for Plus and Pro users globally.
entries.summary_zh: 當啟用參考對話記錄時，ChatGPT 現在能更可靠地在您詢問時找到過去對話中的具體細節。任何用於回答您問題的過去對話現在都會作為來源顯示，以便您開啟並查看原始上下文。這項記憶改進功能現已向全球 Plus 和 Pro 用戶開放。

entries.summary_en: We're rolling out an age prediction model on ChatGPT consumer plans to help determine whether an account likely belongs to someone under 18, so we can apply the right experience and safeguards for teens. The model looks at a combination of behavioral and account-level signals, including how long an account has existed, typical times of day when someone is active, usage patterns over time, and a user’s stated age.…
entries.summary_zh: 我們正在 ChatGPT 消費者方案中推出年齡預測模型，以協助判斷帳號是否屬於 18 歲以下的使用者，進而為青少年應用合適的體驗與保護措施。

entries.summary_en: We’re updating GPT-5.2 Instant’s default personality to be more conversational and better at adapting its tone contextually, making exchanges feel smoother and more natural. You can still select a different base style and tone for ChatGPT, along with tuning characteristics like warmth and emoji use, within the Personalization menu in settings.
entries.summary_zh: 我們正在更新 GPT-5.2 Instant 的預設個性，使其更具對話感，並能更好地根據上下文調整語氣，讓交流感覺更流暢、更自然。您仍可在設定的個人化選單中為 ChatGPT 選擇不同的基礎風格和語氣，並調整溫暖度與表情符號使用等特性。

Use it to share: config.toml defaults rules/ for command controls outside the sandbox skills/ for reusable workflows Codex loads these layers from .codex/ folders in the current working directory, parent folders, and the repo root, plus user ( ~/.codex/ ) and system ( /etc/codex/ ) locations. Higher-precedence locations override lower-preced…

entries.title_zh: Web search 現已預設啟用
entries.summary_en: Codex now enables web search for local tasks in the Codex CLI and IDE Extension. By default, Codex uses a web search cache, which is an OpenAI-maintained index of web results. Cached mode returns pre-indexed results instead of fetching live pages, while live mode fetches the most recent data from the web. If you are using --yolo or another full access sandbox setting, web search defaults to live results. To disable this behavior or s…

entries.title_en: Retiring GPT-4o and other legacy models
entries.title_zh: 停用 GPT-4o 及其他舊版模型
entries.summary_en: On February 13, 2026, alongside the previously announced retirement⁠ of GPT‑5 (Instant and Thinking), we will retire GPT‑4o, GPT‑4.1, GPT‑4.1 mini, and OpenAI o4-mini from ChatGPT. In the API, there are no changes at this time. For more, see our blog post or help center.
entries.summary_zh: 於 2026 年 2 月 13 日，除了先前宣佈停用的 GPT‑5 (Instant 與 Thinking) 外，我們將從 ChatGPT 中停用 GPT‑4o、GPT‑4.1、GPT‑4.1 mini 以及 OpenAI o4-mini。API 目前沒有變動。欲了解更多資訊，請參閱我們的部落格文章或說明中心。

entries.title_en: Retiring GPT-4o and other legacy models
entries.title_zh: 退役：GPT-4o and other legacy models
entries.summary_en: On February 13, 2026, alongside the previously announced retirement⁠ of GPT‑5 (Instant and Thinking), we will retire GPT‑4o, GPT‑4.1, GPT‑4.1 mini, and OpenAI o4-mini from ChatGPT. In the API, there are no changes at this time. For more, see our blog post or help center.
