entries.summary_en: Responses in ChatGPT are now more visual and easier to scan. For everyday questions, responses may include at-a-glance visuals—like checking your team’s latest stats, converting units, or doing a quick calculation. Answers now also highlight important people, places, products, and ideas. You can tap any highlight to open a side panel with key facts and trusted sources, making it easy to understand the context without asking follow-up…
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT 的回應現在更具視覺效果且更易於快速瀏覽。針對日常問題，回應可能包含一目了然的視覺內容，例如查看您團隊的最新數據、單位換算或進行快速計算。回答內容現在也會突顯重要的人事物、地點、產品與概念。

entries.title_en: Apps SDK updates for redirects, widget descriptions, and follow-up scrolling
entries.summary_en: Fixes & improvements window.openai.openExternal({ href, redirectUrl }) supports redirectUrl: false , which prevents the host from appending ?redirectUrl=... to external links. window.openai.setOpenInAppUrl({ href }) is the supported way to override the fullscreen “Open in ” destination; if you do not call it, ChatGPT keeps opening the widget’s current iframe path. openai/widgetDescription is honored during resource construction and t…

entries.title_zh: 推出 Codex 應用程式
entries.summary_en: Today we’re releasing the Codex app for MacOS, a command center for managing multiple coding agents in parallel. The app lets you run long‑horizon and background tasks, review clean diffs from isolated worktrees, see agent progress and decisions, and execute reusable skills and automations. Available with ChatGPT plans that include Codex, with a limited‑time promo: Free and Go can try Codex with included limits, while Plus, and Pro u…
entries.summary_zh: 今天我們推出適用於 MacOS 的 Codex 應用程式，這是一個用於並行管理多個程式開發代理的指揮中心。該應用程式讓您能夠執行長週期與後台任務、檢視隔離工作樹中清晰的差異、查看代理的進度與決策，並執行可重複使用的技能與自動化流程。

entries.summary_en: Codex app The Codex app for macOS is a desktop interface for running agent threads in parallel and collaborating with agents on long-running tasks. It includes a project sidebar, thread list, and review pane for tracking work across projects. Key features: Multitask across projects Built-in worktree support Voice dictation Built-in Git tooling Skills Automations For a limited time, ChatGPT Free and Go include Codex , and Plus, Pro, B…

entries.title_en: Update on thinking time settings for GPT-5.2 Thinking in ChatGPT
entries.title_zh: 更新 ChatGPT 中 GPT-5.2 Thinking 的思考時間設定
entries.summary_en: Jan 10, 2026: We lowered the Standard and Light thinking time as we observed users prefer faster responses. As part of this update, the Extended thinking setting for GPT-5.2 was unintentionally changed to be lower which we have now fixed. February 3, 2026: We made another small reduction to Standard thinking time based on testing. February 4, 2026: We’re restoring the Extended thinking level for GPT-5.2 Thinking to its prior setting,…
entries.summary_zh: 2026 年 1 月 10 日：我們降低了「標準」與「輕量」思考時間，因為我們觀察到用戶偏好更快速的回應。作為此更新的一部分，GPT-5.2 的「延長」思考設定被無意間調低，我們現已修正。2026 年 2 月 3 日：根據測試，我們再次小幅縮減了「標準」思考時間。

entries.title_en: Update on thinking time settings for GPT-5.2 Thinking in ChatGPT
entries.summary_en: Jan 10, 2026: We lowered the Standard and Light thinking time as we observed users prefer faster responses. As part of this update, the Extended thinking setting for GPT-5.2 was unintentionally changed to be lower which we have now fixed. February 3, 2026:We made another small reduction to Standard thinking time based on testing.

entries.summary_en: Today, we launched GPT-5.3-Codex, our most capable agentic coding model yet. This model is the first that combines Codex + GPT-5 training stacks -- bringing together best-in-class code generation, reasoning, and general-purpose intelligence in one unified model. It’s ~25% faster,sets new highs on key benchmarks, and marks a step-change from code generation to a general-purpose coding agent you can actively steer while it works. Read…

entries.summary_en: Today we’re releasing GPT-5.3-Codex, the most capable agentic coding model to date for complex, real-world software engineering. GPT-5.3-Codex combines the frontier coding performance of GPT-5.2-Codex with stronger reasoning and professional knowledge capabilities, and runs 25% faster for Codex users. It’s also better at collaboration while the agent is working—delivering more frequent progress updates and responding to steering in r…

entries.title_en: GPT-5.3-Codex in Cursor and VS Code
entries.summary_en: Starting today, GPT-5.3-Codex is available natively in Cursor and VS Code. API access is starting with a small set of customers as part of a phased release. This is the first model treated as a high security capability under the Preparedness Framework. Safety controls will continue to scale, and API access will expand over the next few weeks.

entries.title_zh: 在 ChatGPT (Free, Go) 測試廣告
entries.summary_en: We’re beginning to roll out a test for ads in ChatGPT in the U.S. for logged-in adults on the Free and Go tiers. Plus, Pro, Business, Enterprise, and Education plans do not have ads. The test will be a subset of users to start. We will expand over the coming weeks as we learn from this test. ChatGPT’s answers are generated independently from advertising. Answers are optimized based on what’s most helpful to you. When you see an ad, t…
entries.summary_zh: 我們開始針對美國地區使用 Free 和 Go 層級且已登入的成年使用者，對 ChatGPT 廣告進行測試。Plus、Business、Enterprise 和 Education 方案則不含廣告。測試初期將針對部分使用者開放。隨著測試進展，我們將在未來幾週內擴大測試範圍。ChatGPT 的答案生成與廣告內容無關。…

entries.summary_en: We’re making an update to GPT-5.2 Instant in ChatGPT and the API that improves response style and quality. Users should notice responses that are more measured and grounded in tone, in a way that’s more contextually appropriate to the conversation. The model also tends to output clearer, more relevant answers to advice-seeking and how-to questions, more reliably placing the most important info upfront.

entries.title_en: Updated the gpt-5.2-chat-latest slug to point to the latest model currently used in ChatGPT.
entries.summary_en: Updated the gpt-5.2-chat-latest slug to point to the latest model currently used in ChatGPT.
entries.summary_zh: 更新：gpt-5.2-chat-latest slug to point to latest 模型 currently used in ChatGPT。OpenAI 將此列為 2026-02-10 的更新；重點涉及平台功能與可用性，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.summary_en: We’re introducing improvements to deep research in ChatGPT to help produce more accurate, credible reports with greater control. You can now focus research on specific websites and a larger collection of connected apps as trusted sources. A redesigned sidebar entry point and fullscreen report view make it easier to start, review, and manage research in one place. Create and edit a research plan before it begins, and track progress wi…
entries.summary_zh: 我們為 ChatGPT 中的深度研究功能推出各項改進，旨在協助產出更準確、可信且具備更高控制度的報告。您現在可以將研究聚焦於特定網站，並將更多已連結的應用程式作為受信任的資訊來源。…

entries.title_zh: Atlas 智慧 Ask ChatGPT 操作
entries.summary_en: Atlas added proactive quick actions and more relevant suggestions for Ask ChatGPT, plus fullscreen, incognito, tab and bookmark fixes.
entries.summary_zh: Atlas 為 Ask ChatGPT 新增主動快速操作與更相關的建議，並修正全螢幕、無痕、分頁與書籤問題。

entries.summary_en: Fixed a fullscreen mode issue where the bookmark bar could appear as a white strip. Fixed an issue where opening incognito windows could cause crashes.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-02-11 為 ChatGPT Windows 更新模型或體驗；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: More relevant suggestions in the "Ask ChatGPT" sidebar
entries.summary_en: See more relevant suggested prompts above the composer in "Ask ChatGPT" sidebar, tailored to what you are doing.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-02-11 為 ChatGPT 新增功能；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: Smart quick actions for "Ask ChatGPT" in the top toolbar
entries.summary_en: Get proactive, personalized suggestions that help you complete your task, right next to Ask ChatGPT button in the tool bar.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-02-11 為 ChatGPT 新增功能；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: We’re making an update to ChatGPT Voice that improves its ability to follow user instructions, and usage of tools like web search to provide better responses. This update applies to the version of Voice primarily used by those on the free ChatGPT plan, and by Plus users when limits are reached for the main model.
entries.summary_zh: 我們對 ChatGPT Voice 進行了更新，提升其遵循使用者指令的能力，並改進對網頁搜尋等工具的使用，從而提供更優質的回應。此更新適用於主要供免費版 ChatGPT 使用者，以及在主要模型達到用量限制時供 Plus 使用者使用的 Voice 版本。

entries.summary_en: New features Support for GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark Added conversation forking Added floating pop-out window to take a conversation with you Bug fixes Improved performance and bug fixes Alpha testing for the Codex app on Windows is also starting. Sign up here to be a potential alpha tester.
entries.summary_zh: Codex Changelog 在 2026-02-12 記錄了Codex 編碼代理、可靠性與效能修正相關更新；完整版本與修正內容見官方英文摘要。

entries.summary_en: Today, we’re releasing a research preview of GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark , a smaller version of GPT-5.3-Codex and our first model designed for real-time coding. Codex-Spark is optimized to feel near-instant, delivering more than 1000 tokens per second while remaining highly capable for real-world coding tasks. Codex-Spark is available in research preview for ChatGPT Pro users in the latest Codex app, CLI, and IDE extension. This release also…
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-02-12 為 GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark 發布模型；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI released GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark as a Pro research preview: a smaller real-time coding model served on Cerebras hardware at more than 1,000 tokens per second.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark 作為 Pro 研究預覽版：這是一個較小型的即時程式碼模型，於 Cerebras 硬體上執行，速度超過每秒 1,000 個 token。

entries.title_en: ChatGPT updates: Better file uploads, easier copying, and more reliable long chats
entries.title_zh: 模型更新：ChatGPT updates: Better file uploads, easier copying, and more reliable long chats
entries.summary_en: Attach up to 20 files in a single message.You can now upload up to 20 files at once (previously 10), making it easier to analyze document sets, compare multiple files, or provide broader context in a single message. Expanded file type support.We now support additional text and code file formats, improving compatibility with source files, logs, configuration files, and other structured text.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-02-13 為 ChatGPT 更新模型或體驗；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_zh: 網頁版僅對話內容「全選」功能
entries.summary_en: Cmd+A on ChatGPT web now selects conversation content without surrounding interface elements.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT 網頁版的 Cmd+A 現在僅會選取對話內容，而不包含周圍的介面元素。

entries.title_en: Expanded text and code file support
entries.title_zh: 擴展文字與程式碼檔案支援
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT web added support for more text, code, log, configuration, and structured-text file formats.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT 網頁版增加了對更多文字、程式碼、記錄檔、設定檔和結構化文字檔案格式的支援。

entries.title_en: Lockdown Mode and Elevated Risk labels
entries.title_zh: Lockdown Mode 與 Elevated Risk 標籤
entries.summary_en: OpenAI introduced optional Lockdown Mode for higher-risk users and Elevated Risk labels for capabilities in ChatGPT, Atlas and Codex that may increase prompt-injection exposure.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出供高風險用戶選用的 Lockdown Mode，並為 ChatGPT、Atlas 與 Codex 中可能增加 prompt injection 風險的能力加上 Elevated Risk 標籤。
entries.source_name: Introducing Lockdown Mode and Elevated Risk labels in ChatGPT

entries.summary_en: ChatGPT simplified the iOS and Android composer experience and exposed common tools more directly on Android.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT 簡化了 iOS 和 Android 的撰寫介面體驗，並在 Android 上更直接地呈現常用工具。

entries.title_zh: 更穩定的長對話 Thinking 模式
entries.summary_en: Infrastructure changes reduced interruptions during long conversations that use Thinking models across web, iOS, and Android.
entries.summary_zh: 基礎設施的變更減少了在網頁版、iOS 和 Android 上使用 Thinking 模型進行長對話時的中斷情況。

entries.title_en: Retiring GPT-4o and other legacy models
entries.title_zh: 停用 GPT-4o 與其他舊型模型
entries.summary_en: As previously announced, we have retired GPT-4o, GPT-4.1, GPT-4.1 mini, and OpenAI o4-mini from ChatGPT. We are also retiring GPT-5 (Instant and Thinking), as previously announced. There are no API changes at this time. For details, see our blog post and Help Center.
entries.summary_zh: 正如先前宣布，我們已從 ChatGPT 中停用 GPT-4o、GPT-4.1、GPT-4.1 mini 和 OpenAI o4-mini。我們也如先前宣布，停用 GPT-5 (Instant 和 Thinking)。目前 API 沒有變更。詳細資訊請參閱我們的部落格文章與說明中心。

entries.title_en: Retiring GPT-4o and other legacy models
entries.title_zh: 退役：GPT-4o and other legacy models
entries.summary_en: As previously announced, we have retired GPT-4o, GPT-4.1, GPT-4.1 mini, and OpenAI o4-mini from ChatGPT. We are also retiring GPT-5 (Instant and Thinking),as previously announced. There are no API changes at this time. For details, see our blog post and Help Center.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-02-13 為 GPT-5 完成退役或停止服務；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: Up to 20 files per ChatGPT message
entries.title_zh: ChatGPT 單則訊息支援最多 20 個檔案
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT web increased the number of files that can be attached to one message from 10 to 20.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT 網頁版增加單則訊息可夾帶的檔案數量，從 10 個提高至 20 個。

entries.summary_en: New features Added drag-and-drop support to reorder queued messages. Added a warning when the selected model is downgraded. Improvements and bug fixes Improved file workflows with fuzzy file search and better attachment recovery after restart. Additional performance improvements and bug fixes.
entries.summary_zh: Codex Changelog 在 2026-02-17 記錄了Codex 編碼代理、可靠性與效能修正相關更新；完整版本與修正內容見官方英文摘要。

entries.title_en: Atlas revamped tab search and auto-organize
entries.title_zh: Atlas 全新分頁搜尋與自動整理
entries.summary_en: Atlas expanded tab search across windows and added AI-powered tab auto-organization, duplicate removal and window merging, with performance and input fixes.
entries.summary_zh: Atlas 擴充分頁搜尋至所有視窗，新增 AI 自動分組、移除重複與合併視窗，並改善效能與輸入。

entries.summary_en: Fixed several focus issues (e.g. focus wouldn’t automatically transfer to the expected element, clicking on a textbox wouldn’t always transfer focus) Made fullscreen mode more reliable so the bookmark bar behaves correctly and transitions feel smoother.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-02-18 為 ChatGPT 更新模型或體驗；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: New tab organization features incl. auto organize
entries.title_zh: 新增tab organization features incl. auto organize
entries.summary_en: Auto organize, remove duplicates, and merge all tabs into one window. Auto-organize, when tapped, will have ChatGPT decide how to group your tabs into tab groups, based on browser memories and prompt instructions. You can edit the instructions with "Edit template"
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-02-18 為 ChatGPT 新增功能；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: We now make it easier to search for your tabs, across the current window and all windows. Click the magnifying glass icon in your tab strip. Use Command+Shift+A as a shortcut
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-02-18 為 ChatGPT Search 新增功能；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_zh: ChatGPT 中的互動式程式碼區塊
entries.summary_en: We improved Code Blocks in ChatGPT to make them more interactive. You can write, edit, and preview your code in ChatGPT, all in oneplace: Write and edit text in-line Preview diagrams and mini apps directly in chat Review code in split-screen views
entries.summary_zh: 我們改善了 ChatGPT 中的程式碼區塊，使其更具互動性。您可以在 ChatGPT 中編寫、編輯和預覽程式碼，全部在同一個地方完成：在行內編寫和編輯文字、直接在聊天中預覽圖表和迷你應用程式、以分割視窗檢視審查程式碼。

entries.title_zh: 擴大「思考」(Thinking) 模式的上下文視窗
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT now has a total context window length of 256k tokens (128k input and 128k max output) when you manually select Thinking. Previously it was 196k total tokens.
entries.summary_zh: 當您手動選擇「思考」(Thinking) 模式時，ChatGPT 的總上下文視窗長度現為 256k tokens（128k 輸入及 128k 最大輸出）。先前總計為 196k tokens。

entries.summary_en: Fixes & improvements ChatGPT is now fully compatible with the MCP Apps spec .
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-02-22 為 Apps SDK 更新開發者平台；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: We've reduced 'laziness' of ChatGPT when in Agent Mode. You'll notice in Agent Mode that ChatGPT is now more persistent on repetitive and tedious tasks (e.g. asking the agent to go through hundreds of emails and extracting action items).

entries.title_en: Add sources to your projects from anywhere
entries.title_zh: 從任何地方將來源新增至您的專案
entries.summary_en: Projects now make it easy to build a living knowledge base by adding sources wherever your context already lives; from apps, conversations, or quick text inputs. Sources from apps: Paste a link to a Slack channel or Google Drive file or folder to add it directly as a project source. Additionally, use connected apps directly in chats. Sources from chats: Save useful ChatGPT responses into your project so great outputs become reusable…
entries.summary_zh: 現在，透過在您現有的上下文環境中新增來源，專案能更輕鬆地建立動態知識庫；這些來源可來自應用程式、對話或快速文字輸入。來自應用程式的來源：貼上 Slack 頻道或 Google Drive 檔案或資料夾的連結，即可直接將其新增為專案來源。此外，還能直接在聊天中使用已連結的應用程式……

entries.summary_en: New features Added new MCP shortcuts in the composer, including install keyword suggestions and an MCP server submenu in Add context . Added support for @mentions and skill mentions in inline review comments. Performance improvements and bug fixes Improved rendering of MCP tool calls and Mermaid diagram error handling. Fixed an issue where stopped terminal commands could continue appearing as running. Additional performance improveme…

entries.summary_en: Edit messages with images.You can now edit messages that include image attachments, so you don’t have to start over to adjust your prompt or regenerate results. Open search results in a new tab.Cmd+click in the search panel now opens results in a new tab, making it easier to explore without losing your place.

entries.summary_en: New features Added a Worktrees setting to turn automatic cleanup of Codex-managed worktrees on or off. Added Handoff support for moving a thread between Local and Worktree . Added an explicit English option in the language menu. Performance improvements and bug fixes Improved GitHub and pull request workflows. Improved approval prompts and app connection sign-in flows. Additional performance improvements and bug fixes.

entries.summary_en: GPT‑5.3 Instant delivers more accurate answers, richer and better-contextualized results when searching the web, and reduces unnecessary dead ends, caveats, and overly declarative phrasing that can interrupt the flow of conversation. This update focuses on the parts of the ChatGPT experience people feel every day: tone, relevance, and conversational flow. These are nuanced problems that don’t always show up in benchmarks, but shape w…
entries.summary_zh: GPT-5.3 Instant 在搜尋網路時能提供更準確的答案、更豐富且具備更好上下文連結的結果，並減少不必要的死胡同、警告事項和過於斷言的措辭，這些情況可能會中斷對話流程。此更新重點在於人們日常感受到的 ChatGPT 體驗部分：語氣、相關性和對話流程……

entries.summary_en: Codex app for Windows The Codex app is now available on Windows. The app gives you one interface for working across projects, running parallel agent threads, and reviewing results in one place. The Codex app runs natively on Windows using PowerShell and a native Windows sandbox for bounded permissions, so you can use Codex on Windows without moving your workflow into WSL, onto a virtual machine, or by deactivating the sandbox. The Wi…

entries.title_zh: Windows 版 Codex 應用程式
entries.summary_en: The Codex app is now available on Windows for ChatGPT plans that include Codex. The app gives users a Windows desktop surface for running multiple Codex agents in parallel, with isolated worktrees and reviewable diffs that can be edited, discarded, or turned into a pull request. Users can sign in with ChatGPT from the app and keep work moving across the app, CLI, and IDE without switching between tools for every task. Learn more: Usi…
entries.summary_zh: Codex 應用程式現已在 Windows 上推出，適用於包含 Codex 的 ChatGPT 方案。該應用程式為使用者提供了一個 Windows 桌面介面，用於平行執行多個 Codex 代理，並具備可編輯、捨棄或轉為 Pull Request 的隔離工作區與可檢視的差異檔 (diffs)……

entries.summary_en: The Codex app became available on Windows for Enterprise and Edu workspaces with parallel agents, isolated worktrees and reviewable diffs.
entries.summary_zh: Codex Windows App 向 Enterprise 與 Edu 開放，支援平行代理、隔離 worktree 與可審查 diff。

Fixed copy and paste shortcuts in the integrated terminal on Windows. Fixed an issue where archived pinned threads could reappear in the sidebar. Fixed an issue where repeated codex://new links could stop prefilling a new conversation when the app was already o…

It combines recent advances in reasoning, coding, and agentic workflows in one model, and it’s the recommended choice for most Codex tasks. In Codex, GPT-5.4 is the first general-purpose model with native computer-use capabilities. GPT-5.4 in Codex includes experimental support for the 1M context window. It supports complex…

Also released: Tool search in the Responses API, which lets models defer large tool surfaces until runtime to reduce token usage, preserve cache performance, and improve latency. Built-in Computer use support in GPT-5.4 through…

entries.summary_en: New features Codex can now read the integrated terminal for the current thread, so it can check the status of a running development server or refer back to failed build output while it works with you. entries.summary_en: As of March 11, 2026, GPT-5.1 models are no longer available in ChatGPT. This applies to GPT-5.1 Instant, GPT-5.1 Thinking, and GPT-5.1 Pro. Existing conversations that used GPT-5.1 will automatically continue on the corresponding current model: GPT-5.3 Instant, GPT-5.4 Thinking, or GPT-5.4 Pro.
entries.summary_zh: 自 2026 年 3 月 11 日起，GPT-5.1 模型不再於 ChatGPT 中提供。這適用於 GPT-5.1 Instant、GPT-5.1 Thinking 和 GPT-5.1 Pro。先前使用 GPT-5.1 的對話將自動在對應的現行模型上繼續：GPT-5.3 Instant、GPT-5.4 Thinking 或 GPT-5.4 Pro。

entries.summary_en: As of March 11, 2026, GPT-5.1 models are no longer available in ChatGPT. This applies to GPT-5.1 Instant, GPT-5.1 Thinking, and GPT-5.1 Pro. Existing conversations that used GPT-5.1 will automatically continue on the corresponding current model: GPT-5.3 Instant, GPT-5.4 Thinking, or GPT-5.4 Pro.

Added an Open in Finder , Open in Explorer , or Open in File Manager action from thread menus to jump straight to a thread’s project folder. entries.summary_zh: 我們正在為 GPT-5.3 Instant 推出更新，改善後續語氣並減少回應中誘餌式的措辭（例如：「如果你想要……」、「你絕對想不到……」、「我可以告訴你這三件事……」）。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI released GPT-5.4 mini and nano as faster, efficient models for high-volume coding, computer-use, tool-use, and subagent workloads; mini also became available in ChatGPT.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano，作為針對大量程式開發、電腦使用、工具使用和子代理工作負載更快速、高效的模型；mini 也已在 ChatGPT 中提供。

entries.title_zh: 推出 GPT-5.4 mini in Codex
entries.summary_en: GPT-5.4 mini is now available in Codex as a fast, efficient model for lighter coding tasks and subagents. It improves over GPT-5 mini across coding, reasoning, image understanding, and tool use while running more than 2x faster. In Codex, GPT-5.4 mini uses 30% as much of your included limits as GPT-5.4, so comparable tasks can last about 3.3x longer before you hit those limits. GPT-5.4 mini is available in the Codex app, the CLI, the…

entries.summary_en: Released GPT-5.4 mini and GPT-5.4 nano to the Chat Completions and Responses API. GPT-5.4 mini brings GPT-5.4-class capabilities to a faster, more efficient model for high-volume workloads, while GPT-5.4 nano is optimized for simple high-volume tasks where speed and cost matter most. GPT-5.4 mini supports tool search , built-in computer use , and compaction . GPT-5.4 nano supports compaction, but does not support tool search or compu…

entries.summary_en: We’re sunsetting the preset Nerdy base style to simplify options and improve response quality. Users who selected it will be moved to the default personality. You can manage personality settings anytime in ChatGPT under Settings → Personalization.
entries.summary_zh: 我們將停止支援預設的「Nerdy」基礎風格，以簡化選項並提升回應品質。曾選擇此風格的使用者將被移至預設人格。您隨時可以在 ChatGPT 的「設定」→「個人化」中管理人格設定。

entries.title_en: Updates to the model picker in ChatGPT
entries.summary_en: We’ve simplified the model picker to make it easier to choose the right level of reasoning. Users on Plus, Pro, Business, Enterprise, and Edu accounts will see a set of model options depending on their plan, including: Instant – fast responses for everyday questions Thinking – deeper reasoning for more complex tasks Pro – the most advanced reasoning models The Auto functionality can be accessed by clicking Configure in the model pick…
entries.summary_zh: 我們簡化了模型選擇器，讓選擇合適的推理層級變得更容易。Plus、Pro、Business、Enterprise 和 Edu 帳戶的使用者將根據其方案看到一系列模型選項，包括：Instant – 針對日常問題的快速回應；Thinking – 針對更複雜任務的深度推理；Pro – 最先進的推理模型……

entries.summary_en: New features You can now fork a conversation from an earlier message, not just the latest turn. Added slash commands for switching models and reasoning levels, and made slash commands work in the middle of a draft prompt. Added notifications for plan mode questions so it’s easier to notice when Codex needs input. Performance improvements and bug fixes Fixed thread handoff and subagent navigation issues across worktrees and the VS Cod…

For all other users, GPT-5.4 mini is available as a rate limit fallback for GPT-5.4 Thinking. For Plus, Pro, and other paid users, GPT-5.4 mini will be used as a fallback for GPT-5.4 Thinking when rate limits are reached, helping with continued access to reasoning capabilities during high usage. entries.summary_en: New features Added skills to the @ menu so you can insert them from the composer alongside other mentions. Cmd/Ctrl+F now starts with your current text selection, which makes searching reviews and diffs faster, alongside broader review navigation improvements such as a refreshed file tree and percentage-based file tree resizing. Added a branded loading shimmer while the app starts. Performance improvements and bug fixes Improved coll…
entries.summary_zh: Codex Changelog 在 2026-03-19 記錄了Codex 編碼代理、可靠性與效能修正相關更新；完整版本與修正內容見官方英文摘要。

entries.title_zh: 舊版 deep research 模式棄用
entries.summary_en: OpenAI announced that legacy deep research mode would be removed on March 26, while the current deep research experience and historical results would remain.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 宣布舊版 deep research 模式將於 3 月 26 日移除；現行體驗與歷史結果不受影響。

entries.title_en: Legacy deep research mode deprecation notice
entries.title_zh: 舊版深度研究模式棄用通知
entries.summary_en: The legacy deep research mode will be removed on Thursday, March 26, 2026. This change only affects the legacy mode; the current deep research experience will remain unchanged. Historical conversations and results will remain accessible. To learn more about deep research, see: Deep research in ChatGPT.
entries.summary_zh: 舊版深度研究模式將於 2026 年 3 月 26 日星期四移除。此變更僅影響舊版模式；目前的深度研究體驗將保持不變。歷史對話與結果仍可存取。若要了解更多關於深度研究的資訊，請參閱：ChatGPT 中的深度研究。

entries.summary_en: New features Added Floating Composer v2. Added terminal shortcuts for jumping by word and line. Improved plugin discovery surfaces and file-path rendering for saved images. Performance improvements and bug fixes Fixed sidebar crashes when subagent turn items are missing. Fixed pop-out thread routing and preserved local paths for composer image attachments. Additional performance improvements and bug fixes.

entries.summary_en: Codex for Students is now available for verified university students in the United States and Canada. Eligible students can claim $100 in ChatGPT credits, or 2,500 credits, to extend Codex usage beyond the limits included in ChatGPT Free, Go, Plus, and Pro. To get started, students sign in at chatgpt.com/codex/students and complete student verification through SheerID with their university email. Credits are applied automatically to…
entries.summary_zh: 學生版 Codex 現已開放給美國和加拿大的已驗證大學生使用。符合資格的學生可領取 100 美元的 ChatGPT 點數（或 2,500 點），以擴展超出 ChatGPT Free、Go、Plus 和 Pro 所包含限制的 Codex 使用量……

entries.summary_en: Now, it’s easier to find, reuse, and build on your files over time. When you upload or create a file—whether it’s a PDF, spreadsheet, image, or more—it’s automatically saved to your Library. Generated images will continue to appear in the Images tab. You can quickly reference files in a chat using recent files in the composer, or browse everything you’ve uploaded in the Library tab in the sidebar. You can also ask ChatGPT about files…
entries.summary_zh: 現在，您可以更輕鬆地查找、重複使用並持續運用您的檔案。當您上傳或建立檔案（無論是 PDF、試算表、圖像或其他類型）時，它會自動儲存至您的「檔案庫」。生成的圖像將繼續出現在「圖像」標籤頁中……

entries.summary_en: New features Added search for past Codex app threads, including a sidebar shortcut and keyboard shortcuts for jumping to recent threads. Added a one-click option to archive all local threads in a project. Synced key settings between the Codex app and the VS Code extension, and added a settings entry point in the extension. Performance improvements and bug fixes Additional performance improvements and bug fixes.
entries.summary_zh: Codex Changelog 在 2026-03-24 記錄了Codex 編碼代理、可靠性與效能修正相關更新；完整版本與修正內容見官方英文摘要。

entries.title_zh: File library helpers in window.openai 更新
entries.summary_en: Fixes & improvements window.openai.selectFiles() lets widgets pick existing files from the user’s ChatGPT file library when that library is available. window.openai.uploadFile(file, { library: true }) lets widgets save uploads into the user’s ChatGPT file library when that library is available.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-03-24 為 Apps SDK 擴大開放範圍；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: We’ve improved shopping in ChatGPT to make it easier to discover, compare, and decide on products. Product results are now more visually rich, with improved detail and relevance. You can browse products in chat, refine results through conversation, and upload images to find similar items. Products can also be compared side by side with key details such as price, reviews, and features, making it easier to compare without opening multi…
entries.summary_zh: 我們改善了 ChatGPT 中的購物體驗，讓產品探索、比較與決策變得更簡單。產品結果現在更具視覺豐富度，並提升了細節與相關性。您可以在對話中瀏覽產品、透過對話優化搜尋結果，並上傳圖像以尋找類似商品……

entries.title_en: Sora 2 video generation models and Videos API
entries.title_zh: 淘汰通知：Sora 2 video generation models and Videos API
entries.summary_en: On March 24th, 2026, we notified developers using the Videos API and Sora 2 video generation model aliases and snapshots of their deprecation and removal from the API on September 24, 2026.

entries.title_zh: Sora 2 video generation models and Videos API 棄用公告

Schedule/replacements: 2026-09-24 Videos API ---; 2026-09-24 sora-2 ---; 2026-09-24 sora-2-pro ---; 2026-09-24 sora-2-2025-10-06 ---; 2026-09-24 sora-2-2025-12-08 ---; 2026-09-24 sora-2-pro-2025-10-06 ---

entries.title_zh: 建置並安裝 plugins in Codex
entries.summary_en: Codex now supports plugins : installable bundles that package skills, app integrations, and MCP server configuration for reusable workflows. Plugins are available in the Codex app, CLI, and IDE extensions. You can install curated plugins from the plugin directory, or scaffold a local plugin with @plugin-creator and test it with workspace-scoped or home-scoped marketplaces. Learn more in the plugins documentation . Plugin structure Ev…

Added automation titles and icons in the sidebar, plus bundled Raycast themes. Performance improvements and bug fixes Kept loaded threads and projects visible during reconnects and made navigation feel faster. Fixed archive freezes, markdown wrapping, hotkey-window regressions, and several permissi…

entries.title_zh: Google Drive 應用程式整合
entries.summary_en: Google’s file connectors in ChatGPT are now unified under Google Drive, providing a single app experience for interacting with your Google Docs, Sheets and Slides on Google Drive. If you’re a new user, you can connect to the Google Drive app in ChatGPT to use Google Drive, Docs, Sheets, and Slides actions, removing the need to install and authenticate separate Google file apps. If you’ve already connected to the separate apps in the…
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT 中的 Google 檔案連接器現已整合至 Google Drive，為您提供單一應用程式體驗，以與您在 Google Drive 上的 Google 文件、試算表和簡報進行互動。…

entries.title_en: Large pastes are now handled as attachments
entries.title_zh: 大型貼上內容現以附件形式處理
entries.summary_en: Starting today for ChatGPT Plus, Pro, and Business users, long pastes are handled differently in ChatGPT. If you paste more than 5k characters into the composer, ChatGPT will automatically convert the content into an attachment instead of inserting it directly into the text field. This keeps the composer cleaner and helps prevent large pastes from consuming your entire context window. You can still move the content back into the mess…
entries.summary_zh: 從今日起，對於 ChatGPT Plus、Pro 和 Business 使用者，長篇貼上內容在 ChatGPT 中的處理方式有所不同。若您在編輯器中貼上超過 5k 字元，ChatGPT 將自動把內容轉換為附件，而非直接插入文字欄位。…

entries.summary_en: Fixes & improvements Apps SDK docs now explain that OpenAI turns approved apps into plugins for Codex distribution, and that for now plugins are only available in Codex.
entries.summary_zh: Apps SDK Changelog 在 2026-03-25 記錄了Codex 編碼代理、可靠性與效能修正相關更新；完整版本與修正內容見官方英文摘要。

entries.title_zh: 行動裝置上簡化的側邊欄
entries.summary_en: To give you more space to view your most critical chats and projects, the sidebar menu is now simplified on iOS and Android. ChatGPT experiences available to you based on your plan and usage—like Images, Codex, Pulse, and Apps—now appear in a horizontal bar above your chats and projects.
entries.summary_zh: 為了讓您有更多空間檢視最重要的對話與專案，iOS 和 Android 上的側邊欄選單現已簡化。根據您的方案與使用情況提供給您的 ChatGPT 體驗（如 Images、Codex、Pulse 和 Apps），現在會顯示在對話與專案上方的水平列中。

entries.summary_en: Users can now choose to share their device location so ChatGPT can provide more relevant information, such as local recommendations, news, and weather. Sharing your device location is completely optional and off until you choose to enable it. You can update device location sharing in Settings Data Controls at any time. Enabling location sharing will also enable precise location. Precise location means ChatGPT can use your device’s sp…
entries.summary_zh: 使用者現在可以選擇共享其裝置位置，以便 ChatGPT 提供更相關的資訊，例如在地推薦、新聞和天氣。共享裝置位置完全是可選的，在您選擇啟用之前預設為關閉。您可以隨時在「設定」「資料控制」中更新裝置位置共享設定。…

entries.summary_en: Codex now includes a curated plugins directory that lets users discover, install, and use packaged workflows built from apps and skills directly in Codex. Plugins are installable bundles for reusable Codex workflows, making it easier to share the same setup across projects or teams. Plugins can package skills, optional app integrations, and MCP server configurations in a single place. Learn more.
entries.summary_zh: Codex 現在包含一個精選外掛程式目錄，讓使用者可以直接在 Codex 中探索、安裝並使用由應用程式與技能建立的封裝工作流程。外掛程式是可安裝的套件，用於可重複使用的 Codex 工作流程，讓跨專案或團隊共享相同的設定變得更加容易。…

entries.title_en: Updated Box, Notion, Linear, and Dropbox apps
entries.title_zh: 更新 Box、Notion、Linear 和 Dropbox 應用程式
entries.summary_en: We’re rolling out updated Box, Notion, Linear, and Dropbox apps in ChatGPT. These updates add new app actions, including new write capabilities where supported, and bring the latest app experience into ChatGPT. If you already use these apps in ChatGPT, reconnect the app to start using the updated experience. Existing sync functionality (Pro users only) for these apps is not affected.
entries.summary_zh: 我們正在 ChatGPT 中推出更新後的 Box、Notion、Linear 和 Dropbox 應用程式。這些更新增加了新的應用程式動作，包括在支援的情況下提供新的寫入功能，並將最新的應用程式體驗帶入 ChatGPT。如果您已經在 ChatGPT 中使用這些應用程式，請重新連接應用程式以開始使用更新後的體驗。…

entries.summary_en: New features Added workspace settings to the app. Added “Don’t ask again” handling and polish for custom MCP approval panels. Added native Windows updater support, including MSIX support, plus a Windows system tray menu so Codex can stay resident after the last window closes. Added app and file @ mentions in the automation composer, surfaced subagent diff stats in the composer, and added artifact cards for generated file citations. A…

entries.summary_en: We’re rolling out ChatGPT in CarPlay, giving you access to a hands-free ChatGPT experience while on-the-go. If you have iOS 26.4 or newer and are connected to a supported car, you can start new voice conversations with ChatGPT directly from the CarPlay interface. You can also resume existing conversations you were having using voice mode in the ChatGPT mobile app. Learn more.
entries.summary_zh: 我們正在 CarPlay 中推出 ChatGPT，讓您在行動中也能體驗免手持的 ChatGPT。如果您擁有 iOS 26.4 或更新版本，並連接到受支援的汽車，即可直接從 CarPlay 介面與 ChatGPT 進行新的語音對話。…

entries.title_zh: ChatGPT Enterprise 新增 Codex 席次
entries.summary_en: OpenAI introduced usage-based Codex-only seats for ChatGPT Enterprise, separate from standard ChatGPT workspace seats.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 為 ChatGPT Enterprise 推出按用量計費的 Codex-only 席次，與標準 ChatGPT 工作區席次分開。

entries.title_zh: Codex model availability update 更新
entries.summary_en: We’re updating model availability for users who sign in with ChatGPT. Starting April 7, the model picker no longer shows gpt-5.2-codex , gpt-5.1-codex-mini , gpt-5.1-codex-max , gpt-5.1-codex , gpt-5.1 , or gpt-5 . On April 14, we’ll remove those models from Codex for ChatGPT sign-in. Users can still choose from gpt-5.4 , gpt-5.4-mini , gpt-5.3-codex , and gpt-5.2 . ChatGPT Pro users can also choose gpt-5.3-codex-spark . To use anoth…

entries.title_en: Outlook shared mailboxes and calendars in ChatGPT
entries.title_zh: ChatGPT 中的 Outlook 共用信箱與行事曆
entries.summary_en: The Outlook Email and Calendar apps for ChatGPT can now help with delegated or shared Outlook resources, when you have access. You can ask ChatGPT to read messages from a shared mailbox, browse its folders, mark mail read or unread, move messages, or send plain-text email from or on behalf of that mailbox. For shared Outlook calendars, ChatGPT can help create, update, RSVP to, cancel, delete, or add small attachments to events.…
entries.summary_zh: 當您擁有存取權時，適用於 ChatGPT 的 Outlook 電子郵件與行事曆應用程式現在可以協助處理受委派或共用的 Outlook 資源。您可以要求 ChatGPT 讀取共用信箱中的郵件、瀏覽其資料夾、將郵件標記為已讀或未讀、移動郵件，或以該信箱的名義傳送純文字電子郵件。…

entries.summary_en: New features Added collapsible inline review comments and inline or detached review modes. Added a Git summary and Sources section in the thread side panel. Added a New Quick Chat command and local video embeds in the app. Performance improvements and bug fixes Preserved thread scroll position per conversation and unread state across windows. Improved review refresh reliability, and fixed dictation loss, right-panel reset, and GitHub…

entries.title_zh: ChatGPT 中的 GPT-5.3 Instant Mini
entries.summary_en: Today, we’re releasing GPT-5.3 Instant Mini in ChatGPT. It replaces GPT-5 Instant Mini as the fallback model users reach after hitting their rate limits for GPT-5.3 Instant. Because it serves as a fallback, it won’t appear in the model picker. Compared with GPT-5 Instant Mini, GPT-5.3 Instant Mini feels more natural in conversation, with stronger writing and contextual awareness throughout chats. It outperforms GPT-5 Instant Mini acr…
entries.summary_zh: 今日，我們在 ChatGPT 中推出 GPT-5.3 Instant Mini。它取代了 GPT-5 Instant Mini，成為使用者在達到 GPT-5.3 Instant 的速率限制後會觸發的備用模型。由於它是作為備用模型，因此不會出現在模型選擇器中。…

entries.title_zh: 新的 Pro 方案選項
entries.summary_en: We’re introducing a new $100/month Pro plan and updating how Codex usage works across Plus and Pro. Pro ($100/month): Built for longer, high-intensity Codex sessions. It includes unlimited access to GPT-5.4, access to GPT-5.4 Pro, and, for a limited time, up to 10x more Codex usage than Plus (up from 5X standard usage allowance). Pro ($200/month): Our highest-usage option remains available and continues on its current Codex promotion…
entries.summary_zh: 我們推出了一項每月 $100 的新 Pro 方案，並更新了 Plus 和 Pro 方案的 Codex 使用方式。Pro（每月 $100）：專為更長、高強度的 Codex 工作階段打造。包含無限存取 GPT-5.4、存取 GPT-5.4 Pro，且在限時內，Codex 的使用量比 Plus 多達 10 倍（從標準使用配額的 5 倍提升）。…

Added collapsible sidebar sections, tray usage-limit surfacing, and a command-palette theme switcher. entries.summary_en: We’re introducing ChatGPT Images 2.0, our new image generation model in ChatGPT. ChatGPT Images 2.0 is available on all ChatGPT plans. We’re also introducing images with thinking. When given more time to think, it can plan and refine image outputs before generating them. Images with thinking is available on all paid ChatGPT plans. It is available when you select Thinking and Pro models.
entries.summary_zh: 我們推出 ChatGPT Images 2.0，這是我們在 ChatGPT 中的新圖像生成模型。ChatGPT Images 2.0 適用於所有 ChatGPT 方案。我們也推出了具備思考能力的圖像功能。當給予更多思考時間時，它可以在生成圖像前規劃並精煉輸出。具備思考能力的圖像功能適用於所有付費 ChatGPT 方案。

entries.title_en: Released GPT Image 2, a state-of-the-art image generation model for image generation and editing.
entries.summary_en: v1/images/generations Released GPT Image 2, a state-of-the-art image generation model for image generation and editing. GPT Image 2 supports flexible image sizes, high-fidelity image inputs, token-based image pricing, and Batch API support with a 50% discount.

entries.summary_en: We’re launching ChatGPT for Clinicians, a free version of ChatGPT for verified clinicians in the United States. It’s designed to support real clinical work at the time of care, including evidence review, documentation, and medical research, with trusted clinical search, citations, reusable skills, deep research across medical literature, and support for earning CME credits on eligible clinical questions. If you already have a ChatGPT…
entries.summary_zh: 我們推出 ChatGPT for Clinicians，這是專為美國已驗證的臨床醫師所提供的免費版 ChatGPT。它旨在支援診療當下的實際臨床工作，包括證據審查、文件記錄與醫學研究，並具備可信的臨床搜尋、引用、可重複使用的技能、跨醫學文獻的深度研究，以及對……的支援。

entries.summary_en: Sometimes, you just want the right answer as quickly as possible. We’re rolling out Fast answers, a quicker way to get responses to common information-seeking questions in ChatGPT, like “Show me the Seven Wonders of the World” or “Which football team has the most super bowl titles?”When your question doesn’t require a personalized response and ChatGPT has a high-confidence answer ready, it can now respond faster while still providing…
entries.summary_zh: 有時您只想盡快獲得正確答案。我們正在推出 Fast answers，這是 ChatGPT 中針對常見資訊尋求問題（如「向我展示世界七大奇景」或「哪支美式足球隊獲得最多超級盃冠軍？」）獲得回應的更快方式。當您的問題不需要個人化回應且 ChatGPT 擁有……時。

entries.title_zh: GPT-5.5 and Codex app updates 更新
entries.summary_en: GPT-5.5 is now available in Codex as OpenAI’s newest frontier model for complex coding, computer use, knowledge work, and research workflows. GPT-5.5 in Codex GPT-5.5 is the recommended choice for most Codex tasks when it appears in your model picker. It’s especially useful for implementation, refactors, debugging, testing, validation, and knowledge-work artifacts. To switch to GPT-5.5: In the CLI, start a new thread with: codex --mo…

Performance improvements and bug fixes Fixed search in long review files so next and previous results reliably jump to off-screen matches. Kept embedded MCP app panels from restarting or losing state during fullscreen changes and thread reloads. Fixed several desktop regressions, including tray crashe…

GPT-5.5 supports a 1M token context window, image input, structured outputs, function calling, prompt caching, Batch, tool search, built-in computer use, hosted shell, apply patch, Skills, MCP, and web search. Key upda…

entries.summary_en: We’re making it easier to choose the right model before you send a message. Model selection now appears in the composer, so you can find and switch models from the same place where you write your prompt. We’re also moving thinking effort controls into the model picker. When you choose a Thinking or Pro model, you can select the level of thinking effort directly from the model picker. This update is available on web to ChatGPT users o…
entries.summary_zh: 我們讓您在發送訊息前能更輕鬆地選擇合適的模型。模型選擇現在顯示於編輯器中，因此您可以在編寫提示詞的同一個位置找到並切換模型。我們也將思考強度控制項移至模型選擇器中。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI introduced an opt-in account setting with stronger protections against unauthorized access to ChatGPT, Codex and sensitive account data.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出選用式帳戶設定，強化 ChatGPT、Codex 與敏感帳戶資料免於未授權存取。

entries.title_zh: ChatGPT 推出進階帳戶安全功能
entries.summary_en: We’re rolling out Advanced Account Security, an optional setting for personal ChatGPT accounts that adds stronger sign-in requirements and stricter account safeguards to help reduce the risk of ATO (account take over), unauthorized access, and data exposure. With Advanced Account Security enabled, ChatGPT uses stronger sign-in methods like passkeys or compatible security keys and turns off weaker paths like password sign-in, email/SM…
entries.summary_zh: 我們正在推出進階帳戶安全功能，這是個人 ChatGPT 帳戶的選用設定，增加更強的登入要求與更嚴格的帳戶保護措施，以協助降低 ATO（帳戶接管）、未經授權的存取與資料外洩風險。

entries.title_en: ChatGPT for Excel and Google Sheets
entries.title_zh: 推出 ChatGPT for Excel 與 Google Sheets
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT for Excel and Google Sheets is now available globally, bringing ChatGPT into a sidebar in Microsoft Excel and Google Sheets so you can build, update, and understand spreadsheets in place. It can help with trackers, budgets, formulas, multi-tab files, scenario work, and spreadsheet cleanup, and supports Skills and apps where available. Free and Go include limited usage; Plus and Pro use the same agentic usage limits as Codex.…
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT for Excel 與 Google Sheets 現已全球發布，將 ChatGPT 帶入 Microsoft Excel 與 Google Sheets 的側邊欄中，讓您能直接建立、更新與理解試算表。它能協助處理追蹤器、預算、公式、多分頁檔案、情境工作與試算表清理，並支援可用地區的技能與應用程式。

entries.summary_en: New features Added dictation cleanup plus a configurable dictation dictionary for names, file paths, and code symbols. Added zoom and download controls to the image lightbox. Performance improvements and bug fixes Improved voice and dictation error messages for microphone, connection, and quota failures. Fixed in-app browser comment markers so they stay aligned across scrolling, zoom, and responsive layout changes. Made pull request…

entries.title_zh: Create Codex access tokens 更新
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT Enterprise workspace owners and admins can allow permitted members to create Codex access tokens for trusted, non-interactive Codex local workflows. Members can use access tokens to run Codex from scripts, schedulers, and private CI runners with their ChatGPT workspace identity. Learn more in Access tokens .

entries.summary_en: We’re rolling out GPT-5.5 Instant as ChatGPT’s new default model. It replaces GPT-5.3 Instant for all ChatGPT users and improves everyday answers across accuracy, clarity and conciseness, image understanding, STEM questions, and when ChatGPT decides to search the web. GPT-5.5 Instant is more factually reliable, especially for prompts where accuracy matters most. It also gives tighter, more direct answers without losing useful details…
entries.summary_zh: 我們正在將 GPT-5.5 Instant 推出為 ChatGPT 的新預設模型。它取代了所有 ChatGPT 用戶的 GPT-5.3 Instant，並提升日常回答的準確度、清晰度、簡潔度、圖像理解能力、STEM 問題以及 ChatGPT 決定搜尋網路時的表現。

entries.title_en: Memory sources and more personalized responses in ChatGPT
entries.title_zh: ChatGPT 的記憶來源與更個人化的回應
entries.summary_en: Starting today, we’re rolling out memory improvements to ChatGPT Plus and Pro users that make responses more personalized, useful, and continuous over time. ChatGPT can now better pull in relevant context from your past chats, saved memories, and, where available, files and connected Gmail app, to offer more tailored ideas, recommendations, and next steps. It is also faster at searching past conversations to find the right context, s…
entries.summary_zh: 即日起，我們針對 ChatGPT Plus 與 Pro 使用者推出記憶功能優化，使回應更個人化、更有用且具持續性。ChatGPT 現在能更有效地從過往對話、已儲存的記憶，以及可用的檔案與已連結的 Gmail 應用程式中提取相關背景資訊，以提供更客製化的觀點、建議與後續步驟。

entries.summary_en: Over the coming weeks, we'll be rolling out trusted contact, an optional safety feature for adults with personal ChatGPT accounts. Trusted contact in ChatGPT helps you connect with a person you trust if you need additional support. You may choose your trusted contact in settings, and ChatGPT will send them an invitation to participate. Once they accept, if automated systems and trained reviewers detect you may be talking about suicid…
entries.summary_zh: 未來幾週內，我們將推出「信任聯絡人」功能，這是針對擁有個人 ChatGPT 帳戶的成人使用者所提供的選擇性安全功能。若您需要額外支援，ChatGPT 的「信任聯絡人」能協助您與信任的人聯繫。您可在設定中選擇您的信任聯絡人，ChatGPT 將會發送參與邀請給對方。

entries.title_zh: 免費版使用者的答案中顯示更多圖片
entries.summary_en: Free users in ChatGPT will now see more inline images from the web to help make visual topics easier to understand, including well-known people, places, and products. When visuals can add clarity, images may appear alongside relevant parts of an answer. You can click any image to view it at its original size and see source attribution. This is rolling out globally on web and iOS to Free users for responses using 5.5-Instant.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT 的免費版使用者現在會在答案中看到更多來自網路的內嵌圖片，這有助於讓視覺主題更容易理解，包括知名人物、地點與產品。當視覺內容能增加清晰度時，圖片可能會出現在答案的相關部分旁。您可以點擊任何圖片以原始大小檢視，並查看來源標註。

entries.title_en: Codex remote access from the ChatGPT mobile app
entries.title_zh: 透過 ChatGPT 行動應用程式遠端存取 Codex
entries.summary_en: Codex is now available in preview in the ChatGPT mobile app, so you can stay connected to active work from your phone while Codex continues running on the connected Mac host. From mobile, you can start or continue threads, answer questions, change direction, approve actions, review what Codex found, and move across connected hosts without stepping away from the work. That means you can keep an investigation moving, make a decision wh…
entries.summary_zh: Codex 現已在 ChatGPT 行動應用程式中提供預覽版，讓您在手機上也能保持與進行中的工作連結，同時 Codex 會持續在已連結的 Mac 主機上執行。

entries.title_en: File library expands to Free and Go users, with storage management
entries.title_zh: 檔案庫擴展至 Free 與 Go 使用者，並新增儲存空間管理功能
entries.summary_en: File library is expanding to Free and Go users, including to users in the European Economic Area (EEA) making it easier to find, reuse, and build on files you upload or create in ChatGPT. You can add recent files from the composer, browse saved files in Library, and ask ChatGPT about files you’ve used before, like “What should I know about the document I uploaded yesterday?”We’re also introducing storage management across plans. Stor…
entries.summary_zh: 檔案庫功能擴展至 Free 與 Go 使用者（包含歐洲經濟區 (EEA) 的使用者），讓您更輕鬆地尋找、重複使用及建立您在 ChatGPT 中上傳或產生的檔案。

entries.summary_en: You can now use Codex from the ChatGPT mobile app by connecting it to a Mac running the Codex app. Codex runs from the connected host, so the same projects, files, credentials, plugins, skills, and configuration are available from your phone. See Remote connections for mobile setup, choosing a host, what comes from the connected machine, and SSH hosts. This launch also includes Hooks general availability, Codex access tokens for trus…
entries.summary_zh: Codex Changelog 在 2026-05-14 記錄了Codex 編碼代理、企業管理控制相關更新；完整版本與修正內容見官方英文摘要。

entries.summary_en: We’re starting to roll out a new personal finance experience in ChatGPT. Pro users in the United States can securely connect supported financial accounts, see a dashboard of where their money is going, and ask questions grounded in their financial context. Available on web and iOS, Finances lets you view spending, bills, subscriptions, net worth, and investment information in one place. You can ask questions directly in ChatGPT or us…
entries.summary_zh: 我們開始在 ChatGPT 中推出全新的個人理財體驗。美國的 Pro 使用者可以安全地連結支援的財務帳戶，查看資金流向儀表板，並根據其財務背景提問。

entries.summary_en: New features Added support for opening completed Codex tasks directly from iOS notifications. Added the ability to open changed files directly while reviewing a task. Improvements and bug fixes Improved task resume, reconnection, and foreground reliability. Improved task progress updates, code review, and message composition.
entries.summary_zh: Codex Changelog 在 2026-05-18 記錄了Codex 編碼代理、可靠性與效能修正相關更新；完整版本與修正內容見官方英文摘要。

entries.title_en: Released Secure MCP Tunnel for enterprise customers.
entries.title_zh: 發布Secure MCP Tunnel for enterprise customers.
entries.summary_en: Released Secure MCP Tunnel for enterprise customers. Secure MCP Tunnel lets supported OpenAI products including ChatGPT web, Codex, Responses API, and AgentKit connect to private or on-prem MCP servers through a customer-hosted tunnel-client without exposing those servers to the public internet.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-05-19 為 Codex 推出新產品或能力；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: Released Secure MCP Tunnel for enterprise customers.
entries.title_zh: 推出企業版 Secure MCP Tunnel
entries.summary_en: Released Secure MCP Tunnel for enterprise customers. Secure MCP Tunnel lets supported OpenAI products including ChatGPT web, Codex, Responses API, and AgentKit connect to private or on-prem MCP servers through a customer-hosted tunnel-client without exposing those servers to the public internet.
entries.summary_zh: 推出企業版 Secure MCP Tunnel。OpenAI 將此列為 2026-05-19 的功能；重點涉及Codex 編碼代理、代理與工具調用，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.title_en: You can now manage multiple IP allowlists and apply each one at the project level or across the whole organization.
entries.summary_en: You can now manage multiple IP allowlists and apply each one at the project level or across the whole organization. To configure them, go to Settings Security IP allowlist.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-05-19 為 ChatGPT Projects 更新安全與治理機制；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: You can now manage multiple IP allowlists and apply each one at the project level or across the whole organization.
entries.summary_en: You can now manage multiple IP allowlists and apply each one at the project level or across the whole organization. To configure them, go to Settings Security IP allowlist .
entries.summary_zh: API 更新：You can now manage multiple IP allowlists and apply each one at project level or across whole organization。OpenAI 將此列為 2026-05-19 的更新；重點涉及安全與治理、企業管理控制，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.title_zh: macOS 版 Codex 的 Appshots 功能
entries.summary_en: Appshots let macOS users attach an app window to a Codex task with a screenshot and available text so Codex can understand the visible work context.
entries.summary_zh: Appshots 讓 macOS 使用者能透過螢幕截圖與可用文字，將應用程式視窗附加至 Codex 任務中，以便 Codex 理解可見的工作背景。

entries.title_zh: Appshots, goal mode, and more 26.519 更新
entries.summary_en: Appshots are now available in the Codex app on macOS. Press both Command keys to send the frontmost app window to Codex with a screenshot and available text, so Codex can work from context in another app without you copying, pasting, or describing it manually. This launch also includes: Goal mode is no longer an experimental feature and is available in the Codex app, IDE extension, and CLI. With Goal mode, you can have Codex drive to…
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-05-21 為 Codex 推出新產品或能力；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: Codex Browser added advanced annotations, faster asset extraction, read-only JavaScript context, improved tab grouping, less extension clutter, and reliability fixes.
entries.summary_zh: Codex 瀏覽器新增了進階註解、更快的資產提取、唯讀 JavaScript 背景、改進的標籤頁分組、減少擴充功能雜亂，並修復了穩定性問題。

entries.title_en: Codex updates: richer context, goal mode, browser improvements, and remote locked use
entries.title_zh: 開放使用：Codex updates: richer context, goal mode, browser improvements, and remote locked use
entries.summary_en: Codex now has more ways to understand your work context and keep longer tasks moving: Appshots in the Codex app on macOS let you attach an app window to a Codex thread with a hotkey, including a screenshot and available text, so Codex can understand what you are looking at without a long setup prompt.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-05-21 為 Codex 擴大開放範圍；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: Goal mode is generally available in Codex
entries.title_zh: 目標模式在 Codex 中全面開放
entries.summary_en: Goal mode became generally available in the Codex app, IDE extension, and CLI for outcome-driven work with explicit success criteria.
entries.summary_zh: 目標模式現已在 Codex 應用程式、IDE 擴充功能及 CLI 中全面開放，用於執行具有明確成功標準且以成果為導向的工作。

entries.title_zh: Codex 的應用程式內瀏覽器註解
entries.summary_en: Codex added more precise in-app browser annotations for styling feedback on browser-based and frontend work.
entries.summary_zh: Codex 新增了更精確的應用程式內瀏覽器註解，以針對基於瀏覽器與前端的工作提供樣式反饋。

entries.title_zh: Codex 鎖定電腦使用功能
entries.summary_en: Eligible macOS Computer Use users can keep Codex working remotely after the Mac locks, within existing regional constraints.
entries.summary_zh: 符合資格的 macOS Computer Use 使用者可以在 Mac 鎖定後，於現有區域限制內繼續遠端執行 Codex 工作。

entries.summary_en: Workspace agents reached general availability for ChatGPT Business, Enterprise and Edu with action safeguards, admin activity visibility and shared workflows.
entries.summary_zh: Workspace Agents 向 ChatGPT Business、Enterprise 與 Edu 正式 GA，加入動作防護、管理員活動可視性與可分享流程。

entries.summary_en: New features Added Spotlight and Shortcuts support for opening Codex Mobile directly. Added browsing for archived Codex threads. Added /side for opening a side conversation. Added options to save or copy rendered images. Improvements and bug fixes Improved iPad keyboard shortcuts. Improved setup and relaunch reliability. Fixed issues with task progress, loading archived threads, previewing code changes, and switching hosts.
entries.summary_zh: Codex Changelog 在 2026-05-25 記錄了Codex 編碼代理、圖像與影片、可靠性與效能修正相關更新；完整版本與修正內容見官方英文摘要。

entries.title_en: Added new Admin API capabilities for managing spend alerts
entries.summary_en: Added new Admin API capabilities for managing spend alerts, model allowlists, data retention settings, and hosted tool permissions, plus querying granular billing line items.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-05-26 為 OpenAI API 調整方案、額度或計費；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: Added new Admin API capabilities for managing spend alerts
entries.summary_en: Added new Admin API capabilities for managing spend alerts, model allowlists, data retention settings, and hosted tool permissions, plus querying granular billing line items.
entries.summary_zh: 新增：全新 Admin API capabilities for managing spend alerts, 模型 allowlists, data retention settings, and hosted tool permissions, plus querying granular billing line items。OpenAI 將此列為 2026-05-26 的更新；重點涉及代理與工具調用、企業管理控制、定價與用量，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.summary_en: GPT-5.3-Codex and GPT-5.2 are now deprecated as user-selectable models in Codex for users signed in with ChatGPT. API-key workflows aren’t affected. Use a current Codex model, such as GPT-5.5, GPT-5.4, or GPT-5.4 mini. See Codex models for model availability and Codex pricing for credit rates.
entries.summary_zh: Codex Changelog 在 2026-05-26 記錄了棄用與遷移、Codex 編碼代理、定價與用量相關更新；完整版本與修正內容見官方英文摘要。

entries.summary_en: Fixes & improvements ChatGPT now reads MCP server instructions returned during initialization and uses them alongside tool metadata to understand cross-tool workflows, constraints, and server-wide guidance.
entries.summary_zh: Apps SDK Changelog 在 2026-05-26 記錄了代理與工具調用、可靠性與效能修正相關更新；完整版本與修正內容見官方英文摘要。

entries.summary_en: Released workload identity federation. Trusted workloads can exchange externally issued identity tokens for short-lived OpenAI access tokens without storing long-lived API keys.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-05-26 為 OpenAI API 推出新產品或能力；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_zh: 推出工作負載身分聯邦
entries.summary_en: Released workload identity federation . Trusted workloads can exchange externally issued identity tokens for short-lived OpenAI access tokens without storing long-lived API keys.
entries.summary_zh: 推出工作負載身分聯邦。OpenAI 將此列為 2026-05-26 的功能；重點涉及平台功能與可用性，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.title_zh: MCP Apps tool lifecycle updates 更新
entries.summary_en: Fixes & improvements window.openai.toolResponseMetadata now preserves the canonical MCP tool result envelope, including hidden meta , when ChatGPT launches widgets. For tools that need user approval, ChatGPT now delivers widget tool input through the MCP Apps ui/notifications/tool-input lifecycle after approval instead of preloading it into the initial widget globals.
entries.summary_zh: Apps SDK Changelog 在 2026-05-27 記錄了代理與工具調用、可靠性與效能修正相關更新；完整版本與修正內容見官方英文摘要。

entries.title_en: Canvas removed from GPT-5.5 Instant and Thinking
entries.title_zh: Canvas 自 GPT-5.5 Instant 與 Thinking 中移除
entries.summary_en: Canvas stopped being available in GPT-5.5 Instant and GPT-5.5 Thinking as writing and coding blocks moved those workflows into chat; paid users retained temporary legacy-model access.
entries.summary_zh: 由於寫作與程式碼區塊將這些工作流程移至聊天中，Canvas 不再支援 GPT-5.5 Instant 與 GPT-5.5 Thinking；付費使用者仍可暫時存取舊版模型。

entries.summary_en: We’re updating GPT-5.5 Instant in ChatGPT and the API to improve response style and quality. It’s now easier to read, more natural in everyday conversations, and better paced in practical help tasks, with fewer overly long or bullet-heavy responses. With this update, canvas will no longer be available in GPT-5.5 Instant or GPT-5.5 Thinking. Writing and coding functionality is now supported directly in chat responses through writing b…
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 更新了 ChatGPT 與 API 中的 GPT-5.5 Instant，提供更自然、易讀且節奏更好的實用回應，減少輸出過長或過多項目符號的情況。

entries.summary_en: We’re updating GPT-5.5 Instant in ChatGPT and the API to improve response style and quality. It’s now easier to read, more natural in everyday conversations, and better paced in practical help tasks, with fewer overly long or bullet-heavy responses. With this update, canvas will no longer be available in GPT-5.5 Instant or GPT-5.5 Thinking. Writing and coding functionality is now supported directly in chat responses through writing b…
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-05-28 為 GPT-5.5 擴大開放範圍；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_zh: MCP Apps host style variables 更新
entries.summary_en: Fixes & improvements ChatGPT now provides standardized MCP Apps host CSS variables through hostContext.styles.variables during initialization and updates them through ui/notifications/host-context-changed when the host theme changes, helping apps match ChatGPT’s light and dark appearance without hardcoded host-specific colors.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-05-28 為 Apps SDK 更新開發者平台；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: Released chat-latest snapshot which points to the latest Instant model currently used in ChatGPT.
entries.summary_en: Released chat-latest snapshot which points to the latest Instant model currently used in ChatGPT. We recommend leveraging GPT-5.5 for production API usage, but feel free to use this model to test the latest improvements for chat use cases. The underlying model snapshot will be regularly updated. Read more here.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-05-28 為 GPT-5.5 發布模型；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_zh: 退役 OpenAI o3 與 GPT-4.5
entries.summary_en: Today, we’re continuing to retire older models with limited usage in ChatGPT so we can better serve our newer, most capable models. OpenAI o3 will be retired from ChatGPT on August 26, 2026 following a 90-day sunset period, and GPT-4.5 will be retired from ChatGPT on June 26, 2026 following a 30-day sunset period. These models are currently available to paid users only via model settings. These changes apply to ChatGPT only; there ar…
entries.summary_zh: 今日，我們持續退役 ChatGPT 中使用率較低的舊模型，以便更完善地服務較新且能力最強的模型。OpenAI o3 將在 90 天停止服務期後，於 2026 年 8 月 26 日自 ChatGPT 退役；GPT-4.5 則將在 30 天停止服務期後，於 2026 年 6 月 26 日自 ChatGPT 退役。

entries.summary_en: Today, we’re continuing to retire older models with limited usage in ChatGPT so we can better serve our newer, most capable models. OpenAI o3 will be retired from ChatGPT on August 26, 2026 following a 90-day sunset period, and GPT-4.5 will be retired from ChatGPT on June 27, 2026 following a 30-day sunset period. These models are currently available to paid users only via model settings. These changes apply to ChatGPT only; there ar…
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-05-28 為 GPT-4.5 完成退役或停止服務；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: Codex Computer Use and Remote Control on Windows
entries.title_zh: Codex Windows Computer Use 與遠端控制
entries.summary_en: Codex added Windows Computer Use and remote control from ChatGPT mobile or Codex on Mac, with Enterprise availability initially disabled and enrollment-gated.
entries.summary_zh: Codex 新增 Windows Computer Use，以及從 ChatGPT mobile 或 Mac 上 Codex 遠端控制；Enterprise 初期預設關閉且需加入早期存取。

entries.title_en: Codex updates: Computer use and remote control for Windows, usage profiles
entries.summary_en: Codex now supports Computer Use on Windows in the Codex app, so eligible users can ask Codex to see, click, and type in Windows applications while they test, debug, and refine what they are building. Users can start work on a Windows machine and use ChatGPT on iOS or Android, or Codex on Mac, to check progress, continue the thread, respond to prompts, and steer work while away from the desk; the Windows machine remains the host for p…
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-05-29 為 Codex 更新模型或體驗；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: Computer use and mobile access on Windows 26.527
entries.summary_en: New features Computer Use now works on Windows. Codex can operate Windows desktop apps by seeing, clicking, and typing in the foreground while it works. Remote control now supports Windows devices. You can start Codex work on a Windows device from ChatGPT on iOS or Android, or from a Mac running Codex, and check its progress remotely. The Profile section now shows your profile details, usage stats, and token activity. Added thread co…
entries.summary_zh: Codex Changelog 在 2026-05-29 記錄了Codex 編碼代理、代理與工具調用、可靠性與效能修正相關更新；完整版本與修正內容見官方英文摘要。

entries.title_en: Computer Use for Codex on Windows
entries.title_zh: Windows 上的 Codex 電腦使用功能
entries.summary_en: Eligible Codex app users can ask Codex to see, click, and type in Windows applications while testing, debugging, and refining software.
entries.summary_zh: 符合資格的 Codex 應用程式使用者可以要求 Codex 在測試、除錯與優化軟體時，檢視、點擊並輸入 Windows 應用程式。

entries.title_en: For organizations without ZDR enabled, promptcacheretention now defaults to 24h instead of inmemory
entries.summary_en: For organizations without ZDR enabled, promptcacheretention now defaults to 24h instead of inmemory , enabling extended prompt caching by default. Learn more .
entries.summary_zh: API 更新：For organizations without ZDR enabled, promptcacheretention now defaults to 24h instead of inmemory , enabling extended prompt caching by default。OpenAI 將此列為 2026-05-29 的更新；重點涉及平台功能與可用性，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.title_en: Remote control for Codex on Windows
entries.title_zh: Windows 上 Codex 的遠端控制
entries.summary_en: Users can steer Codex work running on a Windows host from ChatGPT mobile or Codex on Mac while project files and local context remain on the host.
entries.summary_zh: 使用者可透過 ChatGPT 行動版或 Mac 上的 Codex，操控執行於 Windows 主機上的 Codex 工作，同時專案檔案與本機上下文仍保留在該主機上。

entries.summary_en: Codex added usage profiles to help users understand and manage how work consumes included plan capacity.
entries.summary_zh: Codex 新增了使用設定檔，協助使用者了解並管理工作如何消耗包含的方案容量。

entries.title_en: v1/chat/completions For organizations without ZDR enabled, promptcacheretention now defaults to 24h instead of inmemory
entries.summary_en: v1/chat/completions For organizations without ZDR enabled, promptcacheretention now defaults to 24h instead of inmemory, enabling extended prompt caching by default. Learn more.

entries.title_en: Find live jobs and format your resume in ChatGPT
entries.title_zh: 在 ChatGPT 中尋找即時職缺並格式化您的履歷
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT can now help with more of the job search process, from finding relevant live roles to tailoring a resume for a specific opportunity. When you search for jobs, ChatGPT can surface live listings and freelance opportunities from sources like Indeed, Upwork, Appcast, and across the web. Results are personalized using your experience, skills, and goals to highlight roles that may be a strong fit. You can follow links to apply dire…
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT 現在可以協助處理更多求職流程，從尋找相關的即時職位到針對特定機會量身打造履歷。當您搜尋工作時，ChatGPT 可以從 Indeed、Upwork、Appcast 及網路各處列出即時職缺與自由接案機會。

entries.title_en: OpenAI models are now available in Amazon Bedrock through an OpenAI-compatible Responses API endpoint.
entries.summary_en: OpenAI models are now available in Amazon Bedrock through an OpenAI-compatible Responses API endpoint. Supported models and features vary by AWS Region. Learn more.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-06-01 為 Responses API 擴大開放範圍；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_zh: OpenAI 模型透過相容 Responses API 登上 Amazon Bedrock
entries.summary_en: OpenAI models are now available in Amazon Bedrock through an OpenAI-compatible Responses API endpoint. Supported models and features vary by AWS Region. Learn more .
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 模型透過相容 Responses API 登上 Amazon Bedrock。OpenAI 將此列為 2026-06-01 的功能；重點涉及代理與工具調用，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.summary_en: New features Added Default terminal location in General settings . When the bottom panel is enabled, choose whether the terminal shortcut and environment actions open terminal tabs in the bottom panel or the right panel. Performance improvements and bug fixes Additional performance improvements and bug fixes.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-06-01 為 ChatGPT 新增功能；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_zh: Use Codex with Amazon Bedrock 更新
entries.summary_en: Codex can now use supported OpenAI models available through Amazon Bedrock. Configure Amazon Bedrock as your model provider to run Codex locally with AWS-managed authentication, account controls, and billing.
entries.summary_zh: Codex Changelog 在 2026-06-01 記錄了Codex 編碼代理、定價與用量相關更新；完整版本與修正內容見官方英文摘要。

entries.title_zh: 主動帳號工作階段控制
entries.summary_en: We’re rolling out Active sessions, a new security feature in ChatGPT that helps users review sessions associated with their account and sign out of sessions they don’t recognize. Users can now: Review first-party OpenAI sessions from Settings Security Active sessions, with available details such as device, app, approximate location, sign-in time, trusted-device status, and whether it is the current session Log out of individual sessi…
entries.summary_zh: 我們正推出「主動工作階段」(Active sessions)，這是 ChatGPT 的一項新安全功能，協助使用者檢視與其帳號相關聯的工作階段，並登出未識別的工作階段。

entries.title_en: Build and deploy websites with Sites
entries.title_zh: 建置並部署 websites with Sites
entries.summary_en: Sites is now available in preview in the Codex app. Use the Sites plugin to create, save, deploy, and inspect websites, dashboards, internal tools, web apps, and games hosted by OpenAI. Open Sites in the app sidebar to return to your projects and manage hosted environment variables and secrets. ChatGPT Business workspaces include Sites by default. ChatGPT Enterprise admins can enable Sites for the appropriate roles through role-based…

entries.summary_en: New features Added an optional Face ID or passcode lock for Codex. Added a new settings screen for choosing Queue or Steer as the default follow-up behavior and toggling line wrapping for code diffs. Added support for connecting to Windows machines over SSH. Improvements and bug fixes Added support for /side to start a side conversation with an initial question. Improved follow-up prompts, the Codex home screen, and viewing changed f…

entries.title_en: ChatGPT Sites preview and role-specific Codex plugins
entries.title_zh: ChatGPT Sites 預覽與角色型 Codex Plugins
entries.summary_en: Enterprise and Edu received a preview of workspace-internal ChatGPT Sites plus role-specific Codex plugins and a wider plugin catalog under workspace controls.
entries.summary_zh: Enterprise 與 Edu 獲得工作區內部 ChatGPT Sites 預覽、角色型 Codex plugins 與受控的更大 plugin 目錄。

entries.title_zh: 淘汰通知：GPT Image model deprecations

entries.summary_en: Starting June 2, 2026, eligible container sessions will be billed per minute with a 5-minute minimum, instead of being billed at the full 20-minute session rate. The underlying per-minute rate will remain the same. This update is intended to make billing more granular for shorter sessions and will lower effective cost for customers.

entries.summary_en: Starting June 2, 2026, eligible container sessions will be billed per minute with a 5-minute minimum, instead of being billed at the full 20-minute session rate. The underlying per-minute rate will remain the same. This update is intended to make billing more granular for shorter sessions and will lower effective cost for customers. You can find current built-in tool pricing in our API pricing docs .

entries.title_en: Added moderation scores to the Responses API and Chat Completions API.
entries.title_zh: Responses 與 Chat Completions 新增內容審核分數
entries.summary_en: Added moderation scores to the Responses API and Chat Completions API. Pass a moderation object in a generation request to receive moderation results for both the model input and generated output in the same response. Learn more in the Moderation guide .
entries.summary_zh: Responses 與 Chat Completions 新增內容審核分數。OpenAI 將此列為 2026-06-04 的功能；重點涉及安全與治理、代理與工具調用，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.summary_en: New features Added activity insights and share cards to the Profile section . You can review Codex usage highlights and save a profile card; sharing is available on consumer ChatGPT plans. Performance improvements and bug fixes Improved Computer Use startup readiness and appshot error reporting. Fixed browser and review UI issues, including fullscreen browser composer controls, hex color swatches, terminal scrollbar alignment, and an…
entries.summary_zh: Codex Changelog 在 2026-06-04 記錄了Codex 編碼代理、可靠性與效能修正相關更新；完整版本與修正內容見官方英文摘要。

entries.title_en: Lockdown Mode is now available to all logged-in users
entries.title_zh: 鎖定模式現已開放給所有登入使用者
entries.summary_en: Lockdown Mode is now available to all logged-in users across account types and workspaces. It is an optional opt-in advanced security setting that limits access to the web and external services to help reduce the risk of data exfiltration from prompt injection attacks. When Lockdown Mode is on, ChatGPT restricts network-enabled capabilities such as live web browsing, deep research, agent mode, file downloads, and some web-derived ima…
entries.summary_zh: 鎖定模式 (Lockdown Mode) 現已開放給各類帳號與工作空間的所有登入使用者。這是一項可選用的進階安全設定，會限制對網路與外部服務的存取，以降低提示詞注入攻擊導致資料外洩的風險。

entries.title_en: Memory that stays more up to date
entries.title_zh: 記憶功能保持更即時的更新
entries.summary_en: We’ve upgraded memory so ChatGPT can better keep your context up to date, helping responses stay more relevant. This makes memory more useful by reducing stale or contradictory saved memories and helps ChatGPT better understand your preferences, goals, and ongoing work. You can review the memories that ChatGPT may use to personalize responses through sources or in your memory summary.…
entries.summary_zh: 我們升級了記憶功能，讓 ChatGPT 能更即時地更新您的背景資訊，有助於讓回應保持更相關。此舉減少了過時或相互矛盾的儲存記憶，使記憶功能更實用，並協助 ChatGPT 更瞭解您的偏好、目標與進行中的工作。

entries.summary_en: We're beginning to roll out ads for users on Free and Go plans in the UK. Plus, Pro, Business, Enterprise, and Education plans will remain ad-free.

entries.title_zh: Enterprise 工作區 Plugin 分享
entries.summary_en: Eligible ChatGPT Enterprise workspaces could share local Codex plugins with workspace members; admins could disable sharing through managed configuration.
entries.summary_zh: 符合資格的 ChatGPT Enterprise 可向成員分享本機 Codex plugins，管理員可透過受管設定停用。

entries.title_zh: 模型更新：ChatGPT app experience updates

entries.title_zh: 連接 App 權限控制
entries.summary_en: Workspace admins could choose when ChatGPT asks before connected-app use, with workspace and per-app defaults such as Always ask, Any changes and Important actions.

entries.summary_en: ChatGPT writing blocks gained a full-screen editing view for longer drafting and revision work.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT 寫作區塊新增了全螢幕編輯檢視，方便進行更長的草稿編寫與修改工作。

entries.title_zh: ChatGPT 回答中的互動式圖表
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT can turn some answers into interactive bar, line, pie, and scatter charts directly in a conversation.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT 可將部分回答直接轉換為對話中的互動式長條圖、折線圖、圓餅圖與散佈圖。

entries.title_en: Table of contents for long answers
entries.summary_en: Long ChatGPT answers gained a navigable table of contents for faster movement between sections.
entries.summary_zh: 長篇 ChatGPT 回答新增了可導覽的目錄，以便在各章節間快速移動。

The model picker now has the following simplified options: Instant Medium High Extra High [Pro plans only] Pro Standard [Pro plans only] Pro Extended [Pro plans only] On iOS and Android, you can find the picker at the top of the conversation. On web, it appears directly in the message composer. Users ha…

It gives Codex controlled Chrome DevTools Protocol (CDP) access for…

entries.summary_zh: Codex 新增了用於 AGENTS.md 架構的 /init 指令、可自訂的 macOS Dock 圖示、未讀對話區塊，以及更清晰的使用限制錯誤訊息。

entries.summary_en: We’ve made several Codex updates, including: Eligible Plus and Pro users now have rate-limit reset banking, including one free reset at launch and the ability to send referral invitations form within the Codex app. When an eligible recipient sends their first Codex message, both people receive a banked rate-limit reset. Banked resets are usable for 30 days after they are granted. Learn more in Invite friends and coworkers and review…
