entries.title_zh: 記憶摘要的額外控制功能
entries.summary_en: You can now delete the memories shown on your memory summary page and turn memory off by selecting “Delete and turn off memory” from the three-dot menu. This does not delete your past chats. If you turn memory back on later, ChatGPT may create new memories from chats that remain in your chat history. This control is available to all ChatGPT users on the web and rolling out on mobile soon. To make changes to your memory summary, you c…
entries.summary_zh: 您現在可以刪除記憶摘要頁面上顯示的記憶，並透過三點選單選擇「刪除並關閉記憶」來關閉記憶功能。這不會刪除您過去的對話。如果您稍後重新開啟記憶功能，ChatGPT 可能會根據仍保留在對話記錄中的內容建立新的記憶。

entries.title_zh: App permission controls in ChatGPT 更新
entries.summary_en: Fixes & improvements ChatGPT users can now choose when connected apps ask for permission: always, before making changes, or only before important changes. Personal accounts can set global and per-app preferences, while Business and Enterprise admins control workspace and per-app defaults.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-06-12 為 ChatGPT Enterprise & Edu 更新模型或體驗；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: As of June 12, 2026, GPT-5.2 models are no longer available in ChatGPT. This applies to GPT-5.2 Instant, GPT-5.2 Thinking, and GPT-5.2 Pro. Existing conversations that used GPT-5.2 will automatically continue on the corresponding GPT-5.5 model. GPT-5.5 models remain available in ChatGPT. This retirement was previously announced with the release of GPT-5.3 Instant. Models will generally remain available in ChatGPT for 90 days after a…
entries.summary_zh: 自 2026 年 6 月 12 日起，GPT-5.2 模型不再於 ChatGPT 中提供。這適用於 GPT-5.2 Instant、GPT-5.2 Thinking 以及 GPT-5.2 Pro。使用過 GPT-5.2 的現有對話將自動在對應的 GPT-5.5 模型上繼續。GPT-5.5 模型仍可在 ChatGPT 中使用。

entries.summary_en: New features Added a workspace file browser for previewing files and linking workspace paths into prompts. Added a directory picker for choosing a workspace folder when starting a new thread. Added controls to expand or collapse all diffs while reviewing changed files. Added MCP approval choices for allowing requested actions in the current chat or across chats. Added LaTeX rendering in Codex messages and plans. Improvements and bug…
entries.summary_zh: Codex Changelog 在 2026-06-15 記錄了Codex 編碼代理、代理與工具調用、可靠性與效能修正相關更新；完整版本與修正內容見官方英文摘要。

entries.title_en: Codex app features are available in the EEA, UK, and Switzerland
entries.summary_en: More Codex app capabilities are rolling out to users in the European Economic Area, the United Kingdom, and Switzerland: Computer Use is available on macOS and Windows in these regions, so Codex can operate desktop apps by seeing, clicking, and typing. The Codex Chrome extension is available for browser tasks that need signed-in Chrome context, working across tabs in the background without taking over your browser. Memories can remem…
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-06-16 為 Codex 擴大開放範圍；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: Edu members without a data-residency configuration could export workspace data when the admin-enabled export setting was on.
entries.summary_zh: 未設定資料落地的 Edu 工作區，可由管理員開啟資料匯出，讓成員匯出工作區資料。

entries.summary_en: With scheduled tasks, users can ask ChatGPT to send reminders, handle recurring work, or monitor things for them. This update makes tasks easier to find and manage, faster and more reliable, with more useful notifications. A new Scheduled page, discoverable in the sidebar, gives users one place to view active tasks, see when they’ll run next, and pause, resume, edit, or delete them.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-06-17 為 ChatGPT Enterprise & Edu 更新模型或體驗；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_zh: ChatGPT 中的排程任務管理
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT added a Scheduled page for creating and managing reminders, recurring work, and monitoring tasks; monitoring can search the web and connected apps and notify users when something material changes.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT 新增了「排程」頁面，用於建立和管理提醒、週期性工作與監控任務；監控任務可以搜尋網路及連接的應用程式，並在發生實質變更時通知使用者。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI announced that Pulse would be sunset as proactive updates move into Scheduled Tasks; Pro users retained access for 14 days from the June 17 notice.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 宣佈 Pulse 將會終止，因為主動更新功能已移至排程任務中；Pro 使用者在 6 月 17 日通知發出後，仍保留 14 天的存取權。

entries.title_en: Android composer and tools menu update
entries.title_zh: Android 撰寫器與工具選單更新
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT for Android added inline mentions and an updated tools menu for Plugins.
entries.summary_zh: Android 版 ChatGPT 新增了行內提及功能，並更新了外掛程式的工具選單。

entries.summary_en: Users can choose whether ChatGPT always asks before using connected apps, asks before changes, or asks only before important changes.
entries.summary_zh: 使用者可以選擇 ChatGPT 在使用連接的應用程式前，是總是詢問、在變更前詢問，還是僅在重要變更前詢問。

entries.title_zh: 模型更新：ChatGPT app experience updates
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT now has more ways to help with common questions, from pronunciation guidance to World Cup updates. It’s also smoother to use, with easier chat organization and sharing, more control over connected apps, and faster photo uploads on iOS, and more. Web, iOS, and Android
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-06-18 為 ChatGPT 更新模型或體驗；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: New features Added Record & Replay , a macOS feature that turns a demonstrated workflow into a reusable skill. Initial availability excludes the European Economic Area, the United Kingdom, and Switzerland. You or your administrator must also enable Computer Use. Added bulk actions to automation run history so you can mark every run as read or archive eligible runs. Added thread handoff between local and remote hosts , so you can move…
entries.summary_zh: Codex Changelog 在 2026-06-18 記錄了Codex 編碼代理、企業管理控制、可靠性與效能修正相關更新；完整版本與修正內容見官方英文摘要。

entries.title_en: Create a note from a response
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT web lets users highlight response text, continue it in a writing block, or save it to the Library.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT 網頁版允許使用者反白回覆文字、在寫作區塊中接續書寫，或將其儲存至資料庫。

entries.title_en: Faster iOS camera and photo uploads
entries.title_zh: 更快的 iOS 相機與照片上傳速度
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT improved the speed and smoothness of taking and uploading photos on iOS.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT 改善了在 iOS 上拍攝和上傳照片的速度與流暢度。

entries.summary_en: ChatGPT web shortened conversation sharing to a one-click flow without a separate pop-up.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT 網頁版將對話分享縮減為一鍵流程，無需另外開啟彈出視窗。

entries.title_zh: Android 上的一次性模型選擇
entries.summary_en: Paid Android users can long-press Send to choose a model for one message without changing the conversation default.
entries.summary_zh: 付費 Android 使用者可以長按「傳送」來為單則訊息選擇模型，而無需更改該對話的預設模型。

entries.summary_en: ChatGPT can provide text and audio pronunciation guidance for words in more than 60 languages across web, iOS, and Android.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT 可在網頁版、iOS 和 Android 上提供超過 60 種語言的文字與語音發音指南。

entries.title_zh: Codex 的「記錄與重播」功能
entries.summary_en: Record & Replay is a new Codex app feature for macOS that lets eligible users demonstrate a workflow once and turn it into a reusable skill. It is useful for repetitive workflows or tasks that are easier to show than describe, such as creating a configured issue, publishing a video, or downloading a recurring report. Record & Replay requires Computer Use to be available and enabled, and initial availability excludes the European Unio…
entries.summary_zh: 「記錄與重播」是 macOS 版 Codex 應用程式的一項新功能，讓符合資格的使用者只需示範一次工作流程，即可將其轉變為可重複使用的技能。這對於重複性的工作流程，或比起描述更容易透過展示完成的任務（例如建立已設定的議題、發佈影片或下載定期報告）非常實用。…

entries.title_zh: 統一釘選與側邊欄整理
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT web made chats and projects pinnable from the sidebar and added options to combine Recents or group chats by project.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT 網頁版現在允許從側邊欄釘選對話與專案，並新增了合併「最近對話」或依專案分組對話的選項。

entries.title_en: Usage limits, billing analytics and Codex Record & Replay
entries.title_zh: 用量限制、帳務分析與 Codex Record & Replay
entries.summary_en: Enterprise and Edu added monthly credit limits plus expanded Global Admin Console billing and analytics; eligible Codex macOS users gained Record & Replay for turning demonstrations into reusable skills.
entries.summary_zh: Enterprise/Edu 新增月度 credit 限制與擴充的帳務/分析；符合資格的 Codex macOS 用戶可將示範轉為可重用 skill。

entries.summary_en: ChatGPT added a conversational World Cup experience for schedules, matchups, teams, players, country storylines, predictions, and outcome scenarios.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT 新增了互動式世界盃體驗，提供賽程、對戰組合、球隊、球員、國家故事線、預測及比賽結果情境。

entries.summary_en: New features Added per-host personality settings with Friendly and Pragmatic options. Added support for editing goals directly in the composer. Added a link from forked conversations back to the original thread. Improvements and bug fixes Improved side chat visibility with separate conversations above the composer. Improved composer autocomplete for commands, skills, and plugins from any prefix. Improved progress visibility for subag…
entries.summary_zh: Codex Changelog 在 2026-06-22 記錄了代理與工具調用、可靠性與效能修正相關更新；完整版本與修正內容見官方英文摘要。

entries.title_zh: Daybreak 與 Codex Security 更新
entries.summary_en: OpenAI announced Daybreak for defensive security and an updated Codex Security plugin aimed at finding, prioritizing, fixing and validating vulnerabilities end to end.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出防禦型資安方案 Daybreak，並更新 Codex Security plugin，以端到端發現、排序、修補與驗證漏洞。
entries.source_name: Daybreak: Tools for securing every organization in the world

entries.title_en: Large pastes are now handled as attachments for more plans
entries.title_zh: 更多方案支援將長內容貼上處理為附件
entries.summary_en: Starting today for ChatGPT Free and Go users, long pastes are handled differently in ChatGPT. If you paste more than 10k characters into the composer, ChatGPT will automatically convert the content into an attachment instead of inserting it directly into the text field. This keeps the composer cleaner and helps prevent large pastes from consuming your entire context window. You can still move the content back into the message at any…
entries.summary_zh: 從今天起，ChatGPT Free 和 Go 使用者在貼上長內容時會有不同的處理方式。如果您在輸入框中貼上超過 1 萬個字元，ChatGPT 會自動將內容轉換為附件，而非直接插入文字欄位中。…

entries.title_en: Released the Safety Usage Dashboard on the OpenAI API platform.
entries.summary_en: Released the Safety Usage Dashboard on the OpenAI API platform. The Safety dashboard shows blocked Responses requests based on safetyidentifier values sent on requests to identify end users. Visit the Safety dashboard.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-06-23 為 OpenAI API 更新安全與治理機制；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: Released the Safety Usage Dashboard on the OpenAI API platform.
entries.title_zh: 推出 OpenAI API 安全用量儀表板
entries.summary_en: Released the Safety Usage Dashboard on the OpenAI API platform. The Safety dashboard shows blocked Responses requests based on safetyidentifier values sent on requests to identify end users. Visit the Safety dashboard .
entries.summary_zh: 推出 OpenAI API 安全用量儀表板。OpenAI 將此列為 2026-06-23 的功能；重點涉及安全與治理、代理與工具調用，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.summary_en: We’re updating GPT-5.5 Instant, our most-used model in ChatGPT, to improve conversational quality—especially when users are making a decision, asking for advice, planning something, researching options, or shopping. The model is better at identifying the underlying goal behind a question and carrying context across multiple turns. It also follows complex instructions more reliably: when a request includes several constraints or requi…
entries.summary_zh: 我們正在更新 ChatGPT 中最常用的模型 GPT-5.5 Instant，以提升對話品質，特別是在使用者進行決策、尋求建議、規劃事物、研究選項或購物時。該模型在識別問題背後的潛在目標以及在多輪對話中延續上下文的能力有所提升。…

entries.summary_en: Updated the chat-latest snapshot, which points to the latest Instant model currently used in ChatGPT. We recommend leveraging GPT-5.5 for production API usage, but feel free to use this model to test the latest improvements for chat use cases. The underlying model snapshot will be regularly updated. Read more here.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-06-24 為 GPT-5.5 更新開發者平台；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: Updated the chat-latest snapshot, which points to the latest Instant model currently used in ChatGPT. We recommend leveraging GPT-5.5 for production API usage, but feel free to use this model to test the latest improvements for chat use cases. The underlying model snapshot will be regularly updated. Read more here .

entries.title_en: Codex Remote GA and DigitalOcean plugin
entries.title_zh: 方案更新：Codex Remote GA and DigitalOcean plugin
entries.summary_en: Codex Remote is now generally available on all ChatGPT plans. From the ChatGPT mobile app, users can start or continue work on a connected Mac or Windows host, review progress, and approve actions from their phone. Remote Control now uses authenticated one-to-one QR pairing between each supported mobile device and each host. Connections used since June 8 remain paired; older inactive connections need to pair again. Signing out turns…
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-06-25 為 Codex 調整方案、額度或計費；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.summary_en: Codex Remote became generally available on all ChatGPT plans, letting mobile users start or continue work on a paired Mac or Windows host and review progress or approve actions from their phone.
entries.summary_zh: Codex Remote 已於所有 ChatGPT 方案中正式推出，讓行動版使用者能在已配對的 Mac 或 Windows 主機上開始或繼續工作，並透過手機審閱進度或核准操作。

entries.title_zh: Codex Remote 正式全面推出
entries.summary_en: Codex Remote has reached general availability. Use Codex from the ChatGPT mobile app to start or continue work on a connected Mac or Windows host, review progress, and approve actions from your phone. Remote Control now uses authenticated one-to-one QR pairing between each iOS or Android device and each host. Update the ChatGPT mobile app and Codex App to the latest versions before connecting. Connections used since June 8, 2026, rem…
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-06-25 為 Codex 擴大開放範圍；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_en: DigitalOcean Droplet Workspace plugin for Codex
entries.title_zh: Codex 的 DigitalOcean Droplet 工作區外掛程式
entries.summary_en: A new DigitalOcean Droplet Workspace plugin lets Codex provision a Droplet, configure SSH access, and connect it to the Codex app as a remote workspace.
entries.summary_zh: 新的 DigitalOcean Droplet 工作區外掛程式可讓 Codex 部署 Droplet、設定 SSH 存取權，並將其連接至 Codex 應用程式作為遠端工作區。

entries.summary_en: We’re rolling out a new speech-to-text model for dictation in ChatGPT across all plans. This is a behind-the-scenes update, so there are no changes to how you use dictation. The update improves transcription accuracy across languages and accents, including when multilingual speakers mix or switch between languages. Evaluations showed gains in Japanese, Korean, Chinese, Urdu, Vietnamese, accented English, and long-form Spanish, French…
entries.summary_zh: 我們正在所有方案的 ChatGPT 聽寫功能中推出全新的語音轉文字模型。此更新於後台進行，因此聽寫的使用方式沒有改變。此次更新提升了跨語言和口音的轉錄準確度，包括多語言使用者混合或切換語言時的情況。…

entries.title_en: Personal finance in ChatGPT expands to Plus users and Android
entries.title_zh: ChatGPT 個人理財功能拓展至 Plus 使用者與 Android 平台
entries.summary_en: The personal finance experience in ChatGPT is rolling out to Plus users in the U. S. on web and iOS. It is also now available on Android for Pro and Plus users in the U. S. Eligible users can securely connect supported financial accounts, view a dashboard of their finances, and ask ChatGPT questions grounded in their financial context
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT 的個人理財體驗正陸續推向美國網頁版與 iOS 版的 Plus 使用者。此外，現在也適用於美國 Android 版的 Pro 與 Plus 使用者。符合資格的使用者可安全地連結支援的金融帳戶、檢視財務儀表板，並向 ChatGPT 詢問基於其財務情境的問題。

entries.summary_en: As of June 26, 2026, GPT-4.5 is no longer available in ChatGPT, including for custom GPTs. Existing conversations that used GPT-4.5 can continue with GPT-5.5. This retirement was previously announced on May 28, 2026. It applies to ChatGPT only; there are no changes to the API.
entries.summary_zh: 自 2026 年 6 月 26 日起，GPT-4.5 不再於 ChatGPT（包含自訂 GPT）中提供。使用過 GPT-4.5 的現有對話可繼續使用 GPT-5.5 進行。此停用通知先前已於 2026 年 5 月 28 日公佈。此變更僅適用於 ChatGPT，API 不受影響。

entries.summary_en: New features Added support for creating, searching, opening, forking, and managing Codex tasks directly from a conversation. Added filters for staged, unstaged, branch, and last-turn changes, with controls for comparing branches. Added support for adding selected transcript text directly to the composer. Added previews for image and file attachments before sending. Added inline Photos and Camera pickers to the attachment menu. Added…

entries.title_en: ChatGPT for PowerPoint generally available for Business
entries.title_zh: ChatGPT for PowerPoint 在 Business 正式 GA
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT for PowerPoint reached general availability for Business workspaces, while Workspace Agent runs moved to token-based pricing.
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT for PowerPoint 向 Business 工作區正式 GA；Workspace Agent runs 同步轉為按 token 計價。

entries.title_zh: 在 ChatGPT 中推出 GPT-5.5 Instant Mini
entries.summary_en: We’re rolling out GPT-5.5 Instant Mini in ChatGPT. It replaces GPT-5.3 Instant Mini as the fallback model users reach after hitting their GPT-5.5 Instant or Auto rate limits. Because it serves as a fallback, it won’t appear in the model picker. This update does not affect the API or Codex. Compared with GPT-5.3 Instant Mini, GPT-5.5 Instant Mini better tracks evolving user intent, calibrates tone, and avoids repetitive or overly stru…
entries.summary_zh: 我們在 ChatGPT 中推出 GPT-5.5 Instant Mini。它取代 GPT-5.3 Instant Mini，成為使用者達到 GPT-5.5 Instant 或 Auto 速率限制後的後備模型。由於它作為後備模型，不會出現在模型選擇器中。此更新不影響 API 或 Codex。

entries.summary_en: gpt-realtime-2.1-mini Released GPT-Realtime-2.1, an updated realtime reasoning model with improved alphanumeric recognition, silence and noise handling, and interruption behavior. Also released GPT-Realtime-2.1 mini, a faster, lower-cost distilled reasoning model for realtime voice applications.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-07-06 為 ChatGPT Voice 推出新產品或能力；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

entries.title_zh: 推出 GPT‑Realtime‑2.1 與 GPT‑Realtime‑2.1 mini
entries.summary_en: Released GPT-Realtime-2.1 , an updated realtime reasoning model with improved alphanumeric recognition, silence and noise handling, and interruption behavior. Also released GPT-Realtime-2.1 mini , a faster, lower-cost distilled reasoning model for realtime voice applications.
entries.summary_zh: 推出 GPT‑Realtime‑2.1 與 GPT‑Realtime‑2.1 mini。OpenAI 將此列為 2026-07-06 的功能；重點涉及即時語音與音訊、定價與用量，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.title_zh: 在 ChatGPT Voice 中推出 GPT-Live-1
entries.summary_en: We’re rolling out a new ChatGPT Voice experience. ChatGPT Voice is now powered by GPT-Live-1 for paid users and GPT-Live-1 mini for Free users. Both models can listen and speak at the same time, making turn-taking and interruptions feel more natural. GPT-Live-1 works inside a ChatGPT chat, with spoken responses appearing alongside streamed text. It can use web search and memory, show visual results through supported widgets, and work…
entries.summary_zh: 我們推出全新的 ChatGPT Voice 體驗。ChatGPT Voice 現由付費使用者的 GPT-Live-1 和免費使用者的 GPT-Live-1 mini 驅動。兩種模型皆能同時聽取與發言，使輪流對話和中斷感覺更自然。GPT-Live-1 在 ChatGPT 對話中運作，語音回應會與串流文字同時出現。

entries.summary_en: OpenAI announced that Atlas is being deprecated as browser-agent capabilities move into ChatGPT and Codex; Atlas is scheduled to stop working on August 9, 2026.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 宣布棄用 Atlas，將瀏覽器代理能力移入 ChatGPT 與 Codex；Atlas 預計於 2026-08-09 停止運作。

entries.title_en: Codex joins the ChatGPT desktop app

entries.summary_en: Codex is now part of the ChatGPT desktop app on macOS and Windows. Existing Codex app users can update as usual and keep their projects, settings, and workflows. You can make Codex the default view and, on macOS, keep the Codex app icon. New features Edit Markdown and code directly in the app, use inline annotations, and ask Codex to revise selected content. Review GitHub pull requests in the sidebar, with reviewer feedback alongside…
entries.summary_zh: Codex Changelog 在 2026-07-09 記錄了Codex 編碼代理、圖像與影片、可靠性與效能修正相關更新；完整版本與修正內容見官方英文摘要。

entries.title_en: Introducing ChatGPT Sites in public beta
entries.title_zh: 推出 ChatGPT Sites 公開測試版
entries.summary_en: ChatGPT Sites lets you turn your work or ideas into an interactive website or lightweight app without leaving ChatGPT. You can create dashboards, project trackers, launch calendars, prototypes, internal portals, and reports, then preview and refine the result with ChatGPT before sharing it. Business and Enterprise customers already have access to Sites. Starting today, they can also publish Sites publicly and share them with anyone t…
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT Sites 讓您無需離開 ChatGPT，即可將您的工作或想法轉變為互動式網站或輕量級應用程式。您可以建立儀表板、專案追蹤器、發佈行事曆、原型、內部入口網站和報告，並在分享前與 ChatGPT 一起預覽與優化結果。Business 和 Enterprise 客戶已可使用 Sites。

entries.summary_en: ChatGPT Work is an agent for longer, more involved tasks. It can research and analyze information, work across connected apps and files, and create finished documents, spreadsheets, presentations, reports, and Sites. You can follow its progress, answer questions, change direction, and approve important actions as it works. Work can also keep projects moving through Scheduled Tasks that run once, repeat on a schedule or trigger, or mo…
entries.summary_zh: ChatGPT Work 是一款用於處理較長且複雜任務的代理，能夠進行研究、分析已連結的應用程式與檔案，並建立完成的文件、試算表、簡報、報告和 Sites，同時由使用者主導並批准重要動作。

entries.title_zh: 在 ChatGPT 中推出 GPT-5.6 Sol
entries.summary_en: We’re beginning the rollout of GPT-5.6 Sol in ChatGPT, our flagship reasoning model for complex work across coding, research, science, cybersecurity, computer use, and design. GPT-5.6 Sol is rolling out to eligible paid ChatGPT plans. Free, Go, and logged-out users are not included. Availability may vary during rollout, and managed-workspace access can depend on administrator settings. Availability for other GPT-5.6 family models var…
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 開始在 ChatGPT 中推出 GPT-5.6 Sol，作為適用付費方案中用於程式編碼、研究、科學、網路安全、電腦使用和設計等複雜工作的旗艦推理模型。

entries.title_zh: 推出 GPT-5.6 模型系列
entries.summary_en: OpenAI released the GPT-5.6 family across ChatGPT, Codex, and the API: Sol for frontier capability, Terra for intelligence-cost balance, and Luna for efficient high-volume workloads.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 在 ChatGPT、Codex 和 API 中發布了 GPT-5.6 系列：Sol 用於前沿能力，Terra 用於智慧與成本平衡，Luna 用於高效的大規模工作負載。

entries.title_en: Plugin Directory replaces the App Directory
entries.title_zh: Plugin Directory 取代 App Directory
entries.summary_en: OpenAI replaced ChatGPT's App Directory with the Plugin Directory. Existing app connections remain in place, while plugins can package skills, apps, and app templates for ChatGPT Work, Codex, web, and desktop workflows.
entries.summary_zh: OpenAI 以 Plugin Directory 取代 ChatGPT 的 App Directory。現有的應用程式連結保持不變，而外掛程式可為 ChatGPT Work、Codex、網頁和桌面工作流程封裝技能、應用程式和應用程式模板。

entries.title_zh: 推出 GPT‑5.6 Sol、Terra 與 Luna 模型家族
entries.summary_en: Released the GPT-5.6 model family , including GPT-5.6 Sol for frontier capability, GPT-5.6 Terra for a balance of intelligence and cost, and GPT-5.6 Luna for efficient, high-volume workloads. The gpt-5.6 alias routes requests to gpt-5.6-sol . GPT-5.6 adds Programmatic Tool Calling , explicit prompt caching controls , persisted reasoning, max reasoning effort, and Pro mode , and Multi-agent orchestration in beta for the Responses API…
entries.summary_zh: 推出 GPT‑5.6 Sol、Terra 與 Luna 模型家族。OpenAI 將此列為 2026-07-09 的功能；重點涉及代理與工具調用、圖像與影片、定價與用量，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

entries.summary_en: We’re deprecating Atlas as we bring browser-based agentic capabilities into ChatGPT and Codex. Atlas is scheduled to stop working on August 9, 2026. We want to make this transition as easy as possible. Before then, move any Atlas data you want to keep. Atlas browser data, including bookmarks, open tabs, and browser history, will not transfer automatically. You can export your cookies and passwords to the ChatGPT desktop app and your…
entries.summary_zh: 我們將棄用 Atlas，並將基於瀏覽器的代理能力引入 ChatGPT 和 Codex。Atlas 預定於 2026 年 8 月 9 日停止運作。我們希望使此轉換盡可能順利。在此之前，請移動您希望保留的任何 Atlas 資料。包含書籤、開啟的分頁和瀏覽記錄在內的 Atlas 瀏覽器資料將不會自動傳輸。

entries.title_zh: 停用 ChatGPT 中的群組對話
entries.summary_en: Beginning July 9, users on web, iOS, and Android will no longer be able to create new group chats, turn existing conversations into group chats, or join a group chat through an invite link. Existing group chats will remain available and can continue to be used for now. When an existing group chat becomes read-only, users will retain access to the messages, files, and images already shared there. Individual ChatGPT conversations are u…
entries.summary_zh: 自 7 月 9 日起，網頁版、iOS 和 Android 使用者將無法建立新的群組對話、將現有對話轉換為群組對話，或透過邀請連結加入群組對話。現有的群組對話目前仍可繼續使用。

entries.title_en: The new ChatGPT desktop app brings Chat, Work, and Codex together
entries.title_zh: 全新 ChatGPT 桌面應用程式整合 Chat、Work 與 Codex
entries.summary_en: The new ChatGPT desktop app is available globally for macOS and Windows. It combines Chat for questions and conversation, Work for research and finished deliverables, and Codex for software development in one app. On desktop, Work can use local files and desktop apps with your permission. The built-in browser lets ChatGPT gather information from websites and work with supported web-based tools and files. Codex also adds inline editin…
entries.summary_zh: 全新 ChatGPT 桌面應用程式已於 macOS 與 Windows 平台全球推出。該應用程式將用於提問與對話的 Chat、用於研究與交付成品的 Work，以及用於軟體開發的 Codex 整合為單一應用程式。在桌面上，經授權後，Work 可使用本機檔案與桌面應用程式……
